Elegant Classic Design

Store your treasured wine collection in a beautifully designed Dometic wine cooler. With its stylish stainless steel details and attractive interior lighting, the Classic range of Dometic wine coolers complements any space. Allow the Dometic wine cooler to take center stage in your kitchen, enhance the esthetics of your home and enjoy wine at its very best.

 

Optimal Storage Environment

For wine to unfold its full bouquet and flavor, both the storage conditions and the serving temperature must be right. Dometic wine coolers ensure the optimal environment for unlocking the wine's full flavors and charecter. The temperature is accurately controlled thanks to electronic regulation and a constant humidity is maintained between 50-70% ensuring the corks don't dry or mold. A fan circulates the air inside the wine cooler while the integrated carbon filters eliminates any potential odors. The low emission treatment of the triple-glazed doors on Dometic wine coolers stops ultraviolet rays that can damage and change the character of the wine.

name: Camus  Cognac Ile De Re Fine Island (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
CAMUS has always drawn upon all of the Charente region’s diverse terroirs, with the aim of revealing the richness and flavors these different areas have to offer. In this constant quest, the discovery of the vineyards of the Île de Ré was a genuine revelation. Île de Ré is found off the west coast of France in the Charente-Maritime department. Situated in the Bois à Terroirs cru, the island is the most westerly region of the Cognac appellation. With its fresh, marine notes, CAMUS Île de Ré Fine Island is a perfect expression of the authentic style and qualities of its area of provenance. The grapes have naturally higher iodine content than those harvested on the mainland. In addition, the island’s mild climate helps to bestow a truly individual character on the eaux-de-vie it produces. Distilled on the lees to enhance the original flavors of the eaux-de-vie from which it is produced, Île de Ré Fine Island Cognac is then aged in an extremely damp cellar to add greater roundness, using lightly toasted oak barrels that provide an extremely delicate woody flavour.

Awards :

  • Silver Medal : San Francisco World Spirits Competition 2018
  • Silver Medal : International Wine & Spirit Competition - 2018
  • Gold Medal : The Cognac Masters (The Spirits Business) - 2018

desc_en_short: This beer is an institution: the Oktoberfest Bier from Paulaner, with its full-bodied pleasant taste. Its alcohol content of 6 % volume makes it somewhat stronger than the usual lager beer. The original gravity of the Oktoberfest Beer is also slightly higher, starting at 13.5 %. With a hint of malty sweetness the Oktoberfest Beer possesses the perfect balance.

name: Vedett  Extra IPA  330ml x 24
desc_en_short: Fresh, fruity and floral notes give way to touches of caramel sweetness, while its superb, lingering aftertaste continues to tantalise the tastebuds long after. Here’s to a great-tasting, refreshing beer!

name: Chalawan  Pale Ale  330ml x 24
desc_en_short: Chalawan, this Pale Ale balances bitterness vs. sweetness.  Crafted from the blends of Pilsner malt, and roasted Munich malt, it has a medium body with moderate carbonation. It delivers a malty caramel note flanked by Lychee, citrus and floral

name: Chatri  IPA  330ml x 24
food_matching: Pizza, Burgers, Fried Food, Spicy Cuisine
desc_en_short: This beer is very dimensional. Solid back-bone from the blend of pilsner malt, rye, Australian hops, and specialty hops. Massive hop flavors and aromas creaed by using four different hop-addition techniques, follows with a hint of citrus, floral and subtle grapefruit aromas.

name: Monkey 47  Sloe Gin (500 ml)
desc_en_short: Very aromatic and complex nose. Huge fruit notes and quite a good deal of juniper too. A mix of earthy, tangy juniper with rich, sweet red berries. Very refined and balanced. Hints of almond.

name: Martin Miller's  Gin (700 ml)
food_matching: Tonic, Seafood Cocktails, Light Appetizers, Citrus Dishes
desc_en_short:
Martin Miller's Gin is a premium gin made from 10 carefully selected botanicals blended with the purest Icelandic water - the ultimate in good taste. Bright, lively botanicals. Smooth and delicate, long-lasting. Well-balanced citrus flavours. Very aromatic with a soft, clean finish.

Awards :

Master - Super Premium - 2020 : The Gin Masters (The Spirits Business)

name: Broker's  London Dry Gin (750 ml)
desc_en_short:
Clear. Rich, creamy, candied citrus and fruit peel aromas. Very smooth on the palate with a good balance of fresh botanicals, spicy juniper, and sweet ripe citrus fruit. Finishes with a smooth, warming peppery fade. A delicious and stylish gin for martinis with the guts to stand up to tonic as well.

Awards : 

Silver - London Dry - 2021 : World Gin Awards

name: J.J.Whitley  London Dry Gin (700 ml)
food_matching: Tonic, Seafood Cocktails, Light Appetizers, Citrus Dishes
desc_en_short: This London Dry Gin has clear scents of juniper, pepper and parma violets with smooth citrus and a hint of dryness.

name: Sipsmith  London Dry Gin (700 ml)
desc_en_short: The quintessential expression of a classic, traditional London Dry Gin. Bold, complex and aromatic – smooth enough for a Martini, yet rich and balanced, perfect for a G&T.

name: Rock Rose  Navy Strength Edition Gin (700 ml)
food_matching: Mediterranean, Grilled Vegetables, Light Salads, Sushi
desc_en_short:
The Navy Strength is a real punchier version of Rock Rose Gin. Thanks to the higher ABV the juniper pine and lemon verbena come to the fore on the nose. On the taste there is lovely warm blaeberries and a hint of spice from the cinnamon. The finish is long, smooth and the light mint and rose flavours excel.

Awards :

Country Winner - Navy Gin - 2021 -World Gin Awards

name: Rock Rose  Spring Edition Gin (700 ml)
desc_en_short: The first of Rock Rose's seasonal gins to be released, this Spring edition uses locally foraged, seasonal botanicals including sycamore sap, dandelion and coltsfoot. Cool and fresh, the signature serve is 25ml gin to 50ml tonic and garnished with coriander.

name: Rock Rose  Winter Edition Gin (700 ml)
food_matching: Mediterranean, Grilled Vegetables, Light Salads, Sushi
desc_en_short: It's the winter edition of the Rock Rose Gin season variants, each made with a flavour profile that correlates to a different season. For this expression, the Dunnet Bay Distillers aimed for a juniper-forward, pine-y flavour profile.

name: Buss 509  Raspberry Gin (700 ml)
desc_en_short: The sweetest of all our gins and therefore the perfect gateway drink for the amateur enthusiast. A colourful and smooth introduction into the world of gin. But don’t be fooled, the distillation quality is exquisite.

name: Buss 509  Pink Grapefruit Gin (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Packed with citrus notes, this Buss No.509 Gin features red Californian grapefruit as a botanical, along with Juniper, Coriander, Liquorice, Angelica, Vanilla, Cardamom, Iris, Orange and Lemon. Bright and flavoursome, this Belgian gin would make for a fine aperitif.

name: Buss 509  Persian Peach Gin (700 ml)
desc_en_short: The fourth release from the Buss No.509 is a Persian Peach flavoured gin, made with a selection of botanicals including juniper, coriander, liquorice, angelica, vanilla, cardamom, iris, orange, lemon and fresh Persian peaches. Goes well in a gin and tonic garnished with mint leaves...

name: Buss 509  Master Cut Gin (700 ml)
food_matching: Tonic, Seafood Cocktails, Light Appetizers, Citrus Dishes
desc_en_short: A very 'citrus-forward' Belgian gin here from the Buss No.509 range, released as part of a series of Choice Cut gins in mid-2016. The Master Cut is brimming with orange and grapefruit notes, and has been bottled at a generous 45% ABV.

name: Caorunn  Gin (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
Carefully handcrafted in the Scottish Highlands, Caorunn expertly infuses five locally foraged gin botanicals. Artisanal and small batch, beautifully mixing the rugged charm of Speyside with the urban sophistication of modern Scotland.

Awards :

Silver - Gin - London Dry - 2019 : International Wine & Spirit Competition

name: Rock Rose  Pink Grapefruit Old Tom Gin (700 ml)
desc_en_short: A refreshing variation on Old Tom gin from Scotland's Rock Rose, utilising the deliciousness of pink grapefruit! Organic pink grapefruits are peeled by hand, and the peel goes in to the botanical basket alongside the supporting botanicals for distillation. A touch of muscovado sugar is added afterwards, bringing that familiar Old Tom sweetness to the fore.

name: Boodles  Gin (700 ml)
food_matching: Tonic, Seafood Cocktails, Light Appetizers, Citrus Dishes

name: Gibson’s  Pink Gin (700 ml)
food_matching: Tonic, Seafood Cocktails, Light Appetizers, Citrus Dishes
desc_en_short: Will you dare to go pink wih GIBSON’S? The worldwide awarded Gin is now available in a refined Pink version. The brand is tapping into the trend for flavoured Gin with the launch of a Strawberry-flavoured expression. Can be enjoyed in long drinks and cocktails, it is ideal for adding a sweater and fruity finish to the famous Gin & Tonic: 4cl GIBSON’S Pink, 12cl tonic water and we recommend fresh strawberries for topping. The must: its very recognizable colour to give an original twist to cocktails.

name: Whitley Neill  Lemongrass & Ginger Gin (700 ml)
food_matching: Tonic, Seafood Cocktails, Light Appetizers, Citrus Dishes
desc_en_short: A taste for adventure and discovery runs through all eight generations of the Whitley Neill family tree. So it should come as no surprise that at the turn of the century, Frederick Neill found himself on a voyage through Asia, where he discovered the fragrant and citrus infused lemongrass.

name: Widges  London Dry Gin (700 ml)
food_matching: Tonic, Seafood Cocktails, Light Appetizers, Citrus Dishes

name: Rock Rose  Jam Doughnut Gin (500 ml)
food_matching: Mediterranean, Grilled Vegetables, Light Salads, Sushi
desc_en_short:
No.4 : Jam Doughnut

The fourth in the series is the wonderful Jam Doughnut gin.  We wanted to have a wee bit of fun for the fourth and final gin of the Creative Collection and decided to distil doughnuts!

We popped twenty or so delicious Perk doughnuts into Elizabeth’s botanical vapour basket, along with their homemade jam and some amazing Madagascan vanilla as well as lots of juniper. The result is a fun gin full of delightful strawberry and vanilla notes evoking thoughts of a yummy jam doughnut!

Northern Irish born illustrator, Hannah Cambridge, lived all around the UK before finally settling here in Caithness. We chose Hannah to design a fun and bright label that encapsulated the ‘spirit’ of this gin. Hannah has combined fun with creativity to produce this wonderfully whimsical illustration.

name: Rock Rose  Apple & Lavender Gin (500 ml)
desc_en_short:
No.2 : Apple & Lavender

The second in the series is the wonderful Apple & Lavender gin.  This was first distilled this as a special edition gin for the Craft Gin Club in 2014. It proved to be a firm favourite securing it’s position for re-release as part of the Creative Collection.

After giving local watercolour artist, Liz O'Donnell, the very vague brief of 'apple and lavender' she returned with a beautiful painting which encapsulated the flavours perfectly.

Local apples from the Black Isle in Scotland are used in the distillation to bring a touch of Highland sweetness to the gin, which complements the lavender wonderfully. This results in an elegant and subtle gin with delicious juniper and a delicate blend of lavender and apple.

name: Sakurao  Hamagou Japanese Craft Dry Gin (700 ml)
Buss 509  Bulgarian Rose Gin (700 ml)
food_matching: Mediterranean, Grilled Vegetables, Light Salads, Sushi
desc_en_short: This gin was created with the collector in mind but quickly turned it into an all year favorite amongst gin lovers.. An extravagant and colourful distillation that becomes remarkably subtle in a Gin & Tonic mix.

name: Rock Rose  Sloe Berries Gin (500 ml)
desc_en_short: Our beautiful Autumn Edition Gin, a warm spirit packed with locally grown botanicals, berries and spices, is used as the perfect base for our sloe gin. We collect local elderberries and blaeberries, and use the best sloeberries we can find to make the perfect liqueur. Sweetened with muscovado sugar, the result is a thick, dark sloe gin which is jammy and tart, yet smooth and rich.

G'Vine  June Pear (700 ml)

name: Sod Chaeng  Gin (750 ml)
desc_en_short:
Gin from 15 different herbs (distilled twice and filtered through 7 steps)

Tasting Notes

Nose : Citrusy and a hint of Floral from Elderflower, Smoothness and followed by juniper and zesty, citrus freshness.

The Palate : Dry juniper leads, then reveals lemon and grapefruit

The Finish : with spicy juniper and hint of botanicals flavours harmonise.

name: Langley's  London Dry Gin (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
The gin of choice for premium houses and mixology experts, London Dry is the flagship brand in the Langley’s Gin range.

Distilled a single time in an English pot still and developed in a quest to strike the perfect balance of strength, smoothness and flavour.

Awards

Great Taste Awards : 3-Stars: Exquisite Gin - 2015

The Gin Masters (The Spirits Business) : Gold London Dry - 2022

The Gin Masters (The Spirits Business) : Gold Super Premium - 2016

San Francisco World Spirits Competition : Gold Gin - 2014

name: Askur  Yggdrasil Gin (Alc. Volume 45%) (1 L)
food_matching: Tonic, Seafood Cocktails, Light Appetizers, Citrus Dishes
desc_en_short: This unique gin is a true Nordic sensatin! The purest water from Iceland combined with 6 botanicals from different sides of the world cause this premium Nordic Gin to express a unique flavor profile on your taste-pallet and impress younger audiences as well as old school Gin connoisseurs alike! May the Norse Gods be by your side when you experience this unique Nordic force of nature for the first time!

name: Harahorn  Cask Aged Gin (500 ml)
food_matching: Tonic, Seafood Cocktails, Light Appetizers, Citrus Dishes
desc_en_short:
With a base of Norwegian botanicals, this spirit has aged for more than 12 months in Oloroso sherry casks introducing some oaky, fruity notes to the palate.

The result is a premium gin with softness and elegance with a taste of juniper berry, coriander and spices. Enjoy it in a Negroni or alone in a tulip shaped glass.

name: Ki No Bi  Tea Gin (700 ml)
desc_en_short: KI NO TEA is a product created in collaboration with tea-grower and blender Hori-Shichimeien, founded in the Meiji era in 1879 and based in the famous Uji region to the south of Kyoto city. A number of super-premium Uji teas have been specially selected to form the heart of KI NO TEA.

name: Nikka  Coffey Gin (700 ml)
food_matching: Tonic, Seafood Cocktails, Light Appetizers, Citrus Dishes
desc_en_short: Proudly maturing its spirits in its Yoichi and Miyagikyo d.istilleries, Nikkaâ€™s entire process is completed in Japan, from barrel to bottle. Its distinct aroma and body is derived from direct heating distillation â€“ a long lost traditional method that heats finely powdered coal â€“ the Coffey Gin boasts rich and mellow taste that includes yuzu, kabosu, amanatsu and shikuwasa. Balancing it out, tangy apple and sansho pepper give the gin its Japanese twist.

name: Seekers Mekong Dry Gin (700 ml)

name: Rock Rose  Smoked Orange Gin (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
A zesty citrus burst with a delicious smoked tea undertone

Our Smoked Orange Edition is a credit to our distiller, Craig. Martin challenged him to take Rock Rose Gin into exploring an entirely different flavour profile, whilst remaining true to the distinctive notes of our original Scottish spirit.

This release uses fine Lapsang Souchong tea to deliver smoky notes to enhance zesty organic orange peel. Complemented by tangerine sage and lemon verbena from our geodome, this is a richly complex gin with a bright bonfire nose; a palate that wakes the taste buds.

name: Sikkim  Bilberry Distilled Gin - Indian British Tea (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Sikkim Bilberry is a Distilled Gin with juniper, red tea, flower essences, blackberries, blueberries, coriander, iris, calamus and bitter orange skin. It provides a sweet fruity taste on the palate with the aroma of flowers

name: Peddlers  Shanghai Craft Gin (700 ml)
food_matching: Tonic, Seafood Cocktails, Light Appetizers, Citrus Dishes
desc_en_short: Multiple awards from at the San Fran World Spirits Awards and CWSA. A fusion of eleven rare botanicals. Notes of Buddha’s hand, Sichuan pepper and lotus combine with juniper and other organic botanicals for a distinctive yet perfectly blended gin.

name: Caorunn  Tom Yum Gin (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
We have a special treat for our favourite gin lovers. Meet our new limited-edition Caorunn Tom Yum Gin, with a small number of bottles available just for you, our mailing list.

This perfectly balanced gin captures the essence of both Scotland and Thailand. Our authentic botanical recipe – made up of five Celtic botanicals and six traditional botanicals – is infused with delicious Thai flavours. The result? A sweet and slightly spicy gin with a twist.

name: Nonino  Grappa Friulana (700 ml)
food_matching: Chocolate, Dried Fruits, Cheese, After Dinner
desc_en_short: White grappa from white and red pomace. Typical, appropriately alcoholic, it has both the scent of bread crusts and liquorice on the nose.

name: Granmonte  Red Jungle Grappa (330 ml)
food_matching: Chocolate, Dried Fruits, Cheese, After Dinner
desc_en_short:
Distilled spirit, made from 100% Thai- grown grape skins from GranMonte Vineyard and Winery in Khao Yai region.

Thailand's first ever Grappa, distilled from GranMonte precious grape skins. A uniquely aromatic spirit with dried-fruit character and a long, powerful finish.

name: Luxardo  Sambuca (1 L)
desc_en_short: Clear color. Perfume is typical of sambuca, has a very intense aroma. The palate is sharp but well balanced, very rounded, with the anise taste persisting in the mouth.

name: Tia Maria  (Cold Brew Coffee Liqueur) (700 ml)
desc_en_short: With its intiguing blend of smooth coffee and vanilla tones, Tia Maria's secret Jamaican recipe reveals a timeless allure. Enjoy the deliciously versatile taste of Tia Maria mixed with milk or cola, splashed over ice or enjoyed it in coffee.

name: Mr.Boston  Blue Curacao (1 L)
desc_en_short: The liqueur has an orange-like flavour with varying degrees of bitterness. It is naturally colourless, but is often given artificial colouring, most commonly blue or orange, which confers an exotic appearance to cocktails and other mixed drinks.

name: Bitter Truth  Pimento Dram Liqueur (500 ml)
desc_en_short: Sweet, spicy and very intense. Clove initially presents itself in the foreground, fading into the pure flavors of cinnamon, nutmeg and pepper which linger on the tongue.

name: Bitter Truth  Jerry Thomas Own Decanter (200 ml)
desc_en_short: Very fruity and very bitter. Citrus and dried fruit aromas unite with the spicy and bitter flavors of cloves, angostura bark and cinnamon.

name: Bittermens  Elemakule Tiki (125 ml)
desc_en_short: Elemakule Tiki Bitters are produced in very small batches. These are flavoured with cinnamon and allspice as well as spices from Polynesia and the Caribbean.

name: Mancino  Vermouth Secco (750 ml)
desc_en_short: A herbal, slightly nutty white vermouth made to a recipe created by renowned bartender Giancarlo Mancino using 19 botanicals, including Sage, Marjoram and Oregano.

name: Mancino  Vermouth Rosso (750 ml)
desc_en_short: Named after famed bartender Giancarlo Mancino, this is part of a new brand of vermouth, a drink where you don't often see new brands popping up left and right. This is their Rosso Amaranto, made with a blend of 38 botanicals, a recipe created by Giancarlo Mancino himself. Makes a mighty fine Manhattan, this does.

name: Molinari  Extra Sambuca (1 L)
desc_en_short: Molinari Sambuca Extra is a traditional Italian liqueur that is flavoured with essential oil extracted from star anise through steam distillation. Finished by adding selected sugars and natural flavourings, Molinari is often served after dinner with 3 coffee beans ('con la mosca') which are added to each glass for good luck.

name: Bitter Truth  Old Time Aromatic Bitters (200 ml)
desc_en_short: Bitter and tangy to the taste. Reminiscent of cinnamon, cardamom, anise and cloves, the aroma reminds one of gingerbread.

name: Phoenix  Triple Sec (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Phoenix Triple Sec is crystal clear liqueur with an authentic flavour of Curaçao oranges and hints of citrus. The flavours are perfectly balanced between bitter orange and sweetness. It is the most popular liqueur in every bar used as essential ingredients in cocktails.

name: Pallini  Sambuca 313 (750 ml)
desc_en_short: The Sambuca 313 combines the features of a classic Sambuca: a sweet liquor obtained from the accurate mixing of plant extracts and natural ingredients carefully selected, among which the green anise and star anise, which Pallini wanted to give a particularly spicy note with the addition of pure distilled Anise Badiana embellished with notes of Elderberry, Cinnamon and Cardamom. Packaged in a unique silk-screened bottle, has won numerous international awards.

name: Giffard  Cacao (Brown) (700 ml)
desc_en_short: This chocolate flavoured liqueur is made with distillates of cocoa beans by Giffard & Cie, a fourth generation family-owned and run liqueur producer in France''s Loire Valley. The production process is controlled within the company, mixing traditional methods (slow fruit macerations) with the latest techniques, the aim being to give every liqueur the pure taste of the fruit.

name: Giffard  Coffee (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Extracted from the best coffee beans, this liqueur is both soft and powerful. It is particularly recommended poured over sorbets or chocolate/coffee ice creams.

name: Giffard  Maraschino (700 ml)
desc_en_short: This maraschino Liqueur is made with the distillate of sour cherries by Giffard & Cie, a fourth generation family-owned and run liqueur producer in France’s Loire Valley.

name: Giffard  Crème De Passion (Passion Fruit) (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Giffard Creme Passion fruit liqueur is one of their sweeter styled ("creme" liqueurs usually being sweeter in profile), presenting in a golden orange. They recommend drinking as an aperitif or with wine.

name: Giffard  Crème De Pamplemousse Rose (Pink Grapefruit) (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Giffard  Crème De Pamplemousse Rose (Pink Grapefruit) is Fruit liqueur made from pink grapefruit and grapefruit natural extracts (essential oils).

name: Mancino  Vermouth Chinato (500 ml)
flavor_tags: Lemon Zest, Mandarin, Lemon, Honey, Cacao, Rum
desc_en_short: Giancarlo’s hybrid of the three Mancino Vermouths, Secco, Bianco and Rosso centered on Erede di Chiappone Armando Barbera d’Asti D.O.C.G, with added pure quinine bark Calissaja, has roused a new tier of Vermouth. With the instinctive grand recognition of Mancino, it lingers on a rich, deep, red, bitter wine pallet, tailoring the Chinato a notable digestive/aperitif. Serve chilled or warmed.

name: La Quintinye  Vermouth Extra Dry
desc_en_short: Created with a magnificent bouquet of 27 plants and spices, a selection of white wines and Pineau des Charentes Blanc.

name: Cinzano  Vermouth Di Torino Rosso 1757 (1 L)
desc_en_short: Cinzano Vermouth “1757” is a small batch production in numbered bottles, handcrafted gently infused with the finest mature blend of aromatics. It is intensely rich with a velvet bitter finish.

name: Cinzano  Vermouth Di Torino Dry 1757 (1 L)
desc_en_short: Cinzano Vermouth “1757” is a small batch production in numbered bottles, handcrafted gently infused with the finest mature blend of aromatics. It is intensely rich with a velvet bitter finish.

name: Hiram Walker  Peach Brandy (750 ml)
desc_en_short: Hiram Walker Peach Brandy is a delicious blend of fine brandy spirits and delicate, sun-ripened peaches. Sip this over ice or add to your favorite cocktail for something special.

name: Suntory  Crème de Kyoho / Murasaki (700 ml)
Campari  Negroni Ricetta Originale (500 ml) (Ready to drink)
Massenez  Liqueur de Pomme Verte ( Green Apple) (700 ml)
Riga Black Balsam Original Liqueur (700 ml)
Massenez  Liqueur Creme A La Fraise Des Bois (Wild Strawberries) (700 ml)
Dead Man's Finger  Raspberry Rum Cream Liqueur (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Think of it as a little bit of luxury coming your way; luxury with that Dead Man’s Fingers bite. Our Raspberry Rum Cream Liqueur is smooth and velvety with aromas of fresh raspberries.

name: The Japanese   Hinoki Bitter (200 ml)
desc_en_short: Hinoki, also known as rattan, which is a traditional lumber used to construct temples in Japan, will be the upcoming flavor for the new Japanese Bitters. About a year ago, we successfully created the bitters prototype by extracting the aroma and flavor of the aroma with the maximum value through multiple trial and error.

name: Shanky's Whip  Black Irish Whiskey Liqueur (750 ml)
Angostura  Orange Bitters (200 ml)
desc_en_short: Derived from the peels of sun-ripened oranges, caraway seed, and coriander, this orange bitters mixture adds a subtle spicy flavor and aroma to your crowd-pleasing cocktails and mixed drinks! The name Angostura comes from the town of Angostura, Venezuela where the flavoring was first produced. This botanically-infused alcoholic mixture includes water, 28% alcohol, herbs and spices.

name: Bandwgon  Manhatton Cocktail (Ready to drink) (700 ml)
Strega  Grancaffe (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Fine coffee liqueur obtained from an infusion of 100% Arabica blend A highly concentrated and very flavorsome coffee liqueur with robust espresso flavor. Lesser coffee liqueurs appear thin and bland in comparison

name: Strega  Limoncello Di Sorrento (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Limoncello di Sorrento is made with the fine lemons of the Sorrento and Amalfi coast. A skillful method of infusing lemon peels gives this product a perfect balance of taste and aroma. To enhance the taste, it is recommended to consume it cold or with ice or combined with seltzer.

name: Nakano BC  Kishu Hachimitsu Umeshu (300 ml)
desc_en_short: Kishu is the best place for growing plum in Japan. This kishu hachimitsu umeshu is using premium plum and 100% pure orange honey. It has a nice fragrance of honey with a smooth plum's sour flavour. This kishu Hachimitsu should be enjoyed on the rockor chilled for straight.

name: Kozaemon  Junmai Umeshu (500 ml)
desc_en_short: Kozaemon Junmaï umeshu is a real jewel. The nose is deliciously perfumed and fruity, with amandon and well-ripened plum notes. The mouth is surprising: very refreshing, not so sweet, round. It can be drunk on its own as an apperitif or mixed with Champagne, or at dessert, even as a digestive. It is also perfect with fatty foods during a meal. Finally it is divine with a sorbet or granular sherbert ice or with fresh apricots or a compote, vine peaches, acid apples.

name: Bijofu  Yuzu Shuwa (500 ml)
desc_en_short: Bijofu Yuzu Shuwa is a sparkling sake that we are proud to introduce to thai market. This sake is injected with carbonic acid and natural yuzu (orange) juice into Ginjo Sake. Very refreshing and easy to drink, It is best served chilled with ice.

name: Shio  Yuzu / Citrus (720 ml)
desc_en_short: The flavor which is not too strong makes it easier to drink. It can be paired with dishes of you choice. The luscious citrus blend of Yuza helps enchance the tastes of the food.

name: Nakano BC  Kishu Shikuwasa Umeshu (720 ml)
desc_en_short: An Umeshu mixed with the tropical citrus Shikwasa Lemon, unique to the Island of Okinawa. The sourness of the Shikuwasa balances the sweetness of the Umeshu in a way that it creates a new harmony unlike anything you have tasted before.

name: Nakano BC  Kishu Hassaku Umeshu (720 ml)
desc_en_short: An Umeshu mixed with the fresh fruit juice of Wakayama Prefecture's local Hassaku Orange. The Hassaku is not put through heat sterilisation therefore it retains its freshness that can be felt through the Umeshu, making this the perfect refreshment liqueur.

name: Niwa no Uguisu  Otoro (720 ml)
desc_en_short: Fresh lively fragrance and rich taste of pure green plum extract. Thick and flavorful, very elegant finish. aged in the brewery in a constant temperature. Well balanced of acidity and tangy plum character. Winner of 2011 Tenman Tenjin Umeshu Competition. Excellent to serve on the rocks. Produced in a very small scale, this umeshu is hard to find even in Japan.

name: Kojima  Toko Ginjo Umeshu (500 ml)
desc_en_short: Soft palate, aromatic Gin fragrance is characteristic of plum wine. The lock is recommended.

name: Komasa Jyozo  Komasa no Umeshu (700 ml)
desc_en_short: KOMASA NO UMESHU made by blended the real shochu of sweet potatoes, barley and rice. This homemade UMESHU does not contain any artificial perfumes and colors. The rich aroma makes you more healthful and helps your appetite.

name: Hakutsuru  Umeshu (1.8 L)
desc_en_short: A genuinely in house umeshu (plum wine) using 100% kishu Ume. With traditional method being used, it has a refreshing aroma, soft and smooth taste.

name: Kunizakari  Chita Umeshu (720 ml)
desc_en_short:
Using Nanko Ume(Plum) 100% from Wakayama. 
A calories off by 30% series Umeshu. Semi-Sweet Umeshu that can be enjoyed at any times.

name: Hakutake  Umepon (300 ml)
desc_en_short: A perfect combination between plum and Japanese orange, Dekopon. A sweet, smooth, very easy to drink Orange & Plum Wine from Kumamoto.

name: McCormick  Rum Silver (750 ml)
food_matching: Tropical Fruit, BBQ, Spiced Desserts, Chocolate
desc_en_short: McCormick Rum is one of the McCormick family brands, with a distilling heritage that goes back to 1856. Reﬁned from sugar cane and aged in oak barrels, McCormick Rum is a superior product that delivers the taste of the Caribbean for remarkable value. Available in both Silver and Gold.

name: Appleton Estate  White Jamaica Rum (750 ml)
food_matching: Tropical Fruit, BBQ, Spiced Desserts, Chocolate
desc_en_short: A truly exceptional rum, Appleton White Jamaica Rum was awarded the Greenall’s Trophy for the Best White Spirit Overall in the 1998 International Wine and Spirits Competition.

name: Appleton Estate  Signature Blend Jamaica Rum (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Appleton Estate Signature Blend is a full-bodied, medium-sweet rum. It’s a delicious blend of 15 aged golden rums with a warm honey colour, a lush, fruity aroma, and a rich taste. It’s for everyone and every day, and it’s the perfect way to make ‘just another day’ feel special.

name: Mount Gay  Eclipse (700 ml)
food_matching: Tropical Fruit, BBQ, Spiced Desserts, Chocolate
desc_en_short:
The Rum that invented Rum. Since 1703, brilliant golden amber in color; floral and fruity notes of apricot
and banana, with hints of vanilla and a subtle
smokiness by the Kentucky oak barrels

name: Brugal  Blanco Supremo Rum (700 ml)
food_matching: Tropical Fruit, BBQ, Spiced Desserts, Chocolate
desc_en_short: What makes Blanco Supremo so special? It is the only rum that we filter three times. Of course, it goes through our time-honored distillation process, and it is cask aged in white American oak casks for 2-5 years, the same as Brugal Añejo. But it is the triple filtering that sets it apart by enhancing its smoothness and removing its color – if you like your rums clear, then Blanco Supremo is for you. It has the all the smoothness of great vodka, but all the character of great rum.

name: Brugal  Anejo (700 ml)
food_matching: Tropical Fruit, BBQ, Spiced Desserts, Chocolate
desc_en_short: Brugal Anejo is rich dark rum. Taste profile-buttery toffee and a little spice with pepper and vanilla. The palate is smooth and rich with buttery spice notes, dark sugar and a little oak.

name: Sailor Jerry  Rum (700 ml)
food_matching: Tropical Fruit, BBQ, Spiced Desserts, Chocolate
desc_en_short: Sailor Jerry spiced rum was developed after loads of historical research into maritime rums, the all-natural spices and flavours they choose give this rum a smooth taste characterized by top notes of vanilla and cinnamon, more than anything else, its the spicing that is responsible for the distinctive character, smoothness and versatility of this rum.

name: Mount Gay  Black Barrel (700 ml)
desc_en_short: The latest from Master Blender Allen Smith, Black Barrel is a small batch, handcrafted blend made of matured double pot distillates and aged column distillates. In a process called finishing, the blended rum is then matured for a second time in deeply charred Bourbon oak barrels. This unique process releases spicy aromas that are at once balanced, and bold.

name: Chalong Bay  Tropical Note Series Cinnamon (700 ml)
food_matching: Tropical Fruit, BBQ, Spiced Desserts, Chocolate
desc_en_short:
Handmade in small batches using an imported French copper still and 100% natural first-press sugarcane grown and pressed without additives or chemical fertilizers in partnership with local farmers. Vapour infused with handpicked 100% natural local cinnamon for that extra smooth tropical taste.

Tasting Notes

Nose : Fresh sugarcane and cinnamon wood bark. A hint of minerals, developing into gingerbread.

Mouth : Uncompromising cinnamon zing followed by bay tree, lime and almond.

Finale : Cinnamon bark blended with fresh sugarcane and warm spices.

name: Chalong Bay  Tropical Note Series Lemongrass (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
Handmade in small batches using an imported French copper still and 100% natural first-press sugarcane grown and pressed without additives or chemical fertilizers in partnership with local farmers. Vapour infused with handpicked 100% natural local lemongrass for that extra smooth tropical taste.

Tasting Notes

Nose : Honeysuckle and white flowers brushed with gorse bush.

Mouth : Chamomile and lime tree, soon overtaken with lemongrass and a hint of apricot.

Finale : Verbena, lychee and grapefruit.

name: Bacardi  Ocho 8 Years Rum (700 ml)
food_matching: Tropical Fruit, BBQ, Spiced Desserts, Chocolate
desc_en_short: Created in 1862, BACARDÍ OCHO remained the sole preserve of the Bacardí family for seven generations. Used only for the most special occasions, this golden sipping rum is one of the oldest private rum blends in the world.

name: Bacardi  Carta Oro (Gold Rum) (750 ml)
food_matching: Tropical Fruit, BBQ, Spiced Desserts, Chocolate
desc_en_short:
BACARDÍ Carta Oro is hand blended by Maestros de Ron BACARDÍ using the original rum-making process established by Don Facundo Bacardi in 1862.

Its rums are aged between 1 and 3 years in oak barrels, then shaped through a secret blend of charcoals, to craft its remarkably smooth character.

This gold rum is designed to bring depth and character to classic rum cocktails, whilst still being smooth in flavor.

name: Shack Rum  Orange (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Our Shack Orange is a flavour that will feel deeply familiar. Reminiscent of quality desserts and fine pastries. A simple but exceptionally well balanced orange zest, lemon zest and vanilla maceration, that leaves ample room for the alpha rums in the basic blend. Very subtle.

name: Ron Matusalem  Gran Reserva 15 Year Rum (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Brilliant copper hue. A soft nose of toffee and butter. A satiny entry leads to a round, fruity-yet-dry, medium-bodied palate with praline and brown spice notes. Finishes with smooth spicy oak flavors. A finely balanced, very silky, aged rum. 40% Alc./Vol.

name: Kraken  Black Spiced Rum (700 ml)
desc_en_short: An excellent spiced rum, with utterly brilliant packaging! This was launched in the UK in early 2010, and it has an extraordinarily rich, spicy flavour. Named for the legendary sea monster, Kraken is a blend of Caribbean rums that should certainly suit any fans of rich, navy-style rum.

name: Angostura  Reserva Caribbean Rum Aged Three Years (700 ml)
food_matching: Tropical Fruit, BBQ, Spiced Desserts, Chocolate
desc_en_short:
For up to three enriching years, our white rum remains in its barrel until it is ready to be enjoyed. It is then charcoal filtered to remove any colour generated by the ageing process.

Angostura® Reserva is supple and luxurious. It possesses a dry taste with a rich and warm flavour of vanilla and a finish that is incredibly smooth. This warm, colourful, creamy, gentle rum, is perfect for mixing with seasonal fruits to create light cocktails.

name: Angostura  1919 Caribbean Rum Deluxe Aged Blend (700 ml)
food_matching: Tropical Fruit, BBQ, Spiced Desserts, Chocolate
desc_en_short:
Angostura® 1919 is a specially blended multiple award winning rum, which celebrates a very particular date in the development of the rum industry in Trinidad & Tobago, as well as the Caribbean.

After a fire in 1932, which destroyed the Government Rum Bond, the master blender of Fernandes Distillers, J.B. Fernandes, bought the charred casks, only to discover they had been filled in the year 1919.

name: Saint James  Imperial "Rhum Agricole" White (700 ml)
food_matching: Tropical Fruit, BBQ, Spiced Desserts, Chocolate
desc_en_short: Saint James Impérial is a very fresh and tangy white rhum agricole from Martinique, perfect in a Planters Punch on a hot summer's day...

name: Black Tears  Spiced Cuban Rum (700 ml)
Sod Chaeng  Rum (750 ml)
food_matching: Tropical Fruit, BBQ, Spiced Desserts, Chocolate
desc_en_short:
Rum (pure sugarcane white rum) Natural fine spirit 100% distilled from Ubon Ratchathani sugarcane. Smooth and light. The perfect premium white rum for creating classic cocktails or any specialties. enjoy our pure sugarcane flavor.

Tasting Notes

Nose : Aromatic Sugarcane

The Palate : Smooth, light and clean sugarcane flavor

The Finish : Crisp finishes

name: Dead Man's Finger  Hazelnut Rum (700 ml)
desc_en_short: We don’t do ordinary around here. That probably explains why we took our original Spiced Rum and created a hazelnut flavour. With aromas of toasted hazelnuts followed by a hint of chocolate and a suggestion of vanilla. Amazing with lemonade and orange, and doubly amazing as an alternative Old Fashioned. What kind of insanity is this? The delicious kind.

name: Nusa Cana  Spiced Rum (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Nusa Caña Spiced Island rum is a fruit-forward, dry, spiced rum, perfect in long drinks, cocktails, punches and parties, and the only rum inspired by the ‘Spice Islands’ of Indonesia

name: Nasan  Handcraft Rum  (700 ml)
food_matching: Tropical Fruit, BBQ, Spiced Desserts, Chocolate
desc_en_short: PIONEERING A NEW STYLE OF THAILAND SPIRIT, NASAN HANDCRAFT RUM WAS LAUNCHED IN 2009 WITH A DREAM TO CREATE SIPPING QUALITY THAILAND COCONUT PALM SUGAR SPIRIT. AS THAILAND’S SPIRIT DISTILLERY, WE ARE DEVELOPING THIS STYLE OF LOCAL THAI SPIRIT WITH A FARM-TO-BOTTLE PHILOSOPHY, USING COCONUT FLOWER WATER THAT HAS GROWN 100% ON OUR FARM, AND OUR PARTNERSHIP FARM. THE SUB-TROPICAL CLIMATE AND LOCAL PURE COCONUT FLOWER WATER (COCONUT PALM SUGAR) COMBINE EACH HARVEST TO CREATE SOMETHING UNIQUE.

name: Sober Spirits  Rum Non-Alcoholic Beverage (500 ml)
desc_en_short:
Crafted from an authentic French rum, the aroma of Sober Spirits R 0.0% - Rum alternative is typical of old rum, slightly woody with notes of caramelized dried fruits and a hint of vanilla.

For all your cocktails, our Rum Alternative is to be used in the same way and with the same dosage as an alcoholic rum (4 to 5cl per cocktail).

Although some love it neat, it is a mixology product, and its full potential is revealed in cocktails.

Awarded the World's Best Non-alcoholic Rum for the last 3 years at the two most prestigious wine & spirits competitions, in San Francisco and London.

desc_en_short: This “Southern Beauty” is a beauty indeed. I really enjoy this sake. It’s elegant but with body. I paired it recently with dashi soaked Edamame and it was great! A softer acidity, but still enough structure to balance out the savory dashi. delicious.

name: Dassai  Junmai Daiginjou Migaki Sanwari Kyubu 39 (300 ml)
desc_en_short: The top notes are much similar to Dassai Junmai Ginjou 45% but as it strikes the tounge and the palate, layered of fragrances open up.  Soft, sweet scents of Cotton Candy, hints of Banana, Japanese pears.  The mid palate gives a crisp, clean, dry taste. Very smooth, clear and refined sake. Excellent harmony of flavor and scent.  Short, clean finish.  Excellent overall well balance.

name: Dassai  Junmai Daiginjou Migaki Sanwari Kyubu 39 (720 ml)
desc_en_short: The top notes are much similar to Dassai Junmai Ginjou 45% but as it strikes the tounge and the palate, layered of fragrances open up.  Soft, sweet scents of Cotton Candy, hints of Banana, Japanese pears.  The mid palate gives a crisp, clean, dry taste. Very smooth, clear and refined sake. Excellent harmony of flavor and scent.  Short, clean finish.  Excellent overall well balance.

name: Dassai  Junmai Daiginjou Migaki Niwari Sanbu 23 (720 ml)
desc_en_short: One of the top ranking sake in Japan. The fruity bouquet offers apple, peach and nashi pear.  It's both vivid and sensuous. The initial impression is that of the clean flavor with an aftertaste that combines the sweetness of fruit with a soft mellowness.Dassai "Ni-wari San-bun" junmai daiginjo is the sake that defines Dassai. It is made with rice that has been milled so that only 23% of the original size of the grains remains, this is the highest degree of milling of any sake in the world. Going to this extreme allows the brewers to create a sake like no other, a sake that is the pinnacle of refined elegance, subtlety, and delicate flavors and aromas.

name: Bijofu  Junmai Ginjo Junrei TAMA Label (720 ml)
desc_en_short: The nose of this sake is quite sweet and fruity. The flavor is dry and clear for a start. Soft and fruity flavor. The crisp, clear sensation is the finishing touch of this excellent Junmai Ginjo Sake. One of the hard to find sake in Japan.

name: Bijofu  Tokubetsu Honjozo (720 ml)
desc_en_short: This sake's concept is suitable for warm sake.　It is not too sweet and very clear to finish. this Tanrei is holding strong and wid, this product matches well with food, serving temparative at 40-50 degree will make you feel its essence and harmony.

name: Masumi  Junmai Okuden Kanzukuri (720 ml)
desc_en_short: Masumi's ideal Junmai. Mellow and mild-mannered in all aspects, with subtle, organic flavors and a hint of rice sweetness. It is aimed to keep a hint of the original rice flavors, and the soft water used in the Suwa kura was perfect for this. Suitable for Japanese comfort food like grilled fish, yakitori, teriyaki, sukiyaki, nabe hotpots.

name: Masumi  Karakuchi Gold (1.8 L)
desc_en_short: Gold's clean, light taste and mild aroma have made it a local favorite. Techniques perfected for brewing our super-premium Daiginjo sake add refinement to our standard sake. Suitable for Japanese comfort food like grilled fish, yakitori, teriyaki, sukiyaki, nabe hotpots.

name: Kozaemon  Junmai Ginjo Shinano Miyamanishiki (720 ml)
desc_en_short: Kozaemon Miyamanishiki is semi-dry, full-bodied, floral and fruity with hints of citrus, tangerine and honeydew melon. Long complex finish. It is suitable with sushi, sashimi, grilled fish dishes, shabu shabu, lobster, crab and other seafood, and salads. It can be enjoyed as an aperitif and should be served chilled, 10 ° - 14 ° C.

name: BORN  Ginsen (720 ml)
desc_en_short: Born Ginsen” won the first prize, champion Sake. It’s a special junmaishu brewed from Yamada Nishiki rice of Hyogo Pref. polished to 50%, aged for years in the unpasteurized state under 0 degree. This is a dry sake with well balance of taste and a refreshing fruity graipfruits flavor.

name: Kotsuzumi  Rojoh-Hana-Ari Aoi (720 ml)
food_matching: Sushi, Sashimi, Tempura, Japanese Cuisine, Light Seafood
desc_en_short: A full-bodied sake wrapped in a delicate texture that drinks like poetry. Once in a lifetime sake for all fans of “rice wine.”

name: TANIGAWADAKE  Junmai-Daiginjo (720 ml)
food_matching: Sushi, Sashimi, Tempura, Japanese Cuisine, Light Seafood
desc_en_short: Making the most of feature of Miyama-Nishiki rice and natural water from the lacal mountain. It is soft, tender and bright aroma dry and crispy taste.

name: BORN  Chogin (720 ml)
desc_en_short: As malted rice, they have used Yamada nishiki; it is famous as rice good for making sake because of its largeness, smallness of protein and high water absorbency. The rice-polish ratio of Born Chogin is 20%. Well-round,pretty full-bodied sake, with very rich and deep flavours, it is sweet of melon on the attack, but turned dry and slightly bitter on the finish.

name: BORN  Junmai-Daiginjo Non-filter Nama-Genshu (720 ml)
food_matching: Sushi, Sashimi, Tempura, Japanese Cuisine, Light Seafood
desc_en_short: It is unfiltered / Fresh unprocessed sake. Aged in a regulated-10 degrees Celcius environment, this sake conjures a rich aroma and fresh full-bodied flavor as well as the distinctive taste of Nakadori Junmai Daiginjo fresh unprocessed sake. This is the most popular sake in Born series. Hit among Thai people

You can enjoy it in many way, on the rocks, room temprature or lightly warm. U.S. National Sake Appraisal Gold 2013-15, Grand prix of junmai 2015

name: 1800 Tequila  Anejo (750 ml)

name: Patron  Silver Tequila (750 ml)
food_matching: Mexican Cuisine, Ceviche, Grilled Fish, Citrus
desc_en_short: Patron Silver tequila is the perfect ultra-premium white spirit. Using only the finest 100 percent Weber blue agave, it is handmade in small batches to be smooth, soft and easily mixable.

name: Patron  Reposado Tequila (750 ml)
desc_en_short:
Patron Reposado is a nice switch for current tequila drinkers who want a bit more complexity and smoothness of taste.

Awards :

  • Master Super Premium Reposado - 2020 : The Tequila & Mezcal Masters (The Spirits Business)

name: Alipus  San Baltazar Mezcal (750ml)
desc_en_short: San Baltazar is made from shade grown agave at 1,622m that is baked in underground ovens. Ground with a Chilean tahona, the juice and pulp are fermented for 6 days. Sweet and fruity, try with other Alipús in a tasting flight to experience the effect terroir, or pair with Sangrita.

name: Alipus  San Luis Mezcal (750ml)
desc_en_short: The Alipús range celebrates the small producers of Oaxaca – this one is made by Don Baltazar Cruz Gómez. Made from espadín agave – a variety commonly used in mezcal production – grown at 950m in the sandy soil outside San Luis, this unique mezcal is spicy, round and soft.

name: Alipus  San Juan Mezcal (750ml)
desc_en_short: Alipus is a line of artisanal mezcal produced by a number of small distilleries in the state of Oaxaca. This mezcal is made entirely from espadin agave grown in the iron rich soil of the river town of San Juan. It is a smoky, vegetal and sweet mezcal with hints of crispy smoky bacon and tar coasted char grilled broccoli.

name: Montezuma  Blue Tequila (750 ml)
desc_en_short: Montezuma Blue Tequila is produced in Mexico, and made with tequila and liqueur. Great for making margaritas, mixed drinks, or shooters. It's distinctive packaging pays tribute to it's Mexican heritage by featuring an Aztec calendar.

name: Casco Viejo  "Reposado" (100% Agave)
flavor_tags: Vanilla, Caramel, Citrus, Herbal, Agave, Oak
food_matching: Mexican Cuisine, Ceviche, Grilled Fish, Citrus
desc_en_short: Casco Viejo Reposado is a smooth, approachable 100% Blue Weber agave tequila aged in oak barrels — combining fresh agave and citrus with the added warmth and vanilla softness that oak resting brings, ideal for sipping or in cocktails.

name: Jose Cuervo  Tradicional Silver (700 ml)
food_matching: Mexican Cuisine, Ceviche, Grilled Fish, Citrus
desc_en_short:
Jose Cuervo Tradicional Tequila Silver is made from 100% Weber Blue Agave produced in small batches with estate grown agave which are slow-cooked and double distilled in small artisanal stills. It is un-aged, clear and crisp. Jose Cuervo Especial Tequila Silver is made from 100% blue agave. The bottling processes is such that it conserves the flavour and finish at freezing temperatures. Perfect for Margaritas!

Awards :

Silver Premium Blanco - 2015 : The Tequila & Mezcal Masters (The Spirits Business)

name: Kah  Tequila Anejo (750 ml)
desc_en_short: The tequila inside is as unique as the bottles themselves, aged for 2 years in white American oak casks which bring out the aromas of coffee, chocolate and tobacco. A rare experience to be savoured and enjoyed neat in a large cognac glass .

name: Se Busca  Mezcal Joven (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Cooked agave and mesquite on the nose, this young mezcal opens with a palate of nuts, fruit and green vegetables, landing in a sweet, weighted finish with a mellow spicy kick.

name: Se Busca  Mezcal Reposado (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
Sweeter notes are found in this aged mezcal. Coconut, sweet almond and hazelnut can be uncovered in this complex spirit that expertly intertwines with notes of oak, cereal and mesquite delivering a rebellious bouquet.

Awards :

  • Gold Medal: Mezcal - Reposado - 2019 The Tequila & Mezcal Masters (The Spirits Business)

name: Cenote  Tequila Reposado (700 ml)
food_matching: Mexican Cuisine, Ceviche, Grilled Fish, Citrus
desc_en_short: Golden straw in color with a balance of vanilla and wood on the nose, Cenote™Reposado is aged three months in American Oak Barrels, delivering a round, harmonious palate of vanilla, wood, spice, and green vegetable.

name: Espolon  Reposado (750 ml)
desc_en_short:
Our tequila Reposado starts off life as Blanco. It’s then rested in lightly charred, new American oak barrels to create a more complex and well-rounded character uniquely Espolòn. This one begs to be shared in cocktails that deserve even greater tequila character.

Awards :

  • Gold Medal: 2011 San Francisco World Spirits Awards
  • Finalist: 2014 Ultimate Spirits Challenge
  • Silver: 2016 San Francisco World Spirits Awards
  • Bronze: 2016 International Wine & Spirits Competition
  • Silver Outstanding Medal: 2013 International Wine & Spirits Competition

name: Divino  with Captive Pear (750 ml)

name: Rooster Rojo  Tequila Blanco (700 ml)
desc_en_short: A classic traditional tequila, initially sweet but swiftly followed by a subtle yet distinct peppery spice. 100% agave.

name: Rooster Rojo  Anejo Smoked Pineapple (700 ml)
food_matching: Mexican Cuisine, Ceviche, Grilled Fish, Citrus

name: Mex  Strawberry Cream with Tequila (700 ml)
food_matching: Mexican Cuisine, Ceviche, Grilled Fish, Citrus
desc_en_short: MEX Strawberry Cream Liqueur with Tequila. The boldest strawberry cream liqueur with tequila The naughty flavour of tequila and the softness of cream with strawberries As a shot, with ice, smoothie, cocktail, iced drink…

name: Dead Man's Fingers  Tequila Reposado
food_matching: Mexican Cuisine, Ceviche, Grilled Fish, Citrus
desc_en_short: Dead Man's Fingers do things differently. Applying all their know how they have have created a stunning blue agave Reposado Tequila to once again take the market by Cornish storm! Tequila Reposado is aged in Bourbon barrels for a smooth taste and a flavour of vanilla and honey.

name: Tarantula Azul  Tequila (750 ml)
desc_en_short: USA - 100% Agave tequila blended with a natural citrus liqueur. Round, medium body and floral, citrusy bouqet. Mild entry that builds to reveal crisp spice and tart citrus flavors. Enjoy over ice with a splash of lime.

name: 818 Tequila  Reposado (750 ml)
desc_en_short:
TASTE

Ripe roasted agave flavor with notes of caramel and vanilla

BODY & COLOR

Straw color with golden hues and medium body

AROMA

Vanilla, meringue, honey, and fruit accents

FINISH

Smooth caramel finish with notes of sweet cooked agave and pecan pie

WHAT MAKES IT SPECIAL

Aged in French and American oak barrels for a minimum of 3 months

name: Stolichnaya  Chocolate Razberi (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Stolichnaya Chocolate Razberi features sweet, rich milk chocolate and clean vodka characters in balance with ripe tart fleshy raspberry, creating a creamy-silky texture on the palate.

name: Valt  Single Malt Vodka (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Valt is a lovely Scottish vodka, made using a quintuple micro-distillation technique, which is unique to Valt. It is distilled from malted barley, and it is sweet and very creamy.

name: Beluga  Noble Russian Vodka (700 ml)
food_matching: Caviar, Smoked Fish, Raw Oysters, Neutral Pairings
desc_en_short: A classic Russian vodka, clean and crisp with a little bit of grain flavour. Perfect for drinking straight, as is the Russian way, Beluga has become a huge word of mouth success story since first pitching up on these shores in 2009. Beluga is made, unusually, with barley malt spirit, and is very lightly flavoured with honey and extracts of oat and milk thistle.

name: Beluga  Gols Line Vodka (700 ml)
desc_en_short: A super premium vodka from Beluga. Gold Line is an impressively crisp and pure spirit packaged in an extravagant leather box, complete with small hammer and brush to aid in the clean removal of the wax that seals the bottle.

name: Kai  Vodka (750 ml)
desc_en_short: Distinctive natural lychee aroma with notes of sweet spice, rose and honey. Shake with ice and strain into a martini glass for the original Lychee Martini.

name: Absolut  Raspberri Vodka (1 L)
food_matching: Caviar, Smoked Fish, Raw Oysters, Neutral Pairings
desc_en_short: Absolut Raspberri is made exclusively from natural ingredients, and unlike some other flavored vodkas, it doesn’t contain any added sugar. It’s rich and intense with the fresh and fruity character of ripened raspberries.

name: Absolut  Elyx (750 ml)
food_matching: Caviar, Smoked Fish, Raw Oysters, Neutral Pairings
desc_en_short: Absolut Elyx is a true luxury vodka, built on the principles of quality, integrity and craftsmanship, manually distilled in a copper still. The result is an award winning vodka with a rich and smooth mouth feel. We call it liquid silk. Perfect for your martinis or even on the rocks.

name: Russian Standard  Vodka (700 ml)
food_matching: Caviar, Smoked Fish, Raw Oysters, Neutral Pairings
desc_en_short: In the country where vodka is the drink of choice, Russian Standard is the gold standard. Produced according to the original recipe created by Dmitri Mendeleev for Tsar Alexander III and patented in 1894, it is made from hard winter wheat and glacial water. The Russian Standard holds purity and balance as its ultimate goal. The unique bottle shape is modeled after the Ivan the Great bell tower in the heart of Moscow. Russian Standard Original is the perfect bottle for someone looking for the ultimate vodka experience.

name: Bols  Vodka (1 L)
food_matching: Caviar, Smoked Fish, Raw Oysters, Neutral Pairings
desc_en_short: Bols Vodka is super natural and is filtered through charcoal filters, resulting in an extraordinary high level of purity. This extraordinary level of purity makes Bols Vodka perfect for mixing and the preparation of cocktails.

name: Svedka  Cherry Vodka (750 ml)
food_matching: Caviar, Smoked Fish, Raw Oysters, Neutral Pairings

name: Stolichnaya  Cucumber (700 ml)
food_matching: Caviar, Smoked Fish, Raw Oysters, Neutral Pairings
desc_en_short: Stolichnaya Cucumber is clean and crisp on the palate, bursting with savory cucumber flavor and smooth finish. A pure, clean and natural tasting cucumber vodka, it is the first new Stoli® flavor introduced since 2012.

name: Stolichnaya  Elit Night Edition (1.75 L)
food_matching: Caviar, Smoked Fish, Raw Oysters, Neutral Pairings
desc_en_short: Stolichnaya Elit presents a clear color. Extremely neutral on the nose with weak notes of bread. Flexible and satiny with a very long and arid medium body, dried citrus, meringue, anise, talc and an accentuated end of powdered sugar. Surprisingly clean, smooth, vivid and elegant.

name: Absolut  Vodka (4.5 L)
food_matching: Caviar, Smoked Fish, Raw Oysters, Neutral Pairings
desc_en_short: Absolut Vodka is a Swedish vodka made exclusively from natural ingredients, and unlike some other vodkas, it doesn’t contain any added sugar. In fact Absolut is as clean as vodka can be. Still, it has a certain taste: Rich, full-bodied and complex, yet smooth and mellow with a distinct character of grain, followed by a hint of dried fruit.

name: Glenfiddich  15 Years Old (700 ml) (With Box)
desc_en_short: Glenfiddich 15 is innovatively matured in three types of oak casks: sherry, bourbon and new oak, before being married in our unique, handcrafted Oregon pine Solera Vat. Year on year, this Solera vat is never emptied but is always kept at least half full creating a deliciously harmonious and intense whisky which gets more complex and intriguing every year.

name: Famous Grouse  Finest (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short: Scotland’s favourite whisky is a blend crafted from the finest malt whiskies, such as The Macallan and Highland Park, married with exceptional grain whiskies, for the smoothest possible taste. It is characterised by a full, golden, bright appearance and its balance of flavours, with a hint of citrus fruit, provide the distinctively long and clean finish.

name: Chivas Regal  18 Years (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
Founded in 1801 in Aberdeen, Scotland, Chivas Regal has become one of the most globally recognized names in Scotch whisky, known for its refined blending mastery and signature smooth character.

The 18-Year-Old expression is a luxurious blend crafted from over 20 rare single malt and grain whiskies, each aged for a minimum of 18 years. It’s a bottle designed to celebrate depth, complexity, and richness in every sip.

name: Chivas Regal  12 years (4.5 L)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short: Chivas is a blend of many different malt and grain Scotch whiskies, matured for at least 12 years. This rich, smooth blend balances style with substance and tradition with a modern twist.

name: Ballantine's  12 Years (700 ml)
desc_en_short: ballantine’s 12 year old is a rich, smooth and complex whisky, blended from specially selected single malt and grain whiskies.

name: Dewar's  18 Years Old Blended Scotch Whisky (750 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts

name: Johnnie Walker  Red Label (700 ml)
desc_en_short: The character of the whisky is defined by intense, spicy, zingy, edgy flavours. RED LABEL bursts onto the palate with the freshness of spray from a crashing wave, followed by the zing of aromatic spices and finally a long, lingering, smoky finish. The sensation in the mouth is complex – ‘sweet chilli’ is a good description of this taste and the tingling sensation on the tongue.

name: Johnnie Walker  Swing (750 ml)
desc_en_short: Swing is served on the rocks, neat or diluted with water. Its nose is complex and sophisticated with almost perfumed sweetness. Unquestionably soft and accessible, you are sure to notice the fanciful vanilla and sherry-cask wood notes wafting through. Its palate is smooth and sweet. But its light freshness cloaks a deeper fruitiness, with some smoke and restrained flavors lingering beyond. Finally, a lengthy and rich finish, reverberating with sweetness, completes the movement.

name: Johnnie Walker  Blue Label (750 ml)
desc_en_short:
Johnnie Walker Blue Label is the crown jewel of the Johnnie Walker portfolio—a whisky created from some of the rarest and most exceptional casks in their reserves. Only 1 in 10,000 casks is deemed worthy of this prestigious label.

This luxurious expression often includes whiskies from silent distilleries—those no longer in operation—capturing a taste of history and honoring the legacy of Scotland’s blending tradition.

Awards :

Master Blended – No Age Statement - 2020 : The Scotch Whisky Masters (The Spirits Business)

Master Blended: Super Premium - 2014 : The Scotch Whisky Masters (The Spirits Business)

Double Gold Blended Scotch - 2013 : San Francisco World Spirits Competition

name: Cragganmore  12 Years (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
A sherried 12 year old single malt from Diageo's Classic Malts range, this bottling from the Cragganmore distillery represents Speyside and proffers a rich, slightly floral whisky with barley notes.

Awards :

3rd Place Best Single Malt Scotch 12 Years - 2015 : International Whisky Competition

name: Glenkinchie  12 Years (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
The flagship expression from the Glenkinchie distillery, one of the stalwarts of the Lowlands. A fantastic introduction to the region, Glenkinchie 12 Year Old shows off the characteristic lightness and grassy elements that Lowland whiskies are known for, with nods to cooked fruit and Sauternes wine along the way. Brilliant single malt to enjoy as an aperitif on a warm evening.

Awards :

Winner - Best Lowland Single Malt - 2016 a; World Whiskies Awards

name: Glenmorangie  The Original - 10 Years (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
It is here, maturing for ten long years in a range of ex-bourbon casks such as our famous slow-grown and air-dried 'designer casks' from Missouri, that our raw spirit develops a perfect balance between sweetness and complexity. Resulting in a mature spirit that is soft, mellow and creamy. Perfect for enjoying at any time.

Awards :

Master Highlands & Islands up to 12yo - 2013 : The Scotch Whisky Masters (The Spirits Business)

Gold Distillers' Single Malts 12 years and under - 2020 : International Spirits Challenge

Gold Scotch Single Malt - Highland - 2017 : International Wine & Spirit Competition

name: Glenmorangie  The Quinta Ruban (Port Wood) - 14 Years (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
A voluptuously silky spirit, Glenmorangie Quinta Ruban is aged first in bourbon casks for smooth, fruity notes. We then finish this single malt whisky in ruby port casks to create velvety depth.

Our Quinta Ruban port cask finish brings chocolate boldness to Glenmorangie's renowned smooth style. Non chill-filtered for additional aroma and mouthfeel, it is savoured all over the world.

name: Glenmorangie  18 Years Old (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
The 18 Years Old is a single malt Scotch whisky of serious distinction. Once it has spent fifteen years maturing in American white oak casks approximately 30% is transferred into Spanish Oloroso casks to spend a further three years maturing.

Awards :

Winner - Best Highland Single Malt - 2015 : World Whiskies Awards

name: Glenfarclas  Heritage Speyside Single Malt Scotch Whisky (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Natural color. Sweet and fruity nose. Perfectly balanced with a harmonious assembly sherry, candied fruit, vanilla and nuts. Very elegant and supple.

name: Highland Park  12 Years Old (700 ml)
desc_en_short: The expression that started it all for Highland Park. First introduced in 1979, the 12 year old is at the very heart of our core range and demonstrates rich, well balanced malty tones, with the subtle floral smoke which makes Highland Park such a distinctive single malt whisky.

name: Cutty Sark  Blended Scotch Whisky (700 ml)
desc_en_short: The distinctive yellow label has graced the World's best bars and clubs for nearly 80 years. The first light coloured blended whisky was launched at the height of cocktail culture. Taste profile- smooth, vibrant, sweet and uplifting whisky with citrus, vanilla ice cream and caramel tones.

name: Glen Scotia  Double Cask Single Malt Scotch Whisky (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short: Opens with more fudge with a little dusting of powdered sugar. Powerful, oily and a touch herbaceous with some German brandy character. Sherried notes come through more on the finish.

name: Suntory  Hakushu Distillers Reserve Single Malt Whisky (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short: From the Hakushu distillery in the foothills of Mount Kaikomagatake comes their Distiller's Reserve single malt whisky, a no-age-statement expression, that captures the smoky, herbaceous characteristics of their whiskies. Both lightly-peated and heavily-peated malts were used for this complex and deeply enjoyable whisky.

name: Douglas Laing's  Timorous Beastie (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Douglas Laing's Timorous Beastie, immortalised in Robert Burns' famous Scots poem "To a Mouse", was a timid, little field mouse. Echoing our national bard's wit, ours is most certainly not for the fainthearted! This non coloured, non-chill-filtered Small Batch bottling is a marriage of appropriately aged and selected Highland Malts - including, amongst others, those distilled at Glen Garioch, Dalmore and Glengoyne distilleries. Incredibly sweet on the nose, with light floral and spicy honey tones. The palate is spicy, and sugary, carrying notes of raisin fudge, with a sweet yet subtle finish.

name: Johnnie Walker  Red Label (3 L)
desc_en_short: The character of the whisky is defined by intense, spicy, zingy, edgy flavours. RED LABEL bursts onto the palate with the freshness of spray from a crashing wave, followed by the zing of aromatic spices and finally a long, lingering, smoky finish. The sensation in the mouth is complex – ‘sweet chilli’ is a good description of this taste and the tingling sensation on the tongue.

name: Johnnie Walker  Black Label (3 L)
desc_en_short: A true icon, recognised as the benchmark for all other deluxe blends. Created using only whiskies aged for a minimum of 12 years from the four corners of Scotland, Johnnie Walker Black Label has an unmistakably smooth, deep, complex character. An impressive whisky to share on any occasion.

name: Rebel Yell  Kentucky Straight Bourbon (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Honey and butter, followed by a hint of plum and raisins for a long, warm finish with an interesting touch of spiciness.

name: Rebel Yell  Straight Rye Whiskey (700 ml)
desc_en_short: It may be a straight rye, but there’s nothing ordinary about it. This full-bodied whiskey’s got backbone with a bold rye flavor and solid mix of sweet and spice. ​

name: Teeling  Single Grain Irish Whiskey (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
As a result of its unique maturation process, Teeling Single Grain Irish Whiskey has a bright golden color, and an aroma of butterscotch, sweet cherries and cake frosting. The palate is packed with deeper flavors, such as oak, chocolate fudge, cinnamon and marshmallow, and leads to a finish accented by raisins, orange peel and coconut.

Awards :

Winner - Best Irish Grain - 2019 : World Whiskies Awards

name: Bruichladdich  The Classic Laddie Unpeated Islay Single Malt (700 ml)
desc_en_short: This single malt scotch whisky has been crafted by master distiller jim mcewan from individually selected casks to showcase the classic, floral and elegant bruichladdich house style. Unpeated, it is our signature bottling and the definitive bruichladdich. Made from 100% scottish barley, trickle distilled, then matured for its entire life by the shores of lochindaal in premium american oak, it is a testament to the quality of our ingredients. this is authenticity. we believe barley matters.

name: The Macallan  12 Year Old Double Cask (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short: An exciting new age statement expression from Macallan that's matured in a combination of American and European Sherry oak for a minimum of 12 years. Here, the proportion of American oak ex-Sherry casks is higher than in the 12 Year Old Sherry Oak, but no ex-bourbon casks are used as they are in the 12 Year Old Fine Oak release.

name: Dewar's  White Label Blended Scotch Whisky (1 L)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short: Dewar's White Label whisky was created in 1899 by our first Master Blender, A J Cameron. With a blend of up to 40 single malt and single grain whiskies in every bottle, getting a result that was well-rounded and smooth enough to enjoy neat was no easy feat. Crafted with the same care today as it was in the beginning, we're confident that if the great man himself walked into the blending room tomorrow, he'd recognise his signature Scotch Whisky.

name: Chivas Regal  Mizunara (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
A special Scotch whisky for the Japanese palate with a delicate spiciness and sweetness. Master blender Colin Scott has created a special blend infused with his respect for Japanese whisky blending techniques and matured part of the blend in barrels made from Mizunara, a rare and unique oak grown in Japan.

Awards :

Gold Outstanding Scotch Whisky - Blended - 2018 : International Wine & Spirit Competition

Gold Blended: Ultra Premium - 2018 : The Scotch Whisky Masters (The Spirits Business)

name: Royal Salute  21 years (700 ml) (Blue Wade Decanter)
desc_en_short: In 1953,Chivas Brothers paid tribute to Her Majesty Queen Elizabeth II by creating a limited edition of a very special blended whisky. Only 2,500 cases were produced for worldwide distribution. The first Flagons, adorned with the royal crest, were sealed on the day of her coronation. The name chosen was considered a fitting tribute to the new monarch. It was called Royal Salute, after the 21-gun salute - the ultimate mark of respect, reserved for tributes to dignitaries and nations alike. Appropriately, each of the whiskies in the blend was at least 21 years old and thus, Royal Salute 21 Year Old was born.

name: Suntory  Yamazaki Distillers Reserve Single Malt Whisky (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Succulent with soft fruit. Peach, pineapple, grapefruit,clove, candied orange, vanilla, Mizunara (Japanese oak) on nose. Coconut, cranberry, butter on palate. The finish is sweet ginger, cinnamon, long finish

name: Suntory  Yamazaki 18 years old Single Malt Whisky (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
Characteristic sweetness of dried fruits and aromatic chocolate that comes from sherry casks inter-mingled with a profoundly mature flavour that comes from aging the spirits over a long time in japanese oak casks.

Awards :

Gold Japanese Single Malt 13 to 20 Years - 2016 : World Whiskies Awards

Winner Best Japanese Single Malt - 2015 : World Whiskies Awards

Gold Japanese Single Malt 13 to 20 Years - 2014 : World Whiskies Awards

name: Suntory  Hibiki 21 Years Old Whisky (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
Hibiki 21 Years Old is a meticulously blended combination of carefull selected ripe grain malts and malt whisky aged for a lengthy period of at least 21 years. It is distinguished by a mature aroma, incredibly fruity and reminiscent of sweet flowers, and a smooth, light flavor. This blend allows you to enjoy the strong body, mellow richness and profound, long finish only found in a whisky aged for 21 years.

Hibiki 21 was named World's Best Blended Whisky at the 2013 World Whiskies Awards and was awarded 96 points in Jim Murray's 2014 Whisky Bible.

name: Suntory  Hakushu 12 Years Old Whisky (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short:
Hakushu is a “green and fresh” whisky, praised by the most curious whisky connoisseurs and lovers of gastronomy. Its crisp and vibrant feel, unique in a single malt, enlivens and liberates your senses.

Awards :

Gold Japanese Single Malt 12 Years and Under - 2016 : World Whiskies Awards

1st Place Best World Whiskey - 2015 : International Whisky Competition

name: The Macallan  Rare Cask (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Macallan Rare Cask is comprised of 16 different sherry-cask styles, the majority of which are first fill. Rich and complex with notes of dark honey and dried fruit, this bridges the gap between The 1824 Series and The 1824 Collection.

name: The Glenlivet  Founder's Reserve (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
A Remarkable Past. A Flavor for the Present

Inspired by our legendary founder George Smith whose vision was to create the smoothest of all whiskies, The Glenlivet’s Founder’s Reserve embodies a new side of The Glenlivet’s classic style. Founder’s Reserve is an extremely well balanced whisky, full of sweet, creamy vanilla and caramel apple notes, along with zesty orange and hints of buttery biscuit on the finish.

First Fill American oak casks are instrumental in creating the flavors, because, like a coffee filter, the strength of the cask’s effect lessens with each use. These casks were first used to mature American Whiskies like Bourbon, which by law has to be aged in new oak casks, and used only once.

Founder’s Reserve is a scotch that elevates the everyday and is something to call your own for happy hour and any hour. Incredibly smooth and versatile it can be enjoyed neat, on the rocks or in a cocktail.

name: Smokehead  Islay Single Malt Scotch Whisky (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
Smokehead is a rich, seaweedy and intensely peaty Islay single malt whisky. The flavour is fresh, fruity and immense, with notes of sherry, iodine, toffee, smoke and sea salt all fighting for recognition. A really vigorous whisky not for the faint hearted ... savour and enjoy!

Smokehead is an Award winning Islay single malt. It has won the Scottish Field Whisky Challenge Gold and the Wine and Spirit Design Awards Gold, Best Dark Spirit Trophy and overall Trophy for Design of the Year.

name: Nikka  Miyagikyo Single Malt Whisky (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short: This is a single malt from the Miyagikyo distillery, Nikka's second distillery built in 1969. The founder Masataka Taketsuru chose this site in the mountains of Sendai to contrast with his first distillery, Yoichi, located in the coastal area. Using less peaty malt and distilled in a pot still heated by indirect steam, Miyagikyo single malt has an elegant fruitiness and a distinctive aroma with a strong Sherry cask influence.

name: Jameson  Black Barrel Whiskey (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short: AKA Small Batch - a super release from Jameson, with a high proportion of Irish pot still whiskey as well as small batch grain. The result is an increased body and level of richness when compared to the core expression. It's aged in double charred first fill bourbon casks (black barrels). Well worth a look...

name: Johnnie Walker  Aged 18 Years (750 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short: An indulgent blend crafted from Scotland’s finest smooth and complex 18 year-old whiskies, each hand-selected by Master Blender Jim Beveridge.

name: John Barr  Reserve Black Label Blended Scotch Whisky (1 L)
desc_en_short: John Barr Reserve Blend is characterized by rich aromas of chocolate, baked sweet apple, and freshly baked bread, followed by notes of ripe apricot, gingerbread, and hazelnuts on the palate, and a lingering maple finish.

name: Singleton  Of Dufftown 15 Year Old (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
The sweet and fruity notes in this fine malt from Dufftown, at the heart of Speyside, are the product of traditional, slow distilling, using pure water in a unique balance of European and American oak then gives The Singleton of Dufftown its smooth, richly satisfying taste. The honeycomb, sweet chestnut and sharp red berry fruit flavours of The Singleton of Dufftown 15 Year Old make it an ideal sipping malt.

A delicious 18 year old Speyside malt from the Dufftown distillery, the Singleton exudes oodles of creamy, malty flavour, and it's the oldest official Dufftown we've ever tried…

name: Chivas Regal  XV (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Aged for a minimum of 15 years and selectively finished in Grande Champagne Cognac casks, this unique whisky is luxuriously fruity and deliciously sweet. The subtle influence of the cognac makes it the ultimate way to elevate your night out.

name: Bushmills  Single Malt aged 10 years (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Bushmills Single Malt Whiskey 10 year old is triple distilled from 100% malted barley and matured for at least 10 years in bourbon season barrels which give it it’s honey, vanilla and milk chocolate aroma. It can be served neat, over ice or if you’re feeling a little more adventurous, try it frozen.

name: Bushmills  Single Malt aged 16 years (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
Bushmills Single Malt Whiskey 16 year old is aged for 16 years in a combination of Oloroso Sherry and Bourbon-seasoned casks, then matured for several months in port wine barrels. The unique maturation process gives this single malt its distinct notes of juicy fruits, nuts and spice, as well as a hint of ruby redness. It’s best enjoyed neat or over ice.

Awards :

Gold Outstanding Irish Whisky - Single Malt - 2014 : International Wine & Spirit Competition

name: Bushmills  Single Malt aged 21 years (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Bushmills Single Malt Whiskey 21 year old is aged for a minimum of 19 years in former Oloroso Sherry and Bourbon-seasoned casks, then transferred into Madeira casks for a further 2 years. The result is a whiskey awarded ‘Best Irish Single Malt 2013’. It has huge depth that interweaves dried fruit flavors with spicy, aromatic maltiness and subtle nutty raisin notes.

name: Famous Grouse  Naked Malt (700 ml)
desc_en_short: The Naked Grouse enriches the flavours of Scotland’s favourite whisky by maturing in sun dried sherry oak casks. The influence of our quality first-fill sherry casks develops a deep russet appearance and an aroma that melds black cherries, cocoa and oak. The taste experience is sublimely smooth with famous trade-mark dried fruits yielding to cinnamon sticks and nutmeg. The sweet finale is rich in dark chocolate with a spicy, orange finish.

name: Old Pulteney  18 Year (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Old Pulteney 18 Year Old Bottling Note. Released as part of a fleet of new expressions by Old Pulteney in mid 2018, this 18 year old single malt is drawn from a combination of bourbon and Spanish oak casks. Excellent stuff as ever from this Highland distillery.

name: AnCnoc  18 Year (700 ml)
desc_en_short: The anCnoc 18 Year Old has matured in Spanish oak ex-sherry casks and American oak ex-bourbon barrels and has been bottled in its most natural form, neither chill-filtered nor coloured. As a result this dram may develop a light haze with the addition of water or if kept at a cold temperature. This haze is a natural characteristic of whisky that is non chill-filtered.

name: Copper Dog  Whisky (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
Copper Dog is a Scotch whisky that sums up all that is good about Speyside. A combination of eight single malts, Copper Dog is deliciously fruity with a hint of honey and spice.

Awards :

name: Wolfburn  Northland Single Malt Whisky (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
The smooth and warming flavours present in Northland come from the unhurried way in which the spirit is made, and from the maturation, which takes place in American oak quarter casks. Matured and bottled on site, Northland represents the first chapter in the history of Wolfburn.

Award :

  • Gold Medal winner, IWSC 2016.

desc_en_short: Made at a mystery distillery and bottled by Edinburgh-based John Crabbie & Co, Yardhead is a single malt made for mixing. A sweet, young single malt it offers notes of shortbread biscuits, vanilla, toffee apples and citrus throughout the palate.

name: Kavalan  Distillery Select No.1 Single Malt Whisky (700 ml)
desc_en_short: A brand-new release from award-winning Taiwanese distillery Kavalan, celebrating the craftsmanship of Master Blender Ian Chang. Aged in refill casks, Distillery Select captures the fruity, tropical character that Kavalan has become known for, whilst also displaying a refined balance from its maturation in the tropical temperatures of Taiwan.

name: The Dalmore  15 Years Old (700 ml)
