Its long aging in barrels having previously contained Bourbon gives the Single Malt Glen Turner Heritage a woody flavor as well as subtle notes of spices, vanilla and tropical fruits. Its finish in old port barrels enriches the aromatic palette of this Single Malt with notes of wine and dried fruit.

name: Glen Turner  12 Year Single Malt Scotch Whisky (700 ml)

A long aging of 12 years in barrels having previously contained Bourbon, under the supervision of the Master Distiller, is necessary for the preparation of this Single Malt. It is characterized by its intense golden color, its deep and warm nose with fruity notes and a round and mellow bouquet.

name: Omar  Single Malt Sherry Type Whisky (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
The flavor of Single malt whisky (Sherry type) shows floral, a hint of sulfury at the first, following by ripen banana, biscuit, plum, jam, woody and dark chocolate falvors. It has heavy, full, and sweet tastes like the flavor of caramel on the toast. Dired fruit, citrus cake flavor can be found in the after taste. It give the typical sherry cask whisky flavor performance. A hint of sulfury flavor change to smoky flavor rich the body and complexity of this whisky.

name: Glen Moray  15 Years Old Single Malt Whisky (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
Set apart by its rich intensity, our 15 Year Old marries two very different single malts in one outstanding dram. After spending its whole life in American oak, one of these whiskies embodied Glen Moray's classic style. The other, aged entirely in Oloroso sherry casks from Jerez, in Spain, resounded with rich spice. Calling on our long tradition of marrying casks, we brought their contrasting styles together, to craft intensely complex layers. With tastes of dried fruits, dark chocolate and spice, amplified by age, this Scotch whisky is a perfect treat for single malt lovers eager to discover more.

Distilled in Ireland at the Glendalough Distillery, this whiskey has been aged in a single cask that previously held Calvados, a type of apple brandy from the Normandy region of France.

name: Nikka  Yoichi Single Malt Whisky (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short: Nikka Yoichi Single Malt is a bold, rich and coastal Japanese single malt made at the Yoichi distillery on the north island of Hokkaido in Japan. It is a full bodied and smooth whisky with notes of light smoke, apple, citrus, ginger and nutmeg. Nikka uses coal-fired stills to distil this single malt, a rare method which has now been lost in Scottish single malt whisky-making. It is ideal for fans of coastal whiskies and is best enjoyed neat.

desc_en_short:
Crafted from spirit matured in a combination of wonderfully sweet Oloroso sherry butts and ex-bourbon quarter casks it is a shade over seven years old.

This hand-selected cask pairing has done an astonishing job of producing a smooth and rounded single malt whisky – and to maximise the flavour we have bottled it at cask strength. Sweet, aromatic and sumptuous in character, it’s a thoroughly enjoyable dram.

name: The Quiet Man  Superior Blend (700 ml)
desc_en_short: This sweet blend has a surprising light, floral fragrance, and hints of toasted oak and honey. High in malt, it’s exceptionally smooth.

The Deacon  Blended Scotch Whisky (700 ml)
desc_en_short: The Deacon is a masterful blend of both smoky Speyside and peaty Islay malt whiskies, making for a complex, rich, and smoky dram. In the blend, the single malts from Islay have a characteristic peaty smoke flavour, while the single malts from the mainland have a bonfire-like smoke character. A nose of charred orange, sweet malty biscuits and woodsmoke gives way to juicy orange on the palate along with delicate spice, and tangy peat. The finish is both sweet and smoky, long and smooth.

name: Jameson  18 Years Irish Whiskey (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Jameson 18 Years was first introduced in 2002, and it is a whiskey blend that showcases the Master Blender's expertise in curating very old whiskeys. The blend consists of pot still and grain whiskeys that are aged for a minimum of 18 years and matured in American bourbon barrels and Spanish sherry butts. After that, they are further matured in first-fill bourbon barrels. This Jameson Irish Whiskey has a volume of 700ml and an alcohol percentage of 46%. It has a nose of aromatic oils with a hint of wood and spicy toffee. On the palate, it offers a delightful blend of mellow and smooth flavours, including toffee, spice, and vanilla, with subtle notes of wood, leather, and a gentle sherry nuttiness. The finish is long-lasting, carrying through wood, spice, and toffee until the very end.

name: The Glenlivet  12 years Old 200 Year Anniversary Edition (700 ml) (Limited Edition)
desc_en_short:
Celebrate 200 years of The Glenlivet’s legacy with our new special edition. A unique take on our classic 12 Year Old, this Glenlivet is 100% American Oak Matured and is presented at 43% ABV. Enjoy the perfect harmony of sweet and fruity notes with honeycomb and zesty orange engulfing your palate to culminate in a lasting vanilla finish. This whisky is a celebration of our journey forever forwards.

As we celebrate our exciting 200-year milestone, we invited artists to join us in breaking tradition to craft a commemorative Limited-Edition design of The Glenlivet. We partnered with an online crowdsourcing platform to source these independent artists from around the world. Across 3 weeks over 400 designs were submitted from artists in 42 different countries.

Our winner came from Bogota, Colombia showcasing a unique illustrative style with a design that mapped the 200 years of The Glenlivet. A truly limited edition; this is an important whisky to collect for any fan of The Glenlivet.

name: Old Virginia  Original Bourbon Whiskey (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
Contrary to popular opinion, Bourbon Whiskey does not have to be made in Kentucky. It can be produced in any state in the US, but the hard water found in Kentucky makes it an ideal location - the limestone filters out impurities such as iron.

Whiskey must be made with a recipe (named "mash bill") of at least 51% corn, with the rest being rye, wheat and barley. Almost all bourbons are first distilled in Column Still, and then undergo a second distillation in Copper Pot Still.

Bourbon Whiskey can only be aged in virgin oak barrels that have been charred beforehand. It must mature for at least two years.

Kentucky's warmer temperatures mean that evaporation rates are much higher, so that bourbon matures much faster than its Scottish equivalent - about twice as fast.

name: Johnnie Walker  Blue Label Ice Chalet (Limited Edition) (750 ml)
desc_en_short: Johnnie Walker Blue Label Ice Chalet is a rare, limited-edition release expertly crafted by Master Blender, Emma Walker, featuring whiskies from distilleries in Scotland at the highest elevations to deliver a velvety-smooth blend that evokes salted honey, cacao and soft malt characters.

name: Talisker 8 Year Old Special Releases 2024 (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short: This is a rugged, young Talisker bottled at cask strength by Diageo for the Special Releases 2024. Aged in casks for eight years, the barrel’s original layers of char were polished away by rocks and water, then lightly re-toasted. The result is a Talisker with hallmark notes of maritime peat, poached pears, and crunchy green apples, giving way to seaweed, and cracked black pepper.

name: Caol Ila 11 Year Old Special Releases 2024 (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short: This unpeated Cao Ila, forms part of Diageo’s Special Releases 2024. The lesser-seen style has benefitted from a short fermentation and cloudy worts, leaving us with a nutty and creamy character. Distillation in part-filled stills, resulted in a spirit with more copper contact and eventual notes of green orchard fruit.

name: Oban 10 Year Old Special Releases 2024 (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Part of the Special Releases 2024, this 10-year-old Oban was matured in refill casks, before being finished in charred American oak barrels, seasoned with oloroso sherry. There is a lovely floral character to this coastal malt, followed by salted chocolate, baked apples, spiced stewed fruit, and sweet cinnamon.

name: Roseisle 12 Year Old Special Releases 2024 (700 ml)
desc_en_short: The second official bottling of Roseisle was matured in first-fill ex-bourbon barrels and refill casks. Bottled for Diageo’s Special Releases 2024, this is a refined malt with a bright, creamy character, complemented by ripe orchard fruit, white chocolate, vanilla sponge cake, and a well-balanced spice on the finish.

name: Lagavulin 12 Year Old Special Releases 2024 (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short: Lagavulin’s rich peaty character has been tempered by the use of first-fill bourbon and refill casks. The result is a single malt with notes of pipe tobacco, smoked kippers and charred oak, softened by toffee, toasted coconut, freshly sliced vanilla pods and custard creams.

name: Compass Box  Crimson Cask (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
Process

Powerful, rich whiskies matured in American Oak sherry butts, precisely seasoned for a very particular wood interaction that creates a spiciness and generous intensity from the oloroso influence.

Flavour profile

Chocolate fudge cake undercut with clove and cardamom, with hints of plum jam and redcurrant jelly, then rich cherry, toffee and oak, finished with raisin, honey and brown sugar.

Serving recommendations

Focused on power, abundance and intensity, Crimson Casks rewards curiosity with layers of richness, brightness and spiciness. Drizzle over ice cream to reveal flavours of fig and cinnamon.

Technical details

Bottled at 46% ABV.

Natural colour.

Not chill-filtered.

Blended Malt Scotch Whisky. First Released: 2024

name: Douglas Laing's Double Barrel Islay & Highland (700 ml)
desc_en_short: This Double Barrel marriage of Islay and Highland Whiskies offers a nose with a sweetly smoked character, developing to well fired toast and honey. The palate carries notes of smoke and ashes, balanced with a sweet Malt character. The finish lingers long with charred nuts and a marzipan sweetness.

name: Douglas Laing's Provenance Teaninich 8 Years (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short:
Teaninich Distillery, founded in 1817 by Hugh Munro, is a hidden Highland gem that remains one of the most consistent sources for blending houses, yet rarely bottled as a Single Malt on its own.

Its fame within the industry comes from producing a malt that is startlingly fresh, crisp, and bright, often described as the "Highland answer to spring water." Douglas Laing's Provenance range captures Teaninich's youthful vitality beautifully here, offering a natural, unadulterated glimpse into a spirit that normally works behind the scenes.

name: Douglas Laing's Provenance Balmenach 10 Years (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short:
Balmenach Distillery, founded in 1824, sits quietly at the foot of the Cromdale Hills in Speyside. Unlike many of its floral Speyside neighbors, Balmenach is known for crafting a bold, full-bodied, and slightly rustic single malt — a true reflection of the wilder side of Speyside.

Douglas Laing's Provenance bottling of a 10-year-old Balmenach showcases the distillery’s robust yet approachable spirit, allowing whisky lovers to experience an authentic taste of old-school Speyside character.

name: Douglas Laing's Provenance Caol Ila 8 Years (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short: Caol Ila is a legendary Islay distillery known for its iconic smoky, maritime character. Douglas Laing’s Provenance bottling showcases a young and vibrant expression of Caol Ila — capturing the distillery’s coastal spirit with remarkable clarity and authenticity. This 8-year-old single malt is bottled without coloring or chill filtration, allowing the pure essence of the distillate and cask to shine through.

name: Douglas Laing's Provenance Glenrothes 9 Years (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short:
Glenrothes is a Speyside distillery steeped in tradition, known for crafting whisky with a profile that's elegant, fruity, and honeyed. Unlike more peated or coastal styles, Glenrothes focuses on balance — a hallmark of Speyside.

This 9-year-old expression from Douglas Laing’s Provenance series offers a snapshot of the distillery's youthful energy, captured with minimal interference and no chill filtration. It’s a single cask, natural colour, and bottled at 46% — an honest, unvarnished glimpse of what Glenrothes does best.

name: Douglas Laing's Provenance Arran 8 Years (700 ml)
food_matching: Dark Chocolate, Smoked Meats, Aged Cheese, Nuts
desc_en_short:
Hailing from the Isle of Arran — known as "Scotland in miniature" — this young single malt captures the essence of the island’s lush greenery, sea breeze, and gentle hills. The Arran Distillery is relatively young, founded in 1995, yet it has built a reputation for clean, vibrant, and fruit-driven whiskies.

This Douglas Laing Provenance bottling showcases Arran in its fresh and unfiltered youth — a celebration of purity, coastal influence, and natural Highland-Island balance.

name: Kavalan Lan Single Malt Whisky (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Discover the essence of 'LÁN', an exceptional whisky crafted as a tribute to Yilan, the birthplace of Kavalan distillery. Its name, also symbolizing the Chinese character for 'orchid', beautifully reflects the island's revered standing as the Kingdom of Orchids. Refreshing vanilla notes from bourbon barrels combine with the fusion of nutty, floral aromas from port casks. Further enriched by Kavalan's STR technique, infusing the whisky with a caramelized fruity sweetness achieved through shaving, toasting, and recharring Vinho wine casks. Accentuated by dessert and nutty woody tones, it exudes an overall lightness and elegance, with a pure and constantly surprising aroma. Achieving a subtle balance among rich layers, Kavalan proudly presents the masterpiece – 'LÁN'.

name: Fever-Tree  Premium Natural Soda Water (200 ml) (Pack 24 Bottles)
desc_en_short: By blending soft spring water with a high level of carbonation, our Spring Soda is perfect for bringing out the best flavours of finest whiskies.

name: Fever-Tree  Premium Ginger Ale (200 ml) (Pack 24 Bottles)
desc_en_short: Made by blending three natural and unique ginger oils, that have been sourced from around the world, with soft spring water. So delicious that whisky writers are saying ‘at last' here is a ginger ale they can recommend to partner great products.

name: Fever-Tree  Premium Elderflower (200 ml) (Pack 24 Bottles)
desc_en_short: With it's delicate floral notes and subtle sweetness, Fever-Tree Elderflower Tonic Water is made from hand-picked elderflower for a clean and natural taste. Add a wonderful summery twist to your G&T and liven up those vodkas.

name: Monin  Strawberry (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Monin Strawberry syrup was one of the first fruit flavour developed in the syrup range.  A popular flavour in France, strawberry syrup is added to water, green mint and lemonade to make a Strawberry Diabolo as well as flavoured milk drinks.

name: Monin  Blood Orange (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Powerful fruity flavour with a citrus aroma. Good balance between acidity, bitterness and sweetness of the fruit.

name: Monin  Blue Curacao (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Orange skin smell, candy bitter orange taste.

name: Monin  Cherry (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Cherry Bigarrade smell, with a slight touch of core; very juicy ripe cherry aroma which makes you feel like drinking fresh cherry juice.

name: Monin  Cherry Blossom (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Delicate floral perfume.

name: Monin  Coconut (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Very intense, concentrate and long-lasting taste of grated coconut which carries you away to tropics, under coconut palms...Aftertaste a bit caramelized.

name: Monin  Elder Flower (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Strong floral smell with honey notes; distinctive, tart and juicy taste.

name: Monin  Peach (700 ml)
desc_en_short: MONIN Peach has an unusual rich flavour and aromatic fragrance. Make up a cocktail by combining peach with orange, and you will really enjoy your summer afternoon.

name: Monin  Pink Grapefruit(700 ml)
desc_en_short: Subtle smell of fresh pink grapefruit with notes of grapefruit peel and flower. Sweet and juicy taste, refreshing harmony between bitterness and acidity of pink grapefruit.

name: Monin  Violet (700 ml)
desc_en_short: One of the floral range of syrups inspired by the traditional violet sweets, MONIN Violet delivers the sweet, fragrant taste of this pretty springtime flower.

name: Monin  Strawberry (1 L)
desc_en_short: Monin Strawberry syrup was one of the first fruit flavour developed in the syrup range.  A popular flavour in France, strawberry syrup is added to water, green mint and lemonade to make a Strawberry Diabolo as well as flavoured milk drinks.

name: Monin  Lemonade Concentrade (700 ml)
desc_en_short: MONIN Lemonade concentrate will bring you the perfect balance between citrus sourness and sweetness for outstanding innovative lemonades!

name: Monin  Lemongrass (700 ml)
desc_en_short: MONIN Lemongrass syrup captures the zesty aroma and refreshing, natural taste of freshly cut lemongrass harvested from green Asian fields. Now, it has become a popular ingredient all over the world and is widely used by bartenders to make fresh, zingy cocktails.

name: Monin  Rantcho Lemon (700 ml)
desc_en_short: The lemon is primarily famous for its refreshing smell and tart flavour similar to limes. Its true home is unknown, though some have linked it to India. Lemon juice is very high in vitamin C and has many culinary uses. MONIN Lemon Rantcho is a sugar free concentrate, without pulp made with 50% juice from the finest Sicily lemons. It is praised by barmen who use for its true taste and convenience in replacement of lemon juice.

name: Monin  Popcorn (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Perfectly balanced and full bodied,  MONIN Popcorn syrup will add a roasted popcorn flavour with a hint of nuttiness in any coffee beverages and help craft unexpected classic cocktails such as colada or martinis!

name: Monin  Maple Flavoured (700 ml)
desc_en_short: Le Sirop de MONIN Maple Flavoured takes the distinctive essence of traditional maple syrup to give a well-rounded brown sugar feel with light roasted notes to beverages. Perfect for tea and coffees, smoothies or even cocktails, MONIN Maple flavoured syrup's jewel-like flaming amber colour also makes it an ideal alternative to any dessert topping.

name: Monin  William Pear Puree (1 L)
desc_en_short: With its succulent, fine, soft flesh, the Williams Pear is not the most cultivated variety in the world. Le Fruit de MONIN Williams Pear is carefully selected and harvested when the fruit is ripe. It is then developed to preserve the many gustative qualities of this ancient fruit.

name: Graham's  2017 Late Bottled Vintage Port
wine_color: Very deep purple in colour with an intense garnet edge.
desc_en_short:
Graham’s 2017 LBV is very deep purple in colour with an intense garnet edge. The wine offers enticing aromas of red and black fruits with some lovely mint and eucalyptus notes. It is generous on the palate, with Graham’s typical opulence, revealing delicious blackberry fruit underscored by ripe, polished tannins, which give the wine great freshness and vitality. The finish reveals Graham’s signature complexity and elegance in equal measure.

This wine has been matured in wood in the Graham’s 1890 lodge for five years after which it was bottled from early 2018, ready for drinking. Late Bottled Vintages, as the term implies, are bottled later than classic Vintage Ports (the latter after two years). The Graham’s 2013 can be enjoyed anytime and pairs wonderfully with dark chocolate desserts as well as semi-cured and cured cheeses like Cheddar and Manchego. Once open, the wine will keep in good condition for several weeks.

name: Cantine Pellegrino  Zibibbo Vino Liquoroso IGT
desc_en_short: Light yellow. Intense, typical of the Zibibbo with a mix of fruit hints on aromas. Full and harmonious in palate. Best drink with dry sweets, ideal with seasoned cheese.

name: Dow's  Fine White Port
desc_en_short: Dow’s Fine White ages mainly in wood, gaining a rich golden colour and an intense rich nutty aromatic complexity. A certain amount of wine is not wood-aged and is blended in to add freshness and fruit character. On the palate, balanced and smooth, with excellent acidity and a long finish.

name: Monsoon Valley  Muscat (375 ml)
desc_en_short: A luscious fortified Muscat wine. Lush aromas of lychee and rose petal with a long clean persistence on the palate.

name: Cantine Pellegrino  Zibibbo Vino Liquoroso IGT (500 ml)
desc_en_short: Light yellow. Intense, typical of the Zibibbo with a mix of fruit hints on aromas. Full and harmonious in palate. Best drink with dry sweets, ideal with seasoned cheese.

name: BURGUNDIAN TASTING NIGHT @THE BOTTLEMAN WINE BAR (Saturday 27 SEP 2025)
desc_en_short:
Burgundian Tasting Night

6 Masterpieces – One Unforgettable Evening

มีบางช่วงเวลาในชีวิตที่เรารู้สึกว่า “ไม่ควรพลาด” ค่ำคืนวันที่ 27 กันยายน 2025 คือหนึ่งในนั้น — โอกาสที่คุณจะได้สัมผัส 6 ไวน์ระดับ Premier Cru และ Village อันทรงคุณค่า จาก Burgundy ประเทศฝรั่งเศส ในบรรยากาศสุดเอ็กซ์คลูซีฟ ที่ The Bottleman Wine Bar

name: Primosic  Ribolla di Oslavia DOC (Orange wine)
desc_en_short: Intense golden-yellow colour. Characteristic and dry, the fragrance evokes acacia flowers, with undertones of bitter orange rind with pervasive mineral sensation. The finish is reminiscent of apricot stone and chestnut pulp.

name: Chateau d'Esclans  Whispering Angel Rose (1.5 L)
style: Grenache, Rolle, Cinsault, Syrah, And Mourvedre

name: Beringer  Main & Vine White Zinfandel
desc_en_short: Crafted by Beringer’s winemakers to celebrate the 20th anniversary of Beringer White Zinfandel, Beringer Sparkling White Zinfandel is a festive, effervescent wine made from Zinfandel grapes using traditional winemaking techniques to highlight the varietal’s vibrant fruit flavors and spicy nuances.

name: Gallician  Prestige Rose
wine_color: Beautiful, crystal clear, deep pink colour with violet highlights.
desc_en_short: Beautiful, crystal clear, deep pink colour with violet highlights. Red fruit such as fresh strawberries and raspberries. In the mouth, it's like candy. An elegant and crisp palate ornamented with fresh fruity notes and a long flavourful finish. A perfect choice with aperitif, cold meats, grills and croustade. Best served between 10 and 12°C.

name: Domaines Ott  Clos Mireille Rose
desc_en_short: The wine is a very pale pink highlighted, depending on the vintage, with golden, orange and even vermilion tints. Its bouquet reveals fresh fruit (mango, melon) punctuated with lemony notes. On the palate, its freshness develops through citrus aromas around a resolutely mineral core before ending with a subtly persistent finish.

name: Chateau d'Esclans  Garrus
style: The Best Quality Lots Bearing Old Vines Consisting Primarily Of Grenache And Rolle (Vermentino).
desc_en_short: Concentrated aromas and flavors of dried citrus, peaches and passion fruit give this rosé a powerful nose. A bright acidity with glazed pear and pineapple filling the mid palate. Garrus' toasty notes are reminiscent of a vintage Champagne without the bubbles. A long, vertical texture with a creamy finish that features rich, spicy notes. Powerful and elegant.

name: Mount Riley  The Bonnie Pinot Noir Rose
desc_en_short: Our Pinot Rosé was made from a mixture of pinot noir and pinot gris grapes. The pinot noir grapes were crushed and destemmed and held in our press for 24 hours before being gently juiced to tank. Hand selected parcels of pinot gris grapes were chosen to blend into the tanks before fermentation was prompted by the introduction of carefully selected yeast strains. This delightful blend was fermented at cool temperatures to encourage and preserve its bright, lifted aromatics.

name: Antigal  UNO Rose
desc_en_short: Antigal Uno Rose offers bright with light cherry color of low intensity with salmon-colored tones. On the nose there are aromas of fresh red fruits such as strawberry, cherry, raspberry with a slight vanilla note. In the mouth fresh, harmonious with an excellent acid balance.

name: Tenuta Guado al Tasso By Antinori  Scalabrone Rosato Bolgheri DOC
flavor_tags: Strawberry, Raspberry, Red Berry, Mineral, Citrus, Floral, Rose
food_matching: Mediterranean, Grilled Vegetables, Light Salads, Sushi
desc_en_short: Scalabrone is the elegant rosé from Antinori's prestigious Guado al Tasso estate in Bolgheri — a dry, refined Tuscan rosé made from Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, and Syrah with fresh red berry, citrus, and a delicate floral note, and a clean, persistent finish.

name: Talamonti  Cerasuolo D'Abruzzo DOC Rose
desc_en_short: Brilliant light ruby red color. Raspberry, blackberry cherry and red fruit. Complex red fruit notes paired to a pleasant acidity. Perfect with light salads and marinated white meats.

name: Mirabeau  Etoile Provence Rosé
desc_en_short: An alluring bright colour of pale litchi, Etoile is the limited edition star of the Mirabeau range. A gastronomic Rosé with an expressive nose, revealing rich aromas of peach and pear, aptly complemented by a delicate citrus note. A wine to relish, savouring the lovely minerality brought by its higher elevation terroir. Made to be drunk with delicious food, this wine partners beautifully with grilled fish and meat, as well as creamy cheeses and desserts.

name: Navaro Lopez  Don Aurelio Rosado
wine_color: Rosé very lively, clean and bright.
food_matching: Mediterranean, Grilled Vegetables, Light Salads, Sushi

name: Artero  Rosado
wine_color: Clean and bright intense raspberry color.
desc_en_short: Clean, bright raspberry color. On the nose, ripe strawberries, red cur- rants and a touch of liquorice reminiscent of red candy. Light and fresh with red berry flavours. Balanced, with good acidity.

name: Bodegas Muga  Rose Rioja DOC
wine_color: Pale pink wine, with a bright, elegant sheen.
desc_en_short: Pale pink wine, with a bright, elegant sheen. Very complex and intense nose with aromas of stone fruit (peaches, apricots), citrus (mandarin peel), strawberries and notes of dried hazelnuts. Silky-smooth mouth-feel with good acidity. Balanced and very long on the palate. Perfect to accompany white meat, pasta, rice dishes, salads or cheese.

name: Château Routas  Coteaux Varois en Provence Rosé
desc_en_short: Freshly cut watermelon, ripe peach aromas and floral notes lead to a palate alive with wild strawberries and hints of mineral notes. Crisp acidity and a refreshing finish. A Decanter International Trophy winner for best Rose and 93 points from James Suckling, 2019

name: Château Routas  Coteaux Varois en Provence Rosé (1.5 L)
desc_en_short: Freshly cut watermelon, ripe peach aromas and floral notes lead to a palate alive with wild strawberries and hints of mineral notes. Crisp acidity and a refreshing finish. A Decanter International Trophy winner for best Rose and 93 points from James Suckling, 2019

name: Dominio de Punctum  Pablo Claro Rosado
Les Pins D'Aubane Rose De France (Fruit Wine)
food_matching: Mediterranean, Grilled Vegetables, Light Salads, Sushi

name: Love By Leoube  Cotes De Provence
food_matching: Mediterranean, Grilled Vegetables, Light Salads, Sushi

name: Aromo  Rose Syrah
wine_color: This wine is Intense bright pink.
desc_en_short: This wine is Intense bright pink. Aromas of strawberry and any citric tones. Fresh and intense fruit. Lightly sweetness and very good acidity.

name: Gerard Bertrand  Art de Vivre Languedoc AOP (Grenache Syrah Cinsault)
San Marzano  Tramari Rosé  di Primitivo Salento IGP
Baron Philippe de Rothschild  Mouton Cadet Rose Mathilde BIO
wine_color: Pale blush pink with onion skin hue
desc_en_short:
Rosé Mathilde is lively, pure, and modern, with vibrant notes of strawberry, raspberry, and rose petals. It offers a light and graceful texture with bright acidity and a clean finish.

Perfect for summertime sipping, seafood, appetizers, or simply unwinding outdoors, this wine is both stylish and sustainably made, ideal for conscious consumers who love elegance and ease in every glass.

name: Monfort  Pinot Grigio Ramato Vigneti Dolomiti IGT
Headline Acts  Rose (750 ml)
food_matching: Mediterranean, Grilled Vegetables, Light Salads, Sushi
desc_en_short: Headline Acts Rosé is a fresh, fruit-driven Australian rosé — lively and approachable with strawberry, watermelon, and a hint of citrus, dry and well-balanced for easy everyday drinking.

name: Pio Cesare  Langhe Rosy Rose
desc_en_short:
We named it “Rosy” to dedicate it to the Founder’s granddaughter. Savory, fresh, spicy, great structure, amber-colored.
Produced in very small quantities.

name: Domaines Ott  Etoile Rose
wine_color: Pale peach hue with golden tints.
desc_en_short: Étoile is an invitation to discover the essence of the Domaines Ott⋆ identity through three unique characteristics: the salinity of Clos Mireille, the smooth elegance of Château de Selle, and the depth of Château Romassan. Bespoke ageing in stainless steel vats and spherical ceramic containers brings out the fresh, crisp fruit with a slightly saline character. This is an exceptional rosé, built for the future and the perfect partner for the best of today’s gastronomy.

name: Gran Sasso  Montepulciano D' Abruzzo DOC
wine_color: Deep ruby red in colour with garnet reflections
desc_en_short: A generous, fruit-forward Montepulciano d'Abruzzo from Gran Sasso, offering plummy aromas, a rich and supple palate, and grippy tannins — all without a single day in oak, keeping the wine vibrant, fresh, and effortlessly drinkable.

name: Poggio Al Tesoro  Mediterra
wine_color: Ruby red in colour with purple tints
desc_en_short: A fragrant and intensely fruity red wine, where the aromas of blackberries, plums and cherries are interwoven with more incisive peppery notes. The result of a winning blend of Syrah, Cabernet Sauvignon and Merlot, Mediterra succeeds in the difficult task of expressing the rich complexity of Bolgheri’s terroir with an easy-drinking, exceedingly pleasurably style.

name: Craggy Range  Te Muna Pinot Noir Martinborough
desc_en_short: Shows great fruit purity with red cherry and raspberry to the fore. The palate has flesh and succulence with a fine, dry tannin balance. Bourne was impressed noting, “Lots of red fruit on the nose. Very delicate, with a hint of truffle. Intense flavours but very graceful and finishing with fresh acidity. It will grow in the bottle.

name: Francis Coppola  Director's Cut Cabernet Sauvignon
style: Cabernet Sauvignon, 10% Petit Verdot, 5% Cabernet Franc
desc_en_short: Director’s Cut Cabernet Sauvignon is a lush, rich, full-bodied beauty with elegant oak character and complex flavors that include black cherry, raspberry and currants interwoven with notes of anise, dark chocolate and espresso bean. The small addition of Petit Verdot and Cabernet Franc are what give this wine additional weight and texture, and also what contributes to the alluring mocha finish, which is long and has a lifted fragrance from the barrels. Best with a few years of aging, but can be enjoyed now with 1 to 2 hours of decanting.

name: Chateau du Glana  AOC Saint Julien
wine_color: A very deep, almost regulgent purple/black colour.

name: Ogier  Chateauneuf du Pape Clos de l'Oratoire des Papes
desc_en_short:
Ogier et Fils was founded by Christophe Ogier as a negociant firm in 1859.

In 1948 Ogier became  negociant-éleveur, he establsihed his own cellars for blending and ageing of the wines bought Made from producers. Some years later his firm was fusioned with another negociant firm Caves des Papes. Until 2008 the  firm was named Ogier - Caves des Papes.In 1994 Ogier - Caves des Papes became a part of another firm Vignobles Jeanjean based in Languedoc.

In 1999 a domain in Chateauneuf du Pape became for sale as none of the heirs wanted to run the estate. It was Clos de l'Oratoire des Papes which for many years had been run by the widow after Leonce Amouroux, who beside the wines Made from his own estate also bought wines Made from other producers and marketed these wines by the brand Leonce Amouroux. 

In 2000 Société Léonce Amouroux with its 20 ha of vineyards bought by Ogier - Caves des Papes. The wines Made from Clos de l'Oratoire des Papes have since been made seperately at Ogier with the original labels Made from 1926, when the first wines were bottled this domain. The brand Leonce Amouroux is still used for a single cuvée of Chateauneuf du Pape.

name: Belleville  Grenache Syrah Merlot (Fruit wine blend)
desc_en_short:
*Minimum Qty Allowed in Shopping Cart 6 Bottles.

Spicy and peppery nose and a long lingering finish, quintessentially French in character and masterfully blended Belleville wine are a wonderful accompaniment to both Western and Asian dishes as well as being the perfect aperitif.

name: Montes  Alpha "M"
style: Cabernet Sauvignon, 10% Cabernet Franc, 5% Merlot And 5% Petit Verdot.
grape_variety: Cabernet Sauvignon, Cabernet Franc, Merlot, Petit Verdot
desc_en_short: Montes Alpha 'M' is Chile's benchmark Cabernet Sauvignon-led Bordeaux blend, earning 97 points from James Suckling for its hauntingly elegant aromas of blackcurrant, flowers, and sweet tobacco, backed by ultra-fine tannins and a polished, lingering finish.

name: Montes  Purple Angel Carmenere
desc_en_short: Montes Purple Angel is one of Chile's most celebrated Carmenères — a voluptuous, full-bodied blend of 92% Carmenère and 8% Petit Verdot from Colchagua Valley, layered with dark berries, Cuban cigar, dark chocolate, and exotic spice on a long, refined finish.

name: Ogier  Cotes du Rhone Gentilhomme Red
desc_en_short: Ruby color with purple-blue tints. Complex, spicy and animal bouquet. The palate is rich and well-balanced. Enjoy drink with meat and cheese.

name: Wente Vineyards  Hayes Ranch Cabernet Sauvignon
wine_color: Deep ruby (รูบี้เข้ม)
desc_en_short: สัมผัสรสแคบอร์เนต์จาก Wente Vineyards ที่มาจาก California

name: Talamonti  Kudos Colline Pescaresi Rosso IGP
wine_color: Intensely deep ruby red color with violet reflections
desc_en_short: Intensely deep ruby red color with violet reflections. Complex fresh berry character with notes of cherries, blueberries and currants, further integrated by the elegant oak spices hinting of coffee and vanilla. Rich fruit, great concentration, complex, with diverse layers of supple tannins. A powerful wine of great elegant stature. Perfect with important red meat dishes, game, and aged cheeses.

name: Mastrojanni  Brunello di Montalcino DOCG
desc_en_short: The beautiful ruby ​​red color introduces a nose that unleashes an incredible progression of ripe fruity notes, leather, tobacco, variegated spices and hints of undergrowth, finding a dynamic and vibrant palate stimulated by pleasant acidity and a dense, elegant tannin that extends itself in a final taste. The grapes from the Crus Vigna Loreto and Vigna Schiena d'Asino were used for the vinification of this Brunello.

name: Palazzo Grimani by Allegrini  Amarone Della Valpolicella DOC
desc_en_short: Dry and well-balanced. The traditional acidic note combines well with the softness of the fruit to form a satisfying contrast and produce a supple, feisty wine. Perfect fit for braised meats, wild game particularly hare, duck a l’orange, aged cheeses.

name: Santa Cristina By Antinori  Rosso IGT
food_matching: Pasta, Pizza, Roasted Chicken, Pork, Medium Cheese
desc_en_short: Santa Cristina Rosso is Antinori's most accessible Tuscan red — a smooth, fruit-forward everyday wine with bright cherry, plum, and gentle spice, made for immediate enjoyment with typical Italian food.

name: Santa Cristina By Antinori  Chianti Superiore DOCG
food_matching: Pasta, Pizza, Roasted Chicken, Pork, Medium Cheese
desc_en_short: Santa Cristina Chianti Superiore is a step up from the basic Chianti — a bright, structured Sangiovese with cherry, dried herbs, and earthy depth from the heart of Chianti's DOCG zone, made by the Antinori family's most approachable label.

name: La Braccesca By Antinori  Vino Nobile di Montepulciano DOCG
flavor_tags: Dried Herbs, Truffle, Mineral, Tobacco, Cherry, Plum, Oak
food_matching: Pasta, Pizza, Roasted Chicken, Pork, Medium Cheese
desc_en_short: La Braccesca's Vino Nobile is a benchmark expression of one of Tuscany's great DOCG appellations — a structured, age-worthy Prugnolo Gentile (Sangiovese) with concentrated dark cherry, tobacco, iron, and firm mineral tannins that evolve beautifully over years.

name: Antinori  Chianti Classico Riserva "Badia A Passignano" DOCG
flavor_tags: Truffle, Mineral, Tobacco, Cherry, Earthy, Cedar, Plum, Game
food_matching: Pasta, Pizza, Roasted Chicken, Pork, Medium Cheese
desc_en_short: Badia a Passignano is one of Tuscany's most historic and revered vineyards — this single-estate Chianti Classico Riserva from Antinori is made from 100% Sangiovese grown beside the ancient Vallombrosian abbey, producing a wine of remarkable depth, complexity, and longevity.

name: Santa Cristina By Antinori  Le Maestrelle Toscana IGT
food_matching: Pasta, Pizza, Roasted Chicken, Pork, Medium Cheese
desc_en_short: Le Maestrelle is a soft, accessible Tuscan IGT from the Santa Cristina label — a Sangiovese-Merlot blend with ripe cherry, plum, and gentle spice, designed for easy enjoyment with everyday Italian food.

name: Fantinel  Sant' Helena Cabernet Sauvignon
wine_color: Deep ruby red, tending to purple.
desc_en_short: Bright ruby red with garnet tinges, redolent of notes of the forest floor and spices, with a full-bodied palate. This magnificent international wine is aged slowly in oak barrels to develop its finest characteristics and reveal its graceful elegance.

name: Gran Sasso  Sangiovese Terre Di Chieti IGT
desc_en_short: Wine has a balanced, palatable medium saturation with expressive fruity accord decorated tannic strokes and accents sweet spices. Pairing with red and white meat, sausages, salami, prosciutto, cheese and fatty foods.

name: Cantine Leonardo Da Vinci  Chianti Leonardo DOCG
desc_en_short: Purple-red in colour, and intense. On the nose it is persistent, characterized by perfumes of cherries mingled with gentle spicy notes, especially black pepper. Agreeable and long on the palate, it shows a good structure and an evident finesse.

name: Pio Cesare  Dolcetto D'Alba
desc_en_short:
Fresh, fruity and fragrant, with body and structure. Spicy, ripe fruit and roundness. Long life.
To be served at cellar temperature.

name: Poggio Al Tesoro  Sondraia DOC
desc_en_short: After just a few vintages Sondraia has become a classic in the Bolgheri area, thanks to a style that seeks a powerful profile but with harmony and finesse. Perfectly ripe grapes and painstaking work in the cellar yeald a wine with intense notes of fresh fruit and herbs which follow through on the palate, where the wine opens up with great class and silky smoothness.

name: Santa Helena  Siglo de Oro Reserva Merlot
desc_en_short: Deep violet red in colour. On the nose, plum and ripe red fruit aromas are detected, as well as hints of spices and vanilla. Medium-bodied and well-structured. Sweet tannins, jam aromas and toasted notes are detected on the palate. Prolonged final persistence.

name: Velenosi  Ludi Offida Rosso DOCG
desc_en_short: Intense ruby ​​red in color. The penetrating scents are persistent and lead to the nose aromas of ripe fruit and meaty precise (cherry and blackberry in particular), along with notes of licorice and graphite. In the mouth it is austere and elegant, impactful and great taste progression, strong and determined character marked by fine tannins, soft and round.

name: Velenosi  Brecciarolo, Rosso Piceno Superiore The Year of the Rabbit
wine_color: Ruby red with a hint of garnet.
desc_en_short: Intense, with remarkable juicy red fruits hints. Floral bouquet of very fresh violets, with dark spices hints. Elegant vanilla notes complete its complex bouquet. Persistent, warm, full-bodied and well-orchestrated, it delivers the same notes to the palate as to the nose. A distinguished and equally charismatic wine.

name: Vigneti Del Vulture  Pippoli Aglianico Del Vulture DOC
desc_en_short: Bright red with violet reflections. This wine has a strong aromatic integrity with hints of cherry and sour black cherry mixed with spice and vanilla. Good structure, long, balsamic finish, mature tannins and persisting aftertaste. All dishes made with meat and seasoned cheeses.

name: Vigneti Di Zabu  Chiantari Nero D' Avola IGT
desc_en_short: Intense aroma, with red fruit, balsamic and floral hints. Warm, long-lasting, aftertaste of wood flowers. Pairing with Roasted-grilled meat, Game and Pasta-vegatables sauce.

name: Paul Jaboulet  Parallele 45 Red
wine_color: Deep colour with an attractive brilliance.
desc_en_short: Deep colour with an attractive brilliance. Elegant and aromatic, with red fruits blended with spices. The palate is well-structured on rounded tannins, with a final spicy note. Perfect drinks with Grilled/roasted meats.

name: La Braccesca By Antinori  Achelo Syrah DOC
flavor_tags: Black Pepper, Blackberry, Dark Fruit, Scrubland, Pepper, Herbal, Olive, Plum
food_matching: Red Meat, Grilled Steak, Lamb, Hard Cheese, BBQ
desc_en_short: Achelo is La Braccesca's ambitious Syrah from Montepulciano — a bold, southern-influenced Italian red with dark fruit, black pepper, Mediterranean herbs, and the structured complexity of a serious single-variety wine from Antinori's Tuscan estate.

name: Alois Lageder  Pinot Noir Alto Adige DOC
wine_color: Medium ruby colour with a garnet shimmer.
desc_en_short: Medium ruby colour with a garnet shimmer. Clean, uplifted somewhat earthy varietal aroma: notes of red fruit, cherries and some spiciness. Fruity, mild flavour, medium-bodied. Fresh finish with good length. Elegant style. This wine will drink well, when cellared under proper conditions, for at least 3 to 5 years. Suggested food with white and red meat, poultry, duck, veni- son, cheeses.

name: Craggy Range  Te Kahu Gimblett Gravels Vineyard
desc_en_short: Deepest crimson red. Brooding aromatically with notes of cassis, black olive and dried tobacco enveloping a dense core of blue fruits. The wine has a lovely focus on the palate with dark fruits framed by fine tannins to deliver a classical structure with an excellent future ahead.

name: Torres  Sangre de Toro Red (5.5% Low Alcohol)
desc_en_short: Dark cherry red color. Fine subtle red fruit aroma (raspberry) with a sweet note of cherry jam. The palate is pleasant, silky, light and balanced. Lovely with meat carpaccios, charcuterie, and mild sheep or goat cheeses. Serve at 14ºC.

name: Alter Ego de Palmer, Margaux 2019
desc_en_short: Alter Ego was born with the 1998 vintage. It resulted from a new approach to selecting and blending devised to interpret the Château Palmer terroir differently without departing from the values that make the reputation of our wines – namely, finesse and elegance, aromatic richness, harmony and length.

name: Stonier  Pinot Noir
desc_en_short: Light bright ruby red. Pretty red fruits abound, with plum, cherries and raspberries, together with some lifted floral aromas. Despite the light colour there is myriad of intense fruit flavours that build in the glass

name: St. Hallett  Gamekeeper's Shiraz
desc_en_short: Deep red with magenta hues. Vibrant dark cherry and raspberry with underlying spice and chocolate. The red fruits carry through to the palate with a generous juicy opening. This wine is perfect with grilled rack of lamb orfillet steak.

name: Wolf Blass  Yellow Label Shiraz
desc_en_short: Selected batches of fruit from premium South Australian Shiraz vineyards come together to create a wine displaying attractive berry and spice characters that marry well with subtle integrated oak. A well structured Shiraz with good length of flavour.

name: Wolf Blass  Gold Label Barossa Shiraz
desc_en_short: Wolf Blass Gold Label Barossa Shiraz is a soft, rich red wine with intense dark berry and blood-plum aromas, hints of fragrant spice, and a fleshy, concentrated palate with bright fruit, plush tannins, integrated French oak and an elegant, structural line.

name: Beringer  Founders Estate Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Deep color with bright cassis, green tea, black olive and sweet vanilla spice aromas that lead into a fleshy mouth. Black fruit, cassis, and spice flavors are supported into a long finish by fine-grained, assertive tannins.

name: Frescobaldi  Nipozzano Riserva Chianti Rufina DOCG
La Capra  by Fairview Pinotage
desc_en_short: La Capra Pinotage from Fairview delivers perfumed plums and ripe berry richness with a plush texture, gentle spice, and the sun-drenched character that has made Paarl one of South Africa's most celebrated homes for this uniquely South African grape variety.

name: Luce Della Vite   Luce IGT
wine_color: An intense, almost impenetrable, ruby red color.
desc_en_short: Luce della Vite is a pioneering Super Tuscan from Montalcino, born from the legendary collaboration between Frescobaldi and Robert Mondavi — blending the elegance of Sangiovese with the plush roundness of Merlot into a wine of extraordinary depth and global renown.

name: Pala  Essentija Isola Dei Nuraghi IGT
food_matching: Pasta, Pizza, Roasted Chicken, Pork, Medium Cheese

name: Pala  Silenzi Rosso Isola Dei Nuraghi IGT
Baron Philippe de Rothschild  Mouton Cadet Reserve St.Emilion
wine_color: A glittering garnet red with a slightly crimson hue.
desc_en_short: A glittering garnet red with a slightly crimson hue. The nose opens on spice notes, especially Malabar pepper and cinnamon, followed with airing by ripe red and black fruit aromas, especially wild strawberry, bilberry and blackberry. A rich and very full attack on forward yet supple tannins leads into a stylish, fruit-filled mid-palate on blackberry and blackcurrant flavours, while mixed vanilla and mocha notes appear on the finish.

name: Gerard Bertrand  Naturalys Merlot
wine_color: The colour is a dense, deep red.

name: Tyrrell's  Shiraz "Moore's Creek"
desc_en_short:
"The first to release On-Premise only wines to the Australian market"

Aromas of ripe plum fruits and chocolate and vanilla essence. Sweet shiraz fruits and spicy peppery characters are evident on the palate, which is supported by the integration of tannins. This wine has been designed to enjoy immediately. A versatile acompaniment to grilled and roasted dishes or spicy pastas.

name: Tyrrell's  Shiraz "Old Winery"
desc_en_short: A smooth soft and spicy red wine with aroma’s of dark ripe fruit and subtle vanillin oak. The palate is full of rich shiraz flavours and is supported by firm tannins which provide good length and complexity. An ideal accompaniment to traditional red meat dishes, tomato based pastas and matured cheeses.

name: Mascota Vineyards  Unánime Gran Vino Tinto
desc_en_short: Unánime has an intense cherry-red colour, elegant aromas of chocolate and tobacco, along with a touch of black pepper and some fleshy notes. Well structured, with round tannins that blend nicely with its fresh, juicy acidity. Ideal with grilled red meat, stews and casseroles.

name: Caliterra  Cabernet Sauvignon Reserva
wine_color: A deep and a very lively ruby-red colour
desc_en_short: 89 Points in Robert Parker's Wine Advocate. This Cabernet Sauvignon Reserve shows a deep and a very lively ruby-red colour, and its nose reveals subtle notes of raspberry and black currant, and complex hints of coffee and tobacco. It is crisp and voluptuous on the palate delivering fresh fruit flavours and an amazingly vibrant acidity that promises good longevity for this wine.

name: Planeta  Plumbago Nero d'Avola IGT Sicilia
desc_en_short: Plumbago is a single-variety Nero d'Avola, named after the beautiful purple wild flower that grows in the woods surrounding the baglio and vineyards of Ulmo.

name: Ricasoli  Brolio Chianti Classico DOCG
desc_en_short: Bright ruby red color. The nose is all hints of small red fruits, irises and violets. In the mouth, elegant, with velvety tannins well integrated with acidity. Persistent finish, expression of the territory of Brolio.

name: Tahuna  Pinot Noir Hawke's Bay
desc_en_short: Tahuna Pinot Noir has concentrated black cherry and dark berry aromas which follow through to the palate where dark berry fruit and cherry flavours are supported by soft tannins. This is a ripe and deeply coloured food wine, designed for early drinking but capable of cellaring for 3-5 years. Recommended serving temperature 16-18°C.

name: Chateau Riviere "Cuvee Prestige"
desc_en_short: Chateau Riviere Cuvee Prestige is made from a blend of Grenache and Syrah. A deep red color with a bit of purple hue to it. On the nose there are aromas of blackberry and black raspberry fruit with a little bit of black pepper as well. On the palate you get beautiful and pure blackberry fruit up front with a hint of spice. Mild tannins and decent acidity add a little balance and structure.

name: Agricola Querciabella  Mongrana Maremma Toscana IGT
desc_en_short:
In 1997, having elevated to the pinnacle of success, Querciabella set eyes on the southern Tuscan coast as the next fertile ground in which to set roots, literally. At the time, Maremma was untamed, still steeped in wilderness. Querciabella chose the perfect canvas, a seaside estate of 42 hectares, to plant the first vineyards in 2000, cultivated biodynamically since inception.

Mongrana 2005 was the first vintage to be released, initially exclusively on international markets. The wine takes its name – and its character – from that of the noble family of knights depicted by the Italian Renaissance poet Ludovico Ariosto in his masterpiece Orlando Furioso.

On its own epic journey, Mongrana was soon hailed as one of the “Top 100 Wines of the World” (Wine Spectator, 2013).
Bruce Sanderson picked it again in 2019 for the magazine’s “Top 100 Value Wines” as well as one of “8 Italian Reds at 90+ points”.
Equally impressed with the 2016 vintage, James Suckling awarded it 95/100 points in his annual “Review of Italian Wines”.

The grapes of Sangiovese, Merlot and Cabernet Sauvignon are harvested by hand at the peak of phenolic maturation, each variety being treated individually up to the final blend. Following gentle fermentation management, the wine undergoes élevage in stainless steel and cement for at least 10 months, until it is ready to be blended and bottled.

name: Agricola Querciabella  Chianti Classico DOCG
desc_en_short:
The centerpiece of Querciabella’s winemaking operations since the winery’s debut, Querciabella Chianti Classico has consistently ranked at the highest levels of critical acclaim while delighting wine enthusiasts the world over.

Querciabella’s Chianti Classico represents the pinnacle of high-altitude, perfectly exposed Sangiovese fruit. A beautiful balancing act of crisp, inviting acidity, pure varietal fruit flavour and character deriving from sourcing the grapes from top sites in three of the denomination’s best sub-zones. A wine and food lovers’ delight.

Grapes are carefully selected in the vineyards, and harvested by hand into 8 kilo crates. They are destemmed, never crushed, then conveyed into temperature-controlled stainless steel vats, where alcoholic fermentation and maceration take place. Maceration lasts about 12 days. After completing full malolactic fermentation, the wine is transferred into barriques and tonneaux. The oak is 100% French (5% new; remainder consists of second and third-fill barrels). The wine is regularly racked and tasted during the entire maturation period, which may last up to 14 months.

At the end of the élevage, the best lots are selected through extensive tasting and assembled to create the final blend. After bottling, the wine rests for at least three months before release.

No animal products or byproducts are used in the production of this wine, making it suitable for vegans and vegetarians.

name: Chateau Beauregard  Pomerol 2019
desc_en_short: Today, the wine is characterized by an intensely fruity bouquet, with blackcurrant and raspberry stand out particularly. Spicy mix with very elegant touches of undergrowth, the aromas on the palate is growing in harmony with silky tannins and balanced. The final finesse and length portends a future for this year, in the order of 8-15 years.

name: Chateau Gazin  Pomerol 2018
desc_en_short: Deep garnet-purple in color, the 2018 Gazin (a blend of 93% Merlot and 7% Cabernet Franc) leaps from the glass with vibrant notes of warm plums, black raspberries and kirsch, plus suggestions of wild mushrooms, fragrant earth, Sichuan pepper and tree bark. The medium to full-bodied palate delivers impressive energy with approachable, rounded tannin's and a lively backbone framing the crunchy red and black fruits, finishing long and earthy. Rating : 93+

name: Joseph Drouhin  Fleurie
wine_color: a very pretty garnet coloured robe
desc_en_short: "Fleurie is certainly worthy of its name! It possesses great charm and delicacy, with its luminous raspberry color, aromas of lilac, violet and gooseberry. Very supple and silky in the mouth. Leaves a beautiful impression of fine aromas. It is the most delicate of the Beaujolais Crus".

name: Joseph Drouhin  Cotes De Beaune Villages
desc_en_short: "This wine is both simple and elegant. A nice purple colour. Delicate red fruit aromas on the nose. This is a great example of what the Pinot Noir grape can produce on the Burgundian terroir".

name: Joseph Drouhin  Santenay
desc_en_short: "A real "terroir" wine. A deep ruby color and an intense nose of wild fruit : blackberry, blueberry, cranberry. Often tannic in its youth. Long and persistent on the palate, with flavours reminiscent of grenadine syrup or pomegranate".

name: Nederburg  Winemaster's Reserve Pinotage
desc_en_short: A full mouthfeel with rich fruit flavours, soft tannins and a lingering aftertaste. Excellent served with pasta, pizza, roast leg of lamb, bobotie and even chocolate.

name: Domaines Barons de Rothschild (Lafite)  Aussieres  Rouge
wine_color: Beautiful strong red colour lightly tinged with blue
desc_en_short: Château d'Aussières Rouge is a bold southern-French blend from Domaines Barons de Rothschild (Lafite), marrying the structure of Cabernet Sauvignon with the Mediterranean warmth of Syrah — delivering ripe red fruit, elegant tannins, and a long, harmonious finish from the sun-drenched Languedoc.

name: E.Guigal  Cote-Rotie Chateau D' Ampuis
wine_color: Deep dark colour with mauve tints.
desc_en_short: Deep dark color with mauve tints. Spices, black fruits and delicate oak aromas. A dense, expressive and intense nose. A tannic and racy wine. Aromas of prunes, blackberry and vanilla. Powerful, concentrated and structured palate. A wine from a tannic and muscular vintage due to the hot climate. Solid tannins, well rounded by long oak aging.

name: Chateau Jalousie  Bordeaux Superieur AOC
desc_en_short: Black pepper and generic red and black fruits with a hint of orange peel which is a nice touch. It has some aging potential. Very supple wine with a good body and a lot of fruit. Food matching with seafood with hard chesse and grilled meat.

name: Castello Colle Massari  Rigoleto Montecucco DOC
desc_en_short: An affable organic red wine from Tuscany, with a young energy. Light in the body, with hints of soft but thick and fleshy berries. Distinguishing notes of pepper, black cherry, and thyme. It is a firm and very balanced wine. Once poured, it reveals all its fruity and seductive character. It is produced from Sangiovese, Ciliegiolo and Montepulciano and it expresses a fragrant fruity bouquet and a smooth, fresh and pleasantly tannic taste.

name: St. Hallett  Blackwell Shiraz
desc_en_short: This is the full bodied, flavour packed Shiraz which made Barossa famous. Named after Senior Winemaker Stuart Blackwell, it’s full of dark fruits with brooding intensity. Each parcel of Shiraz is individually matched to one of a selection of American oak barrels in which the wine spends two years maturing and gaining considerable texture and power prior to release.

name: Marques de Caceres  Reserva
desc_en_short: Dark, ruby red colour. Dense bouquet combining toasted notes, tobacco and a hint of spice. Good structure with nice complexity in the mouth with a touch of roasted coffee, chocolate and sweet spice. Perfect with fish dishes such as fresh tuna in spicy tomato sauce, refined delicatessen products, beef, foie gras, duck, and mature cheese.

name: Chateau Latour  A Pomerol 2018
desc_en_short:
This charming château, embellished by a small tower, is located close to the church in the village of Pomerol. Acquired in 1917 by Mrs. Loubat, the then famous proprietor of PETRUS, the vineyard was owned by her niece, Mrs. Lacoste, for 40 years before she donated it to the Fondation de Foyers de Charité de Châteauneuf de Galaure in 2002.

The vineyard, with an average age of 35 years, is characterised by its soil diversity: rather loamy soil around the château itself and more gravelly and clayey on the best blocks near the church.

Farming the property since 1962, Ets. Jean-Pierre MOUEIX brings the usual care and expertise to the vineyard - entirely replanted after the 1956 frost - and to the cellar. After a gentle fermentation in concrete tanks, the young wine is aged in 33% new oak barrels.

name: Feudi Del Pisciotto  Versace Nero d'Avola
desc_en_short: Intense fruit notes of blueberries, plum and chocolate with well developed tannins balanced by fresh acidity. Serve with pasta dishes, pizza, red meat dishes and BBQ.

name: Castello Di Bolgheri  Varvara DOC
grape_variety: Cabernet Sauvignon, Cabernet Franc, Merlot, Syrah, Petit Verdot
desc_en_short: Varvàra is obtained by means of an excellently crafted coupage: Cabernet Sauvignon, Cabernet Franc, Merlot, Syrah and Petit Verdot. Each variety makes its own essential contribution to the overall blend and, after 10 months in barrel, the result is a balanced, fruity and concentrated wine, and very easily drinkable it is too.

name: Marchesi Di Barolo  Barbera d'Alba Peiragal DOC (Single Vineyard)
desc_en_short: A purplish ruby red color with a fresh, live, with clean scents of black currants, berries, toasted hazelnut and vanilla. Enjoyable the boisé note. Warm and sturdy, lively, full-bodied, pleasant and harmonious.

name: Feudi Del Pisciotto  Missoni Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Dark chocolate, plum, cassis and cedar blend amongst the tannic earthy tones of the full bodied longing lasting palate. Serve with meat courses, hearty pasta dishes and mature cheeses.

name: Castello Di Bolgheri  Bolgheri Superiore DOC
desc_en_short: Castello di Bolgheri is a selection of the best grape material to be found around the castle. We take care on every details during the process : from the vines with a small yield and the search of the perfect timing between each moment until the harvest, when tannin is mature and acidity present with an aroma of a fruit integral and crispy.

name: Bottega  Amarone della Valpolicella DOC
wine_color: Intense ruby red with purplish highlights.
desc_en_short:
Intense ruby red with garnet tinges. Clear, characteristic scent of raisins with hints of sour cherry, marasca cherry and marmalade
Dry, warm, velvety, intense and full-bodied, with spicy notes and light tobacco scents. Serve in a balloon glass at a temperature of 16–18°C. Pairs particularly well with roast red meat, grilled meat, game, hard cheese and cured meat.

name: Cloudy Bay  Pinot Noir
desc_en_short:
Vineyard Notes

Grapes for this wine were sourced from carefully selected sites located within the southern Wairau Valley including our Mustang and Barracks vineyards. The soils have a clay base with aged alluvial gravels that provide good drainage. This soil structure allows a relatively consistent availability of water to the vines through the summer months, minimising water stress to the pinot noir vines. Our vines are all pruned and trained to a two-cane, vertically shoot positioned canopy with an average yield of 5 tonnes/hectare.

Winemaker Notes

A warm spring emerged from an unusually wet winter, providing the perfect conditions for rapid spring growth. Warm conditions continued and flowering occurred a week earlier than average in late November. Rainfall in November and December allowed for a high level of fruit set and strong bunch growth through January. These ideal conditions lead to heavy crops and therefore vineyards were ruthlessly thinned in late January to maximise fruit quality and advance ripening.

name: Marchesi Di Barolo  Barolo Sarmassa DOCG (Single Vineyard)
desc_en_short: The colour is a vivid garnet red. The aroma is intense, with clear scents of dog rose, vanilla, liquorice and spices, and a vague hint of pine resin and tobacco. Full and elegant taste, good body, prominent tannins. Pleasant spicy and woody notes that merge perfectly together.

name: Cordero Di Montezemolo  Barolo Enrico VI DOCG (Single Vineyard)
desc_en_short:
A Barolo of high standing, both austere
and complex. Deep red garnet in color.
Delicately spiced bouquet (notes of
eucalyptus, licorice and menthol, mature
fruit (liqueur soaked cherries, blackberries
and prunes) and hints of violets and
medicinal herbs. Powerful on the palate,
lightly acidic and fresh. Lasting finish.

name: Caldora  Yume Montepulciano D'Abruzzo DOC
desc_en_short: A wine Made from Montepulciano 100%, Made from old vines across the specially selected sites amongst the 1200 hectares that belong to this co-operative. Red ruby with garnet highlights. Intense and persistent, a spicy aroma with hints of chocolate and tar but never to dominate over its copious fruit. Good structure, good tannins and well-balanced. Best served with: good with rich main courses, typ- ical Abruzzo’s salami and with roasted and stewed meat.

name: Echeverria  Reserva Carmenere
wine_color: Red violet colour with intense purple gleams.
desc_en_short:
Red violet colour with intense purple gleams. Complex on the nose, this Carmenère combines intense aromas of raspberries and cherry confiture with ripe red bell peppers and hints of black pepper. Smooth and velvety, it is a well balanced wine with a long and pleasant finish.

Sustainable Winery

ISO 9001-HACCP

name: Echeverria  Gran Reserva Merlot
desc_en_short: Purple red with garnet hues. Intense aromas of red fruits like sweet plums are combined with notes of chocolate and vanilla, due to its aging for 12 months in oak barrels. A smooth and velvety mouthful, balanced with a long tasty finish.

name: Bartolo Mascarello  Dolcetto D’Alba DOC
desc_en_short: This is lovely, soulful and pure on the nose, with a sweet perfume: musky and fragrant, floral style. The acidity is very assertive and sheets are stacked vertically, with blue fruits and cherry pips, juicy and ethereal.

name: Casanova di Neri  Brunello di Montalcino DOCG
desc_en_short: Brunello di Montalcino Casanova di Neri is characterized simply by its white label, to the point where it has now been renamed "White Label" on the American market. This "Etichetta bianca" is born in vineyards that look to Montalcino from the east, at an altitude which varies from 350 to 480 metres above sea level, very close to the cellar. The main characteristics of this wine are elegance, finesse, and longevity. It matures in large, used barrels for about 42-45 months and perfectly represents the estate's desire to express a product distinguished by character and tradition.

name: Casanova di Neri  Rosso di Montalcino DOC
desc_en_short: Ruby red with garnet reflections, hints of maraschino cherry, violets and red fruits. Great fineness in the mouth with tannin that is still young but of excellent quality. Long lasting, elegant and persistent. Serve at a temperature of 16°- 17° having opened he bottle a few hours previously. Paring with Tuscan cold cuts, pasta with meat sauce, grilled red meats, stews and braised meatss.

name: Corte Rugolin  Amarone Valpolicella Classico "Crosara de le Strie" DOC
desc_en_short: Made from a selection of the best native grapes, which are processed following the 'appassimento' method for three months, in line with an age-old tradition in Valpolicella. It is garnet-red in colour, with a full, dry, velvety taste, and intense aromas of cherries macerated in alcohol, wild berries and spices. Uncork a few hours before drinking and serve at 18-20°C.

name: Massolino  Dolcetto D’Alba DOC
wine_color: Bright ruby red with deep purplish hues.
desc_en_short: Expansive and warm entry, opening into a multitude of flavours traceable to a rich and concentrated wine. Naturally dominant fruit and vinous character leaving behind a lingering and pleasant aftertaste. In keeping with Langa tradition this wine is ideal with all courses of a meal. It is also perfect for snacks featuring cured meats and cheeses, or at the beginning of a meal, served with starters (other than fish) and sliced meats. Pasta, rice, soup and red meats, particularly when grilled, enhance its good body and pleasantly drinkable quality.

name: Podere Sapaio  Sapaio Toscana Rosso DOCG
grape_variety: Cabernet Sauvignon, Cabernet Franc, Petit Verdot
desc_en_short: Cassis, cedar and mocha aromas form the nose on this blend of organically farmed Cabernet Sauvignon, Cabernet Franc and Petit Verdot. The concentrated palate delivers ripe black currant, licorice and black pepper alongside firm, close-grained tannins.

name: Altivo  Vineyard Selection Malbec
desc_en_short: Bright red-ruby. Dark currant, mocha, menthol and spicy oak on the nose. Rather suave and restrained, with distinctly cool flavors of briary dark raspberry, currant, licorice and menthol framed by firm acidity. Finishes with dusty tannins.

name: Altivo  Secret Malbec
desc_en_short: Bright red-ruby. Dark currant, mocha, menthol and spicy oak on the nose. Rather suave and restrained, with distinctly cool flavors of briary dark raspberry, currant, licorice and menthol framed by firm acidity. Finishes with dusty tannins.

name: Vina El Principal  Calicanto
desc_en_short: The season was characterized by a cold spring, but slightly higher temperatures than the average of the previous season. Rainfall were 30% lower in relation to the 2012-2013 season and appeared earlier, recording a 50% of the annual precipitation in May, and then move to a winter with low rainfall and moderate temperatures. Finally, the summer was fresh and very similar to the previous year. Clusters and grains were selected and brought into the tanks gravitationally

name: Barton&Guestier  1725 Bordeaux Reserve Rouge
desc_en_short: Cherry red colour. Fine and elegant nose with red berries aromas and nice spicy notes. Well balanced, round on the palate with a long and generous finish.

name: Dourthe  Grands Terroirs  Bordeaux Superieur
desc_en_short: The Bordeaux Supérieur Grands Terroirs is a supple and rich wine with aromas of ripe red fruits. It offers a distinctive roundness with silky, mellow tannins.

name: Chateau Barrail Laussac Bordeaux
wine_color: Brilliant purple red colour with a good intensity.
desc_en_short: Château Barrail Laussac benefits from Barton & Guestier’s expertise in selecting and making wines. Made with traditional winemaking methods, this wine is typical of its appellation: soft, rich fruity and well-structured with an excellent ageing potential.

name: Barton&Guestier  Medoc
wine_color: Deep red color with violet highlights.
desc_en_short: Deep red color with violet highlights. Intense nose of blackcurrant aromas with vanilla and spicy notes. Good concentration on the palate, with present and well-integrated tannins. Long and delicate oaky finish.

name: Chateau Le Boscq  Cru Bourgeois - AOC Saint-Estèphe
desc_en_short: Intense bouquet, revealing a combination of  ripe fruit aromas of blackcurrant and cherry and elegant notes of coffee, tobacco and cedar, typical of the fine wines of Saint-Estephe. Very full on the palate, with a silky tannic thread running through, underpinned by appealing liveliness. Long and complex finish. A Le Boscq wine of great elegance.

name: Laurent Miquel  Cabernet Syrah
desc_en_short: A very complementary blend of well-structured Cabernet and elegant Syrah. This wine offers a vibrant berry nose, with hints of liquorice and spices. The palate is rich with several layers of flavour including ripe plums and red berries combined with soft rounded tannins. Pairing with roast meats and game, mature cheese or spicy dishes.

name: Danese  Valpolicella DOC
desc_en_short: This ruby-colored wine has aromas that include raspberry and violets. Flavors of cherry and plum lead to a soft velvety finish. This graceful wine is multifaceted. It can be enjoyed by itself but is excellent with appetizers and main courses. The wine pairs with Brie, smoked salmon, roast beef, leg of lamb, duck and grilled swordfish.

name: Coastal Ridge  Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Coastal Ridge Cabernet Sauvignon delivers approachable California charm with forward aromas of black cherry, ripe plum, and blackberry, layered with cedar, anise, vanilla, and warming spice — all leading to a balanced, satisfying finish.

name: Alexander Valley  Vineyards Pinot Noir
desc_en_short: First produced in 1978, our Estate Pinot Noir has classic style with silky texture and a structured finish. The Alexander Valley Vineyards Pinot Noir is elegant with aromas of cherry, slight raspberry, strawberry, vanilla and oak. Flavors of fresh cherry, plum and red-black fruits along with good acidity complete this elegant wine.

name: Alexander Valley  Vineyards 'Cyrus' (Bordeaux Blend)
style: Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, Cabernet Franc, Petit Verdot, Malbec
desc_en_short: Overall, concentration and wonderful flavors of cassis and berries best describes the Alexander Valley Vineyards 'Cyrus' . Aromas of black cherry, plum, spice, oak, mint and vanilla fill the glass. There is good entry and balance with flavors of dark fruits - black cherry, black plum, cassis, cocoa, eucalyptus, dark chocolate, vanilla and a touch of nutmeg. This rich wine has big structure and a long finish.

name: Bogle  Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: A classic example of the varietal, Bogle's Cabernet is crafted with notes of tea and tobacco leaf on the nose. Plump, red cherries and black currants round out the mid palate, with supple earth tones balancing the fruit. Spicy American oak offers clove and pipe tobacco on the finish, with chalky tannins and a sturdy and satisfying structure. This wine is enjoyable now, but can be cellared for 6-9 years.

name: Cakebread  Cabernet Sauvignon
style: Cabernet Sauvignon, 4% Merlot, 6% Cabernet Franc, 3% Petit Verdot
desc_en_short: Cakebread Cellars' Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon is a masterclass in multi-microclimate blending — rich black fruit and sturdy structure from the valley's warmer north marry bright acidity from the cooler south, rounded by Merlot, Cabernet Franc, and Petit Verdot into a boldly layered Napa classic.

name: Calera  'Central Coast' Pinot Noir
desc_en_short: Calera's Central Coast Pinot Noir is a beautifully expressive California red, layering rose petal florals, sweet cherry, and sappy herbs over a supple, spice-laced frame with the fine tannin structure that has long defined this pioneering producer's signature style.

name: Belle Glos "Clark & Telephone Vineyard" Pinot Noir
desc_en_short: The color is a rich scarlet-red, with opulent aromas of blackberry, black cherry, cinnamon, nutmeg and a hint of caramel. The palate comes alive with flavors of ripe raspberries, strawberry jam, a dense blackberry core, warm gingerbread, and a hint of toffee. It is perfectly balanced with refreshing acidity, plush weight on the mid-palate and a wonderfully supple texture.

name: Caymus  'Special Selection' Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: A truly legendary wine, Caymus Special Selection is a wine that Cab lovers simply can't get enough of. Introduced more than 30 years ago, Special Selection is a vivid expression of Cabernet Sauvignon from the Napa Valley. Starting with the foundation of their Rutherford estate vineyard and then securing contracts for long-term farming control of vineyards across the valley, Caymus has been able to solidify the extraordinary character and over-the-top quality of this very special wine vintage after vintage.

name: Duckhorn  Decoy Red Blend
style: Cabernet Sauvignon, 37% Merlot, 6% Petite Sirah, 2% Zinfandel, 2% Carignan, 1% Syrah
desc_en_short: With alluring layers of blueberry, blackberry and wild strawberry, as well as hints of anise and vanilla, this impeccably balanced wine offers silky tannins and rich, mouth-filling flavors. The finish is lush, elegant and energetic, highlighting the best of Sonoma County.

name: Duckhorn  Napa Valley 'Three Palms Vineyard' Merlot
style: Merlot, 7% Cabernet Sauvignon, 1.5% Petit Verdot, .5% Cabernet Franc
desc_en_short: 92 points in Wine & Spirits - "The three palms at this vineyard line the valley floor at a seam of rocks between St. Helena and Calistoga. That rocky soil has proven to be a great medium for the roots of merlot vines, allowing them to ripen cool fruit in the midst of a hot place. This 2017 is luscious, layering high tones of strawberries with darker depths of black cherries and herbs. Its richness would be delicious with rare filet mignon."

name: Far Niente  Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Far Niente Cabernet Sauvignon offers aromas of tobacco leaf, dark cherry, and a whisper of floral perfume. A silky entry leads to a juicy mid palate of red fruit and earth. Fine tannins carry a light briar note, lingering on an elegant finish

name: Francis Coppola  'Diamond Collection' Claret
style: Cabernet Sauvignon, Petit Verdot, Merlot, Cabernet Franc
desc_en_short: Francis Coppola Diamond Collection Claret was Purple and magenta,  This wine is aroma cherries, blackberries, anise and toasted oak. On the Palate Cassis, raspberries, plums and dark chocolate and develop deeply concentrated fruit with complex aromatics, excellent body, and supple tannins.

name: Francis Coppola  'Diamond Collection' Merlot
desc_en_short: Francis Coppola Diamond Collection Merlot is Appearance Purple garnet,  Aromas Plums, wild berries, cocoa and cinnamon, This wine is Flavors Cherries, currants, blueberries and crème brulee.

name: Francis Coppola  'Diamond Collection' Zinfandel
desc_en_short: Francis Coppola Diamond Collection Zinfandel This wine is Appearance Purple magenta and Aromas Wild berries, cherries and allspice, Flavors Strawberries, blackberries, plums, oak and pepper. Food pairing Beef, Lamb and Goat cheese

name: Francis Coppola  'Diamond Collection' Pinot Noir
desc_en_short: Francis Coppola Diamond Collection Pinot Noir This wine is Magenta in color. Aromas of plum, cherries, rose petals and cloves. It's not only fragrant, but also luscious on the palate with a long, intense finish. Flavors of raspberries, strawberries and vanilla toasted oak. as a nice pairing for Pasta dish with chicken and tomato sauce.

name: Grgich Hills  Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Our Cabernet is rich with aromas of balsamic glazed figs, dried rose petals and a touch of green peppercorns. Smooth and rich on the palate with a persistent finish, this wine is the perfect partner with grilled steak, rack of lamb or roasted duck.

name: Honig  Bartolucci Vineyard Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Blackberry red cherry color , enticing aromas of plum, cherry and wild berry are silky in texture, Flavor Chai spices framed by vanilla and toasty oak. Round, silky mid-palate, rich cocoa powder and black tea textures on the finish.

name: Barton&Guestier  Reserve Cabernet Sauvignon
wine_color: Deep garnet red with purple highlights.
desc_en_short: Deep garnet red with purple highlights. Good intensity, mixing ripe black fruits (blackcurrant, blackberry) with flattering toasty and spicy notes when agitated. Round and smooth on the palate with velvety tannins. Long fruity aftertaste with notes of vanilla and licorice.

name: Bogle  Pinot Noir
desc_en_short: Heady scents of ripe summer strawberries make a lovely first impression, while hints of crushed violets and sweet dried herbs resonate on the nose.  Refined and nuanced, the mouthfeel softens as layers of cherry fruit are wrapped in a comforting blanket of pipe tobacco and worn leather.   The firm, yet lingering finish is perfectly balanced with touches of baking spices, fragrant fruit and earth tones.

name: McManis  Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: A classic California Cabernet Sauvignon from McManis Family Vineyards, delivering juicy blackberry, black cherry, and black currant flavors with a hint of mocha and smoke, rounded off by creamy, approachable tannins that make it an easy weeknight favourite.

name: Pine Ridge  Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon
style: Cabernet Sauvignon, Malbec, Petit Verdot, Merlot Cabernet Franc
desc_en_short: A dense ruby hue hints at the extracting of this young, intense wine. Rich aromas of black cherry, blueberry and blackberry syrup are followed by hints of toasted pecan, cocoa and crème de cassis. The palate is well-structured with firm tannins enveloped by flavors of dark berry and cherry fruit, cigar box, milk chocolate and cinnamon spice.

name: Shafer  One Point Five Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Shafer One Point Five is a benchmark Stags Leap District Cabernet Sauvignon delivering lush black and red fruits, silky tannins, and layers of sage, tobacco, and dark spice — polished enough to enjoy now, yet built for rewarding cellaring.

name: Shafer  'Relentless' Syrah
desc_en_short: 95 points in Wine Advocate.The 2014 Relentless, made up of 89% Syrah and 11% Petite Sirah, is deep garnet-purple with a pronounced nose of black plums, blackberries and black cherries with touches of fragrant earth, black pepper and Indian spices plus a waft of lavender. Very big, full-bodied, opulent and laden with vibrant black fruits and spicy layers, it has firm, rounded tannins and seamless freshness, finishing long and peppery. 95+ points. (LPB)

name: Spottswoode  Lyndenhurst Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short:
95 points in Wine Enthusiast 

This classic-style, elegant wine is well structured for further aging and so expressive of the Napa Cabernet tradition. Aromas of blackberries, black olives and bay leaves lead to black cherries, dark chocolate and tobacco flavors that are deep and persistent without being heavy.

name: Domaines Barons de Rothschild (Lafite)  Legende Medoc
desc_en_short: Légende Médoc from Domaines Barons de Rothschild (Lafite) brings Grand Vin discipline to an approachable Bordeaux blend, combining Cabernet Sauvignon and Merlot for a ruby-coloured wine of genuine elegance, ripe fruit purity, and well-rounded structure that punches well above its price.

name: Dominus Estate 2017
style: Cabernet Sauvignon, 7% Cabernet Franc, 5% Petit Verdot
desc_en_short: The historic Napanook Vineyard, a 124-acre site west of Yountville, was planted in 1838. This vineyard was the source of fruit for some of the finest Napa Valley wines. Estate-bottled in the spirit of the Bordeaux châteaux, Dominus Estate is dry-farmed to allow natural stress and good concentration of fruit.
