Grape clusters are crop-thinned to allow sun and air to pass in between, helping to achieve full maturation and soften the tannins. Only 20% to 40% new French oak barrels are used in order to limit the extraction of oak notes. To express the unique terroir, the classic Bordeaux grape varietals of Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, Cabernet Franc and Petit Verdot are planted with different root stocks best suited for the varying soil composition of gravel, heavy clay and loam.

name: Peter Michael  L'Esprit des Pavots 2019
wine_color: Deep black with a ruby hue.
desc_en_short: Generously rich and intense, 2019 L’Esprit des Pavots greets the eye with a near black color and highlights of crimson ruby. The wine displays blueberry, blackberry, black cherry, hallmarks of the Les Pavots terroir, along with plum, and hints of mocha and vanilla bean. The Au Paradis terroir brings notes of currant and crème de cassis with meaty nuances. The palate is full-bodied and concentrated, exhibiting savory of leather, tobacco and white pepper and accents of chestnut, black truffle, cedar and supple tannins with a lingering finish. Fruit forward and enjoyable at release.

name: Peter Michael  Les Pavots 2009
wine_color: Deep black with a ruby hue.
style: Cabernet Sauvignon, 22% Cabernet Franc, 10% Merlot And 2% Petit Verdot.
grape_variety: Cabernet Sauvignon, Cabernet Franc, Merlot, Petit Verdot
desc_en_short: Peter Michael Les Pavots is the flagship Bordeaux-style blend from the Knights Valley Estate in Sonoma County — a structured, elegantly herbaceous red woven with Cabernet Sauvignon, Cabernet Franc, Merlot, and Petit Verdot, carrying the wild spirit of California poppies in every glass.

name: Peter Michael  Pinot Noir Le Caprice
wine_color: Deep ruby color and bright crimson tinge.
desc_en_short: 96 points in Wine Advocate -"This label comes from Fort Ross-Seaview AVA, planted at 1,000-1,400 feet elevation to a “suitcase” clone on a soil type of clay with basalt rocks. Medium ruby-purple in color, the 2017 Pinot Noir le Caprice comes roaring out of the glass with pronounced redcurrants, warm cranberries and black cherries scents plus hints of violets, rhubarb and star anise with wafts of red roses, black tea and wild sage. Medium-bodied, the palate has a fantastic structure of firm, finely grained tannins with bold freshness supporting the incredibly energetic and expressive red berries and black cherries layers, finishing long and perfumed. Impressive! 1,422 cases were made."

name: Twomey  Pinot Noir Anderson Valley
desc_en_short:
A beautiful, complex expression of the
region, highlighting the pretty aromatics of wild red berries, flowers and spice. On the palate,
this wine has the firm and fine structure we love from the region, showing the density and
body of the warm season with a mouth coating, long finish and persistence on the palate.

name: Fermoy Estate  Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Rich and full mid-palate of dark mulberry and blackberry fruits precedes a focused and concentrated back palate of savoury herbal notes, cigar box spice and rich dark chocolate.

name: Fermoy Estate  Shiraz
desc_en_short: Redcurrant and black cherry fruits on the front palate precede a creamy vanilla mid-palate and subtle white pepper and aniseed spice on the finish. Soft, chewable tannins are supported by a fresh, redcurrant acid line to ensure a clean, long finish.

name: Montgras  Merlot
desc_en_short: Deep ruby purple, it has a core of ripe currants and spice surrounded by touches of vanilla and cedar on the nose. On the palate, you feel a wave of ripe currants and black cherries, with a touch of spice. Medium bodied, with juicy, sweet ripe tannins that are perfectly integrated with the subtle notes of cedar and vanilla from the oak contact. It’s a good match for fatty fish like salmon or sea bass, pork dishes and sweet breads.

name: Montgras  Ninquen
desc_en_short: Deep ruby red in colour, it has aromas of ripe blackberry, blackcurrant with a touch of graphite and tobacco. Elegant and silky, with tasty, vibrant fruit. It has very good texture, mature tannins and a nice cedar frame given by the oak ageing.

name: Chateau Haut Bailly  Grand Cru Classe 2016
wine_color: Medium to deep garnet-purple in color.
brand: Chateau Haut Bailly  Grand Cru Classe
desc_en_short: "Château Haut-Bailly always seems to show a little more muscle and sheer fruity strength than the majority of its same-appellation mates, and, while it does once again in 2016, it shows a certain sense of reserve and leaves the indelible impression that it is far from revealing all that it has. It is solidly built stuff with the tannic grip of a claret that, in no uncertain terms, begs for age, and we would not be surprised if it has yet to fully open up even as it approaches its tenth birthday." - Connoisseurs' Guide

name: Chateau Haut Bergey  Pessac Leognan
desc_en_short: "The 2015 Haut Bergey has a sweet, very opulent bouquet with crème de cassis and boysenberry jam aromas, quite precocious but disguising the terroir. The palate is difficult - hard and slightly bitter on the entry with tough tannin (unusually for this vintage), and a slightly disjointed finish. This needs to improve by the time it is in bottle."

name: Domaine de Chevalier  Pessac-Leognan 2020
wine_color: Deep dark red color in appearance, with a shiny black shimmer in the center.
style: Cabernet Sauvignon, 27% Merlot, 5% Petit Verdot, And 3% Cabernet Franc
desc_en_short: The Domaine de Chevalier located in Léognan, the Capital town of the Graves Region has a long history. It appears on the famous map of Pierre de Belleyme in 1783. In 1983 the estate was purchased by the Bernard Family, N° 1 in France on the spirits market and a major negociant of premium Bordeaux wines. It has been run ever since by Olivier Bernard who perpetuates that spirit of balance and the constant drive for perfection which have been the hallmark of this outstanding wine. The red Domaine de Chevalier, the flagship of the Pessac-Léognan appellation belongs to the elite of the great classified growths of Bordeaux. The white Domaine de Chevalier is recognized as one of the world’s finest dry wines.

name: Chateau Certan De May  Pomerol 2014
desc_en_short: 95 points in James Suckling - "So much blackberry, stone, dried-mushroom and wet-earth character on then nose. Yet it’s a wine that remains clear and focused. Medium-to full-bodied, linear and tannic. A serious wine. Best in years from here. Better in 2022."

name: Main Divide by Pegasus Bay  Pinot Noir
desc_en_short: Main Divide Pinot Noir from Pegasus Bay brings classic Burgundian craft to Marlborough, delivering bright ruby fruit — blackberry, raspberry, and dark cherry — layered with grilled mushroom, wood smoke, and a refined finish of spice, dark chocolate, and coffee.

name: Felton Road  Pinot Noir Calvert
desc_en_short: The wine leads with the characteristic Calvert restrained nose that is pure and tight. The palate is similarly focussed with great detail and a tight core of vivid red fruits. It delivers a sort of essence of pinosity that leaves no doubt about the wine’s origin. There is a crunch to the texture of the wine as the structure lifts its head, but the tannins are never harsh, simply stating that they are there for the long haul. The wine finishes with the accuracy and finesse that is becoming the hallmark of Calvert.

name: Felton Road  Pinot Noir Block 5
desc_en_short: The deeply fragrant nose offers sweet florals, cane fruits and exotic perfume. Signature lavender aromatics are at once bright and restrained in this vintage. Broad ranging red fruits and vibrant sandalwood are presented over a crystalline structure and elegant framework. Mocha undertones lend intriguing hints of noble power with soft and feathery tannins offering persistence and poised balletic precision.

name: Greywacke  Pinot Noir
desc_en_short: Imagine a black forest gateaux made with marinated black cherries and very ripe blackberries, served with a little creamy vanilla custard. A highly perfumed style of Marlborough pinot featuring exotic fruit sweetness, a cedar-like spiciness and a delicate smoky scent reminiscent of lapsang souchong. The palate is dense and generous with ripe cherry-plum richness, some soft licorice and clove and a fine but voluptuous tannin structure.

name: Russian Jack  Pinot Noir
desc_en_short: This Pinot Noir offers aromas and flavours of wild strawberry, red cherry and herb. This is a wine that should be enjoyed in its youth, ideally with friends and acquaintances or any place where you just want to have fun, relax and enjoy the better things in life.

name: Tenuta dell'Ornellaia  Le Serre Nuove dell’Ornellaia
wine_color: Deep ruby red colour, with purple highlights.
desc_en_short: Deep ruby red colour, with purple highlights, Le Serre Nuove dell'Ornellaia 2020 clearly reveals an evident and generous aromatic expression, characterised by scents of ripe red fruit. The wine is smooth, rounded and enveloping, but full-bodied and substantial at the same time, showing great balance between structure, fullness and elegance.

name: Cornerstone  Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Clean and elegant aromas of plums and blackberries on the nose. Structured with hints of red fruits on the palate and a well-balanced finish.

name: Casa Silva  Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Intense aroma with notes of red fruits such as plums and cherries which are harmoniously balanced with hints of oak and chocolate

name: Casa Silva  Merlot
desc_en_short: Beautiful ruby colour. Lively fruit aromas with notes of plum. On the palate, Good body, fresh with nice, firm tannins.

name: Brotte  Grand Vallon Vin De France
desc_en_short: Syrah - Merlot.Intense ruby color with purple hints Very nice bouquet, cherry, raspberry and blackcurrant notes With a hint of vanilla Fresh mouth, full-bodies Syrah with delicate tannins and finish

name: Brotte  La Fiole Chateauneuf Du Pape
wine_color: Deep and bright ruby red color.
desc_en_short:
This wine, dear to our heart, under Père Anselme signature, was created in 1952 by Charles Brotte with the co-operation of local Provençale glass and ceramic craftsmen. The original and surprising bottle shape represents the gnarled and twisted vines typical of the region due to their struggle of growing against the Mistral wind. La Fiole, “Phiala” in latin refers to a “precious bottle”. The bottle is exclusive as we are the only winery permitted to use this shape. “Pape” evokes the cru of Châteauneuf-du-Pape as well as the presence of the Popes in the region and village in the Middle Ages. The bottle’s golden anthracite grey powder recalls wines of former times.

The wine is unique and of constant quality. A majority of Grenache, an important share of Reserve Wines – 30 to 40% (some of which are 5 years old) give it fruitiness, freshness and maturity, intensity and smoothness. The wine can be savoured immediately or be kept 5 to 7 years.

La Fiole du Pape is the best selling Châteauneuf-du-Pape in the world.

name: Monsoon Valley  Cuvee de Siam Rouge
desc_en_short:
Made from the vineyards oldest and best vines, Monsoon Valley Cuvée de Siam Rouge is a rich red wine blended from Shiraz and Sangiovese grapes and aged in French oak barrels and bottled unfiltered.

A deep red wine with medium tannin levels and rich aromas of blackberry, Amarena cherry, coffee, pepper and chocolate, Monsoon Valley Cuvée de Siam Rouge resembles a great Northern Rhone Valley red and pairs well with meats, stews, grilled racks of lamb or traditional Italian meat dishes like bistecca Fiorentina and ossobucco.

name: Chateau Cheval Blanc 1er Grand Cru Classe A 2008
brand: Chateau Cheval Blanc 1er Grand Cru Classe A
desc_en_short: At one time I thought the 1986 was better than the 1985, but the open-knit charm and currant exotic personality fo the 1985 makes a more persuasive case for it than for the more reserved, tannic, and backward 1986. The 1986 still has a youthful dark ruby saturated color with no amber at the edge. The wine possesses a developing bouquet that offers up weedy tobacco, juxtaposed with sweet black berry, raspberry, and cherry fruit. The new oak that was so obvious in the wine's youth has moved to the background, offering more of a cedary character than raw wood. Medium to full-bodied, and moderately tannic, this is a delineated Cheval Blanc with more of a Medoc personality than typical St.-Emilion opulence. The wine is rich, intense, and well-made, but still requiring a few more years of bottle age.

name: “MLV” Masseria Li Veli Salento IGT
desc_en_short:
Deep ruby red, complex, rich bouquet, 
complemented by sweet, dense 
tannins and a lively acidity. On the 
nose it is powerful with scent of 
undergrowth black fruits ending with 
vanilla, spicy aromas of tobacco and 
light balsamic notes. In the mouth it is smooth, 
warm and velvety with a very long finish. All its 
components are in perfect harmony, remarkable
 structure.

name: Chateau Vircoulon  Bordeaux Superieur
wine_color: Deep ruby (รูบี้เข้ม)
desc_en_short: ลองลิ้มรสไวน์ Bordeaux Superieur จาก Chateau Vircoulon ที่มีความซับซ้อน

name: Los Vascos  Le Dix de Los Vascos
desc_en_short:
In commemoration of 10 years of DBR (Lafite)’s work in Chile, the first “grande cuvée” LE DIX was created. Le Dix de Los Vascos originates from 70-year-old vines located in the terroir known as “El Fraile”.

This is a wine of exceptional complexity, balance and elegance, with powerful tannins and aromas of very ripe fruit accentuated by spicy notes of cedar, laurel and eucalyptus.

name: Earthworks  Shiraz (Barossa Valley)
desc_en_short: A generously flavoured Barossa Valley Shiraz delivering rich aromas of boysenberry, blood plum, tar, and vanilla, with dark chocolate undertones on a medium-bodied palate supported by supple, smooth tannins — an approachable everyday red from one of Australia's most celebrated wine regions.

name: Anakena  Birdman Merlot
desc_en_short: Fruit-driven mid bodied wine with chewy blackberry flavours, smooth texture and a pleasing finish.

name: Viu Manent  Single Vineyard Cabernet Sauvignon
wine_color: A bright and deep red color and glints of violet.
desc_en_short:
With a bright and deep red color and glints of violet. The expressive nose shows great complexity, highlighting aromas of ripe red fruit and blue fruit, including sour cherry and blueberry, together with a subtle note of pink pepper. The wine is intense on the palate, with good structure and balance, highlighting firm tannins that add tension and texture to the mouthfeel. Subtle nutty notes on the aftertaste lead to a long, elegant finish.

Awards

- 92 Points Robert Parker's Wine Advocate

- 92 Points James Suckling

name: Viu Manent  Single Vineyard Malbec
desc_en_short:
With a deep-red color, the wine’s nose shows great complexity, highlighting aromas of small black fruits, accompanied by floral and citrus notes such as ripe orange peel. The palate shows a wine with refined silky tannins with great texture that support a finish that is fresh, broad, and persistent.

Awards

- 90 Points Robert Parker's Wine Advocate

- 92 Points James Suckling

name: Viu Manent  Gran Reserva Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Ruby red with a violet hue. The very fresh nose recalls red fruits such as cassis and sour cherries along with notes of evolution, spice, and fine leather. The palate is medium bodied, fresh, and vibrant with very good fluidity leading to a persistent, deep, and pleasing finish.

name: Viu Manent  Gran Reserva Carmenere
desc_en_short: Cherry red in color, with aromas that recall fresh fruits such as plums, blueberries, and blackber- ries, as well as light notes of black pepper and blonde tobacco. The mouth-filling palate presents very good volume, medium structure, and a very flavorful finish.

name: Viu Manent  Rayuela Reserva Cabernet Sauvignon
wine_color: Intense ruby red with a violet hue.
desc_en_short: Intense ruby red with a violet hue. This is a fresh wine with outstanding aromas of fresh red fruits and cassis with a subtle spicy note. The medium-bodied palate is fresh and fruity with good balance and nicely rounded tannins.

name: Viu Manent  Secreto Malbec
desc_en_short: Intense violet color. The nose is very expressive, complex, fresh, and very fruity with aromas that recall plums, sour cherries, and violets, with subtle notes of spices. The palate presents tremendous volume with a structure of tannins that react with saliva, inviting another sip. The finish is long and persistent.

name: Chateau Lassus  Medoc Cru Bourgeois
desc_en_short: Deep colour with garnet highlights. Very aromatic bouquet with touch of blackcurrant and spices. Superb, dense attack with a slightly jammy fruit. The relatively powerful tannic structure shows supple tannins.

name: Chateau Du Corneau  Margaux
style: Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, Petit Verdit, Cabernet Franc

name: Château Les Gravettes  Blaye Cotes De Bordeaux Rouge
desc_en_short: Nice deep purple robe. The nose reveals lightly toasted scents of ripe fruit. The attack is clear and generous, giving way to a harmonious palate with pleasantly oky tannins.

name: Pian delle Vigne By Antinori  Rosso Di Montalcino DOC
food_matching: Pasta, Pizza, Roasted Chicken, Pork, Medium Cheese
desc_en_short: Rosso di Montalcino from Pian delle Vigne is the accessible, earlier-drinking expression from Antinori's Brunello estate — a vibrant, fresh Sangiovese Grosso with morello cherry, earthy minerals, and lively acidity, the ideal introduction to the Montalcino terroir.

name: Napa Cellars  Pinot Noir
desc_en_short: The Napa Cellars Pinot Noir is an elegant wine that delivers beautiful aromas of dried cherries, tart plum, earthy notes, cola and mushroom complemented by hints of graham cracker and cardamom. A soft, velvety, smooth entry leads to abundant flavors of dark berry with vanilla, toasted pie crust notes and a bit of cocoa powder and cinnamon on the finish. This well-structured wine showcases a medium to light body with balanced acidity and fine grained tannins. For a delicious meal, pair this Pinot with garlic and herb roasted pork tenderloin, followed by dark chocolate mousse for dessert.

name: Speri  Valpolicella DOC Classico
wine_color: Ruby red color with violet reflections.
desc_en_short: A young and uninhibited wine which is the lifeblood of the land from which it originates. A magnificent table companion suitable for serving with all kinds of dishes.

name: Delas  Vacqueyras Domain des Genets
desc_en_short: Wine of dark ruby color. Nose powerful enough to exhale the smell of black fruits and licorice. There are also subtle aromas of cooked fruits. This red shows good acidity and is filled with fleshy tannins. The flavors of cherry and moist earth, moist soil and spices also add to the flavor. It reveals a broad mouth that extends into a fairly sustained finish.

name: Chateau Grand Mayne  Filia De Grand Mayne St.Emillion Grand Cru
desc_en_short: This wine from Grand Cru Classé Château Grand Mayne is a true Saint-Emilion, with a seductive, full and soft taste. The wine has improved rapidly due to advisor Michel Rolland, the famous oenologist. The Filia de Grand Mayne matures for about fourteen months in partly new oak barrels and is made of 80% Merlot, 10% Cabernet Franc and 10% Cabernet Sauvignon. Silky, plush, polished, pure and fresh, this finesse driven wine offers good concentration Due to the ripeness of the harvest in this vintage and the refined way of making wine, this beautiful Saint-Emilion is already excellent to drink.

name: Granducato  Chianti Classico
desc_en_short: Intense ruby red colour. Spicy bouquet with red berry fruits. Smooth and rich,never too aggressive. Full bodied with a long and pleasant finish.

name: Tenuta delle Terre Nere  Etna Rosso DOC
desc_en_short:
Made from very fine Nerello Mascalese and Nerello Cappuccio from low yielding vineyards (35 Hl. Per hectar), both young and old.
The grapes are macerated until the end of fermentation. The wine then continues its life in wood until bottled roughly one year after harvest. Even young it is a distinguished wine. Fresh, fragrant, beautifully slender and with a fine grip, it has a natural polish, a stage presence, as it were. And, in aging, as its weave gathers into rich complexity, it is a wine for gentlemen. It is an aristocratically liberal wine: enjoy it with whatever food you wish, as long as its properly cooked.

name: Bibi Graetz  Testamatta Toscana Rosso Igt
desc_en_short: Bibi Graetz Testamatta offers aromas of prune, dried flowers, porcini and cedar lead to a full body, with velvety tannins and lots of ripe fruit and milk chocolate. Long and very soft, yet powerful.

name: Pio Cesare  Barbera D'Alba DOC
desc_en_short: The Barbera grapes coming from the Barolo and the Barbaresco regions gives to our Classic Barbera a peculiar great structure, full body, complexity, smooth character, ripe fruit, spices and a long life.

name: Pio Cesare  Barbaresco il Bricco DOCG
desc_en_short: Big, powerful structure, rich with ripe fruit. Soft and spicy. Sweet and ripe tannins. Long ageing potential. Very few bottles produced every year.

name: Michel Lynch  Prestige St.Emilion
desc_en_short: A beautiful brilliant deep colour with an intense fruity and mentholated nose, smooth and complex on the palate. his fine Saint-Emilion wine is composed mainly of Merlot with a small percentage of Cabernet Franc. Aged partly in oak barrels, it reveals delicate woody notes underlined by silky tannins… Served at 18°C, Michel Lynch Prestige Saint-Emilion is the perfect accompaniment to game and dishes served in sauces or containing mushrooms. It can be kept for a few years in the cellar.

name: Domaine Lafarge-Vial  Fleurie
desc_en_short: This Fleurie reveals admirable scents of red fruits, peony and irises. A sap with gourmet flesh spreads wonderfully in the mouth. We immediately feel an intense pleasure. The finish is persistent and slightly spicy. This Fleurie will taste with gluttony, as an aperitif, with a tray of cold cuts. It can also be perfectly married on a leg of lamb.

name: Domaine Lafarge-Vial  Fleurie "Clos Vernay"
desc_en_short: This Fleurie will offer you immediate pleasure today. We advise you to air the wine before the service so that it expresses itself fully and delivers the range of its aromas. This Fleurie will taste with gluttony, as an aperitif, with a tray of cold cuts. It can also be perfectly married on a leg of lamb.

name: Albert Bichot  Domaine du Pavillon Aloxe-Corton 1er Cru "Clos des Marechaudes" Monopole
desc_en_short: Intense nose revealing scents of red and black fruit (cherry, raspberry, blackberry...) which mingle with elegant notes of mild spices that can evolve towards aromas of tea and cocoa over time. Endowed with soft tannic structure, this fleshy wine features lovely velvety tannins. The finish is long and flavourful, reminiscent of the fruit found on the nose.

name: Chateau Poupille - Cotes de Castillon
desc_en_short: Biodynamic wine Special and also classical wine with a grenade-like color. In the nose what pencil sharps, plums, tobacco and leather. He reminds us of a great Bordeaux and is also made in that style. Very complex and with a very long aftertaste.A wine that certainly deserves a special moment. Drink: now until 10 years

name: Chateau Haut-Cardinal  Saint-Emilion Grand Cru
desc_en_short: Biodynamic wine with vanilla and roasted aroma. In the attack there is abundant fruit, rounded fruitiness and acidity, and configuration amazing sense of balance Tannin is wrapped in a tasty round impression, very comfortable.

name: Domaine Giraud  Chateauneuf du Pape - Tradition
desc_en_short:
93 points Wine Spectator

"A fleshy core of lightly mulled raspberry, plum and red currant fruit flavors cruises through, backed by ample licorice, singed cedar and dried garrigue notes. Finely beaded acidity adds latent energy to the finish. Best from 2021 through 2035."

name: Domaine Giraud  Cotes-du-Rhone "Lirac les Sables d'Arenes" - Rouge
wine_color: A slightly flower reflection Mauve and cistus of the garrigues.
desc_en_short: This wine is made entirely from old Grenache (About 60 years old). A pretty color red with a slightly flower reflection mauve and cistus of the garrigues. The palate is very fineness and smoothness, on flavors of fruits.

name: Jean Paul Daumen  Cotes du Rhone
desc_en_short: Beautiful perfume nose of red berries, strawberry,raspberry, spices and coffee beans. On the palate, lush and tastywith many layers of flavours. Moderate and delicate tannin. Middleto full body with long finish.

name: Silverlake  S Series Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short:
*Made from Australian Grapes and handcrafted in Thailand.

Splendid linger of an oaked – aged and complex Cabernet Sauvignon. Deep garnet in color, the melange of herbal nose and gorgeous dark fruits are complemented by a long and powerful finish.

name: Howard Park  Flint Rock Shiraz
wine_color: Deep and dense garnet in appearance.
desc_en_short: Deep and dense garnet in appearance. Lush plums and black cherry fruit seasoned with pepper, spice, vanilla and mocha greet the nose.  On the palate the wine is dense and redolent of blackberry, plum and cherry, laced with liquorice and cocoa. The mouthfeel and texture of the wine is rich, velvety and supple. Try something different by matching Howard Park's Flint Rock Shiraz with a potato and chorizo omelette!

name: Howard Park  Miamup Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Howard Park's Miamup Cabernet Sauvignon is a benchmark expression from Margaret River — Australia's spiritual home of Cabernet — offering classically perfumed, poised red fruit with fine-grained tannins and the elegant structure that defines the region's greatest wines.

name: Cono Sur  Tocornal Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Deep, impressive ruby-red colour. Governed by pleasant notes of plum, raspberry and sweet spices, while on the palate chocolate and subtle hints of vanilla can be appreciated. A very structured, balanced, long and elegant Cabernet Sauvignon.

name: Cono Sur  Bicicleta Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Cono Sur's Bicicleta Cabernet Sauvignon from Chile's Central Valley delivers ripe plum and raspberry aromas layered with sweet spice, chocolate, and a whisper of vanilla — a structured, crowd-pleasing red with genuine elegance at an everyday price.

name: Cono Sur  Single Vineyard Cabernet Sauvignon
wine_color: A bright and clean Cabernet Sauvignon with an attractive ruby red color displays genuine
desc_en_short: From the storied El Recurso Estate in Maipo Valley, this single-vineyard Cabernet Sauvignon delivers intense aromas of dark berries and plum layered with tobacco and ash, finishing with smooth, well-integrated tannins and remarkable concentration.

name: Cono Sur  Single Vineyard Carmenere
desc_en_short: This deep violet-red Carmenere has good aromatic intensity with notes of blackberries, cherries, plum, licorice, mocha and black pepper. On the palate it is concentrated with smooth, round tannins and good acidity and persistence. Enjoy with barbecued meat, cheeses, pasta,spices and well-seasoned sauces.

name: Buronga Hill Estate  Cabernet sauvignon
desc_en_short: Buronga Hill Estate Cabernet Sauvignon delivers generous aromas of dark cherry and blackberry with warm hints of cinnamon and vanilla, flowing into a full-flavoured palate of ripe fruit and chocolate-tinged oak, finishing long and richly satisfying.

name: Otterbrook Mill  Shiraz
desc_en_short: A combination of the fruit aromas of plum and blackberry with spice, pepper and cinnamon which then follows through onto the palate. This is a well rounded and fruity wine the rich flavours of ripe plum,blackberry jam and spices. This is balanced with vanilla and caramel flavours to result in a wine with good depth and intensity of flavour.

name: Fattoria Le Pupille  Morellino di Scansano DOCG
desc_en_short: Bright red with ruby reflections. The nose, the predominant morello cherry evolves into small red berries notes. The palate of reflects its freshness and persistence tense and silky tannins. Perfect with sauce based first courses, even more elaborated ones and second courses typical of Maremma cuisine. At a 18°C temperature it is very good as an appetizer companion.

name: Black Oak  Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: The Black Oak Cabernet Sauvignon is garnet red in color, refreshing and inviting to the palate. The wine’s aromas are layered with rich plum notes and a warm cedar component.

name: Freemark Abbey  Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: dark ruby color. With great complexity, the wine expresses aromas of fresh boysenberry, blackberry pie, Bing cherry, dark chocolate, chocolate berry truffle dusted with cocoa powder, all integrated with the spicy sweetness of oak, cedar, cinnamon, clove and a hint of black pepper. Thebody is very full with a soft entry, coupled with dark cherry/berry flavors that develop from start to finish. With great texture and mouth feel, this cabernet is full bodied, rich and opulent. In one word... delicious.

name: Freemark Abbey  Napa Valley Merlot
desc_en_short: The dominant flavor of this rich and smooth Merlot is black cherry, with nuances of milk chocolate, integrated spicy oak and arugula. Great balance of fruit, body, tannin and acidity. The depth and richness of flavor provide a smooth profile that delivers from the initial sip and continues on the palate for a long beautiful finish.

name: Opus One  'Overture' Napa Valley Red Wine
Merryvale  Forward Kidd Napa
desc_en_short:
Notes of cherries and plums on the nose with a hint of sage and spices. The
mouth is round with a very balanced sweetness, lush with velvety tannins. The
finish lingers with notes of dark chocolate, barbecue, spice, and ends very round
and broad. The 2015 Forward Kidd Red Wine is a very rich and pleasant wine;
very enjoyable to drink.

name: Aldridge  'Rams Head' Shiraz Cabernet
desc_en_short: Ripened berry fruit, plums with a hint of chocolate aromas on the nose. The palate gives savoury stewed plums and blackcurrant with a slight visit from vanilla.

name: Mollydooker  'The Boxer' Shiraz
desc_en_short: This alluring and unashamedly bold Shiraz has hints of spiced plums, blackberry jam and cherry all at the fore and finishes with coffee cream, licorice and vanilla. Full bodied with vibrant berry fruit characteristics, yet elegant with restrained tannins, resulting in a soft mouthfeel.

name: La Playa  'Estate Series' Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: A rich maroon color. One the nose, ripe strawberry with hints of black pepper. It has great balance between structure and flavor with a light approachable palate.

name: La Playa  'Estate Series' Merlot
desc_en_short: A pleasant garnet color. On the nose, plums, blackberries with hints of toasted oak.  The palate has pronounced blueberry with good balance and a soft finish.

name: Layer Cake  Primitivo (Zinfandel)
desc_en_short: The Layer Cake Primitivo comes right at you with huge inky black fruit, spice and white pepper; layered and rich in the mouth with jammy black cherries, truffles, espresso and dense, creamy texture.

name: Chateau Les Cabannes  St.Emilion Grand Cru AOC
desc_en_short: Chateau Les Cabannes  St.Emilion Grand Cru AOC is Soft and ripe tannins, they offer generous aromas of plum, cherry, roasted coffee and undergrowth.

name: Santi  Amarone Valpolicella Proemi DOCG
desc_en_short: The Proemio is characterized by a ruby ​​red color. The nose opens with an intense and complex bouquet, with hints of cherry and plum, enriched with delicious spicy notes of vanilla and cinnamon. On the palate it is full and generous, with an elegant base of spicy jams of persistently pleasing. The wine presents a great balance and infinite elegance. Perfect with red meat and game, it is ideal in combination with seasoned cheeses

name: Roccolo Grassi  Amarone della Valpolicella
desc_en_short: Roccolo Grassi Amarone is a wine of great structure and softness. Its aim is to feature great balance, finesse and complexity. Here tannins are very sweet but appreciable with good length and depth.

name: Domaine Thibault Liger-Belair  Hautes-Cotes De Nuits "La Roche"
desc_en_short: This soil, which contains a good proportion of limestone, offers wines with a nice freshness. These wines do not require lengthy ageing as the altitude does not necessarily bring great density, but rather aromas of fresh fruits and flowers.

name: Castello Di Ama  San Lorenzo Chianti Classico Gran Selezione DOCG
wine_color: Dark ruby red with crimson hues
desc_en_short: 97 points James Suckling - "Perfumed and beautiful with flowers, cherries and raspberries. Forest fruits, too. Full-bodied with extremely fine tannins that run the length of the wine and are wonderfully integrated, spreading across the palate. Lasts for minutes. Better after 2025, but already fantastic."

name: De Bortoli  DB Family Selection Merlot
desc_en_short: Crimson red with garnet hues with an bouquet of Red Plum, raspberry with background chocolate oak.The palate provides Ripe plum and cherries flavours with lingering chocolate oak and sophisticated, rounding tannins.

name: De Bortoli  Woodfired Shiraz
wine_color: Intense deep red with purple edge.
desc_en_short: Bold, texturally mouth filling red wine that is plump, fruit driven and balanced. Intense deep red with purple edge. Plump, dark fruits, plums, spice and dried herb. Rich, mouth filling, balanced tannin, cured meats, liquorice, authentically Heathcote.

name: St. Hugo  Coonawarra Cabernet Sauvignon (750 ml)
wine_color: Deep purple with a hint of ruby
desc_en_short: St. Hugo Coonawarra Cabernet Sauvignon is the flagship red from one of South Australia's most storied producers, delivering classic cool-climate blackcurrant and eucalyptus mint on a silky, full-bodied palate framed by toasty oak and refined, long-lasting tannins.

name: Brancott Estate  Letter Series "T" Pinot Noir (750 ml)
desc_en_short:
Named in honour of iconic vineyards, Letter Series wines are hand-crafted from grapes of the highest quality.

Wine Score : 92 Points, Jamie Goode - WineAnonak.com (Mar-18)

Award : BLUE GOLD, Sydney International Wine Competition 2018

name: Marchesi Di Barolo  Barbera d'Asti Rure DOCG
desc_en_short: The color is a lively, bright, deep ruby-red. As it ages it will acquire garnet reflections. The nose is fresh and fruity, reminiscent of blackberry and red fruit jam, and it has spicy scents of vanilla and toasted hazelnut. Its taste is full-bodied and robust, with a slight touch of tartness. The woody characteristic is evident, however, it blends nicely with the other traits. A great pairing with savory first courses and white or red meats. It is also an ideal companion for cheese plates and cured meats.

name: Barton&Guestier  Bordeaux Rouge
desc_en_short: Intense and brillant red colour. Expressive nose of small black fruits (blackberry, blueberry) with delicate roasted notes (cocoa). Fruit driven on the palate, supported by present and well-integrated tannins. A long and spicy aftertaste.

name: G7  Gran Reserva Carmenere
wine_color: Deep ruby red color with violet hints.
desc_en_short: Deep ruby red color with violet hints. Intense aromas of cherries and black plums supported by mild toasted and smorky notes. Its velvety tannins and sweet and developed, while its black fruits notes are married with black bitter chocolate and pepper. Unforgettable.

name: G7  Reserva Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Intense red cherry color. Aromas of red fruits with vanilla and coffee notes. In the palate, it has a firm structure, with flavors of blackberries and cassis mixed with delicate toasted notes of its barrel aging. Long and fruity aftertaste.

name: G7  Reserva Carmenere
desc_en_short: Deep red with violet tints. Intense aromas of cherries and black plums accompanied with smoky and spicy notes. Flavors of black fruit, black pepper and bitter chocolate. It is soft and persistent on the palate with delicate and ripe tannins.

name: Eugenio Collavini  Merlot Di Casa IGT
desc_en_short: Merlot di Casa is a garnet-tinged ruby red, proffering youthfully alcoholic, faintly herbaceous aromatics redolent of raspberries and briary fruit. The dry, soft-textured palate is all complexity, with tannins well tucked in and long-lingering aromatics. An excellent match for roast, fried or stewed white meats, especially rabbit, poultry, veal and pork.

name: Elena Walch  Pinot Nero Alto Adige D.O.C.
flavor_tags: Raspberry, Mushroom, Mineral, Cherry, Violet, Earthy, Rose
food_matching: Pasta, Pizza, Roasted Chicken, Pork, Medium Cheese
desc_en_short: Elena Walch's Pinot Nero is an Alpine expression of Burgundy's great grape — delicate, silky, and perfumed, light-bodied with fresh cherry, violet, and earthy spice, showing the precision and elegance that Alto Adige's mountain terroir delivers.

name: Ca’Dei Frati  Ronchedone Vino Rosso
desc_en_short: It has a rich, fruity nose with a hint of red fruit, macerated blackcurrants, kirsch, aromatic herbs and jam. On the palate it is powerful and incisive, clean and savoury, with a good degree of acidity, respecting the characteristics of the soil that produces it.

name: Cono Sur  20 Barrels Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Cono Sur's 20 Barrels Cabernet Sauvignon from Maipo Valley delivers concentrated aromas of plum, cassis, and blueberry layered with mocha and smoke — a full-bodied, intensely structured Chilean Cab with an elegant, persistent finish.

name: Masseria Li Veli  Passamante Negroamaro IGT
wine_color: Dense ruby red with a purplish rim
desc_en_short: Sour cherry and red fruits aromas, with light spicy note. The wine taste elegant, smooth with soft tannins and well balanced with good acidity for a persistant aftertaste.

name: Chateau Rauzan-Ségla  Margaux
flavor_tags: Dark Chocolate, Chocolate, Graphite, Cassis, Violet, Gravel, Cedar, Rose, Oak
food_matching: Red Meat, Grilled Steak, Lamb, Hard Cheese, BBQ
desc_en_short: Château Rauzan-Ségla is a Margaux Second Growth of great renown — a classically structured Left Bank Bordeaux with cassis, violet, cedar, and the silky, perfumed elegance that defines Margaux at its finest.

name: Henschke  Keyneton Euphonium, Barossa Valley
style: Shiraz | 23% Cabernet Sauvignon | 9% Cabernet Franc | 3% Merlot
grape_variety: Syrah, Cabernet Sauvignon, Cabernet Franc, Merlot
desc_en_short: A benchmark Barossa blend from Henschke, the 2019 Keyneton Euphonium layers ripe blackberry, cassis and violet aromatics over a plush, concentrated palate of dark plum and blackcurrant, carried by fine-grained tannins and bright, balanced acidity to a long, elegant finish.

name: Rockford  Basket Press Shiraz
desc_en_short: Rockford Basket Press Shiraz is a benchmark of traditional Barossa Valley winemaking — deeply coloured, earthy, and soulful, crafted using nineteenth-century equipment and aged two years in seasoned American and French hogsheads for extraordinary depth and character.

name: Bodega Volcanes de Chile  Tectonia Pinot Noir
desc_en_short: Chunky aromas of tomato, saucy berry fruits, asphalt and tire rubber are somewhat harsh. Flat and lazy in feel, this chunky, full-bodied number from Bío Bío tastes of baked cherry and plum fruit. A finish with low acidity and not much kick is the ending.

name: Bodega Volcanes de Chile  Tectonia Grenache-Petite Syrah Mourvedre
desc_en_short: This Mediterranean blend of Grenache, Petite Sirah and Mourvedre, heavily influenced by Chilean winemaking, demonstrates Bodega Volcanes de Chile’s efforts to rescue the inherent value of the volcanic soils of the Rapel, Maipo and Maule valleys and to bring to light the characteristics and development of these new varieties in these areas. The vineyards are located in emblematic terroirs composed of volcanic, igneous and intrusive rocks that have been formed by volcanic activity during geological periods over millions of years through to the present day. Aged in French oak barrels for 12 months (20% New).

name: Chateau Barreyres  AOC Haut-Medoc Cru Bourgeois
wine_color: A very pleasing deep crimson colour.
desc_en_short: An intense, almost glassy darkness immerses the taster in a moment of reflection. The nose, with its deep fruit aromas, imposes its will through force of persuasion. Smooth aromas of peony, vanilla and Autumn spices are balanced by notes of redcurrant. On the palette, this Haut-Médoc Cru Bourgeois is at once powerful, silky and lively. The finish is long and balanced, with pleasant oak offering notes of tobacco and promising remarkable aging potential.

name: Viu Manent  Vibo Vinedo Centenario
wine_color: Intense ruby red with a mahogany red hue.
desc_en_short:
Tasting Notes

Intense ruby red with a mahogany red hue. The nose presents tremendous fruity intensity and freshness with aromas that recall red fruits such as cherries, wild berries, and light notes of spices that lend complexity. The palate is very well balanced with good evolution, marked by its verticality and elegance. Very persistent with a lush, intense finish.

name: Terre del Vulcano  Lava Taurasi DOC
food_matching: Red Meat, Grilled Steak, Lamb, Hard Cheese, BBQ
desc_en_short: Aglianico grapes find perfect volcanic soil conditions around the village of Taurasi near Avellino and produce arguably the best high quality wine of Italy's south. This is a well-crafted, athletic, dense and concentrated wine with deep, dark fruit layered with cinnamon and allspice and firm, yet fine tannins which lend this wine muscle and breeding. It has matured beautifully and is ready to drink.

name: Penfolds  Bin 138 Barossa Valley GMS
desc_en_short: Bin 138 draws its inspiration from the wines of Southern Rhône, where Shiraz, Grenache and Mataro (Mourvèdre) are blended in varying proportions to create full-bodied wines possessing rich and heady perfume. Each year fruit for Bin 138 is sourced from old Barossa Valley vines (some more than 100 years old) and then matured for 12 to 15 months in seasoned oak hogsheads to allow the different varietals to shine through. Bin 138 is defined by its distinctive plum, raspberry pastille and underlying spicy notes. The first vintage release of this varietal blend was the 1992, labelled ‘Old Vine Barossa Valley’ – it was then elevated to Bin status for the 1998 vintage.

name: Penfolds  St.Henri Shiraz
desc_en_short:
St Henri is a time-honoured and alternative expression of shiraz, and an intriguing counterpoint to Grange. It is unusual among high quality Australian red wines as it does not rely on any new oak. Released for the first time by Penfolds in the early 1950s (first commercial vintage 1957), it gained a new lease of life in the 1990s as its quality and distinctive style became better understood. Proudly, a wine style that hasn’t succumbed to the dictates of fashion or commerce. St Henri is rich and plush when young, gaining soft, arthy, mocha-like characters as it ages. It is matured in old, 1,460 litre vats that allow the wine to develop, imparting minimal, if any oak character. Although a small proportion of cabernet is sometimes used to improve structure, the focal point for St Henri remains shiraz.

• 98 Points | Tony Love.

• 97 Points | Erin Larkin.

• 96 Points | Jeni Port

• 95 Points | James Suckling

name: Penfolds  Grange Bin 95
desc_en_short: 98 points in Wine Advocate - "Rich, concentrated and intense, the 2014 Grange delivers exactly what we’ve come to expect from this Penfolds icon wine. It’s full-bodied, velvety in feel and loaded with plummy fruit, framed in vanilla and cedar. Dense, powerful and tannic, it should prove to be long lived, even by Grange standard.” - Joe Czerwinski, Robert Parker’s Wine Advocate"

name: Beringer  Napa Valley Cabernet sauvignon
desc_en_short:
No winery or vineyard more thoroughly embodies the timeless appeal and seductive flavor of Napa Valley than Beringer Vineyards, Napa's benchmark producer since the establishment of the vineyard in 1876.

Now in its third century of crafting classic wines from Napa's finest appellations and vineyards, Beringer today is guided by the inspired partnership of celebrated Winemaster Emeritus Ed Sbragia and Winemaker Laurie Hook. Together, they craft Napa Valley wines that speak eloquently of the rich heritage of the Beringer Vineyard, while offering cutting-edge quality and contemporary elegance. The exquisite wines crafted at the Beringer Vineyards display a single minded dedication and pursuit of excellence instilled by its founder, Jacob Beringer.

name: Chateau Tour Prignac  Medoc
desc_en_short: A beautiful dark ruby red colour. Ripe red fruit on the nose with a delicious touch of spice. A smooth, creamy attack leading to a well-structured body with a vein of silky tannins.

name: Argiano  Non Confunditur
desc_en_short: NC is a wine with a decisive, full-bodied character, smooth tannins and a persistent finish. This blend of Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, Syrah andSangiovese reveals an exciting potency, with the innate gentleness of Merlot creating a bridge between the evident earthiness of Sangiovese, the aromatic blackcurrant flavour of Cabernet and the warm red berries of Syrah. The result is a generous, rounded red wine, destined for short to medium ageing, with delicious aromas of currants and generous fruit flavours, versatile enough to develop in greater depth during long months in the bottle.

name: Antigal  UNO Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: a deep ruby with flashes of black. The wine’s cherry-dominant red fruit flavors are underscored with notes of white pepper, tobacco, and cocoa. Tannins are robust yet smoothly rounded, and the finish long. This wine will age well but can be enjoyed now with roasted or grilled meats.

name: Antigal  Aduentus Classic
desc_en_short: Very ripe and heady aromas of blackberry, cassis and creamy oak take you back to the time when Mendoza was all about big extracted bruisers. This blend of Malbec, Cabernet Sauvignon and Merlot is wide, tannic and grabby. Flavors of cola, chocolate and baked black fruits finish chocolaty and oaky to the last gasp.

name: Antigal  Aduentus Mediterraneo
desc_en_short: An earthy collection of aromas includes leather, tobacco, raisin, chocolate and spiced berry fruits. A saturated intense palate is flush to the brim, while this blend of Malbec, Tempranillo and Syrah tastes of baked and savory plum and blackberry. Oaky flavors of mocha and coffee simmer away on a warm finish.

name: Antigal  One Dona Angeles Vineyard Malbec
desc_en_short: Earthy balsamic aromas of cheesy oak, blackberry and cassis feed into a saturated tannic palate that's a touch scratchy and abrasive. Stewy blackberry and cassis flavors come with a dollop of vanilla and cheese, while this ends with muscular, grabby tannins. Drink this rich, heavy Malbec through 2022.

name: La Spinetta   Barbaresco "Bordini" DOCG
desc_en_short: This wine is typical light red of Nebbiolo. charming notes of raspberry, cherry and spice. full bodied, yet balance and freshness give this wine wonderful elegance with tabacco and cherry undertones. Gorgeous to drink now or in 5 to 10 years to come.

name: Hopes End  Cabernet Sauvignon
wine_color: Deep ruby (รูบี้เข้ม)
desc_en_short: Hopes End Cabernet Sauvignon from South Australia delivers a bold, fruit-driven red with concentrated dark berry flavours, warming spice, and a long, satisfying finish — a straightforward choice for everyday drinking without compromise on intensity.

name: Santa Carolina  Cellar Selection Merlot
desc_en_short: This Merlot from Chile was aged mainly in stainless steel tanks and has a nose redolent of plums and blackberries, complemented by a fine, subtle spice and notes of toast. The Santa Carolina Cellar Selection Merlot is velvety and full-bodied on the palate, with sweet tannins.

name: Viu Manent  Viu 8 Cuvee Infinito
wine_color: A deep ruby-red color with violet hues.
desc_en_short: A deep ruby-red color with violet hues. The nose is serious and classic, with aromas of blackcurrant, red fruit, cherries, and forest floor coupled with a subtle note of cedar. The palate offers abundant fine tannins and is concentrated, tasty, elegant, vibrant, and very well balanced, with a deep finish.

name: Chateau Brisson  Castillon Cotes de Bordeaux AOC
desc_en_short: Deep garnet-purple colored, Brisson leaps from the glass with a mélange of black cherries, blackberry coulis and cedary notes with nuances of bay leaves, tobacco and tilled soil. Full-bodied with a firm, ripe, grainy texture, it has a lovely line of freshness cutting through the densely packed black fruit layers, finishing on a mineral note.

name: Amiral de Beychevelle  Saint Julien
desc_en_short: The 2019 wines have good, strong colours, well-defined, fresh fruit, and a more moderatealcohol content than the previous vintage; their tannic structures reveal impressiveelegance and depth. The volumes harvested enabled a very rigorous selection - around55% - to produce a grand vin in the tradition of its predecessors.

name: John Duval  Entity Shiraz
desc_en_short:
D 90 : Decanter

"A supple mouth-feel shows exotic spices, herbs, succulent berry fruits and savoury cherries, leading to a seamless mid-palate with rare roast lamb and sage notes. The fresh, green herbs hint at whole-bunch fermentation, and carry the wine well."

W&S 93 Wine & Spirits

"As chief winemaker at Penfolds for 16 years, John Duval was powerfully networked at the center of the Barossa wine community. He established his own label in 2003, focused on Barossa, where he sources fruit from parcels in Krondorf, Eden Valley, Light Pass and Ebenezer to make Entity. His 2015 is a silky shiraz emphasizing tannins with the cool feel of freshly turned earth. It melds floral notes with scents of black olive, black pepper and a bright berry rasp of fruit that speaks of old-vine concentration. Finely integrated, this is built to last."

name: Batasiolo  Dolcetto d' Alba "Arie" DOC
wine_color: The color is ruby red with hints of purple, clear and transparent.
desc_en_short: The color is ruby red with hints of purple, clear and transparent. The nose has great fruitiness with strong evidence of red fruits, cherries and flowers, especially violets. The palate is rich, full, fresh and perfectly balanced with a slight bitter aftertaste. Great personality, offering the full range of feelings of young wines. Try pairing with appetizers, pasta and risotto, main courses of red and white meat. In the Langhe is considered the ideal pairing with meals everyday.

name: Alois Lageder  Cabernet Riserva DOC
wine_color: cherry red colour with deep ruby red shades.
desc_en_short: The organoleptic exam reveals a cherry red colour with deep ruby red shades. The perfume is intense, fruity and spicy. Its taste is structured, harmonic, fruity, dynamic and dry. The evolution of this wine can last from 2 to 8 years.

name: Damilano  Barbera D'Asti DOCG
desc_en_short: Intense purple red in color, the bouquet is fruity with light spicy notes. On the palate, hints of of currant, violet, and cherry with a touch of vanilla, with a long persistent finish.

name: Damilano  Barbera D'Alba "LABLU" DOC
desc_en_short: Bright purple in color, Lablu has an ample and rich bouquet, with fruity notes of blackberries, cherries and spices, such as cinnamon, vanilla and green pepper.

name: Coterella  Trentanni IGT
desc_en_short: A vibrant Umbrian blend of Sangiovese and Merlot, Coterella Trentanni IGT delivers an intensely fruity nose of blueberry, blackberry jam, and fresh mint, with a rich, sapid palate that lingers with effortless complexity and old-vine character.

name: Mastroberardino  Radici Taurasi DOCG
desc_en_short:
Mastroberardino Radici Taurasi showcases the powerful, age-worthy character of Aglianico with incredible finesse. It is a wine of bold structure, deep aromatics, and longevity—capable of evolving beautifully over 15 to 20 years or more.

It is marked by dark fruit, wild herbs, spice, and volcanic minerality, offering a sensory profile that is both serious and poetic. Radici is a true classic of southern Italian viticulture, reflecting the literary soul and enduring elegance of Naples.

name: La Capitelle De Baronaques  "Le 2nd Vin De Domaine De Baronaques By Baron Phillip De Rothschild"
flavor_tags: Blackberry, Dark Fruit, Garrigue, Leather, Herbal, Plum, Oak
food_matching: Red Meat, Grilled Steak, Lamb, Hard Cheese, BBQ
desc_en_short: La Capitelle de Baronaques is the second wine of the Domaine de Baronaques estate in the Corbières — Baron Philippe de Rothschild's southern French venture, offering Mediterranean warmth, dark fruit, and herbal depth at an approachable level.

name: Goulee by Cos d'Estournel Medoc AOC
desc_en_short: Its very pleasant aromas of red and black fruits, its spicy finish are complemented by a touch of pine bark and flint, bringing a refreshing note provided by the Cabernet Sauvignon. Ample and generous, the 2016 vintage is a flavorful, structured, and warm wine.

name: Chateau Bel-Orme Tronquoy De Lalande "The Second Estate Of Chateau Rauzan Gassies"
desc_en_short: 90 points in wine enthusiast "Under the same ownership as Château Rauzan-Gassies in Margaux, this estate is in the north of Haut-Médoc region. It is dense with solid tannins and black fruit. A touch of black coffee hints at toasty wood as well as some extraction that needs to soften. The wine has potential; drink from 2021."

name: Les Pensees De La Tour Carnet "Les 2nd Vin De Chateau La Tour Carnet"
desc_en_short: The Haut-Medoc Thought Tower Carnet presents a beautiful deep red color, which reveals aromas of red fruits such as strawberry or flowers such as rose. A delicious red wine balanced in the mouth, with a good aromatic depth and persistent aromas.

name: Fluer De Pedesclaux  "Le 2nd Vin De Chateau Pedesclaux"
desc_en_short: Ethereal, fresh, appealing to both the nose and the palate, Pédesclaux’s second wine is a flower that unfurls as you approach. Thanks to its reliance on a high proportion of Merlot, the wine is soft and gentle, with a delicious, silky texture. It has intense, compelling and savoury fruit aromas and, year after year, beautifully calibrated scents of white flowers, violets and small red berries. Exhibiting a more high-spirited elegance yet nonetheless showing remarkable length, Fleur de Pédesclaux is a delight. In the mouth, it is fresh, subtle, packed with fruit and beautifully smooth tannins, with a long finish. In this more floral expression, the marvellous complexity of our terroir is once again evident, but in a mouth-watering style that is instantly festive.

name: Chateau Siran 2019
grape_variety: Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, Cabernet Franc, Petit Verdot
flavor_tags: Blackcurrant, Mineral, Cassis, Violet, Chalky, Gravel, Cedar, Plum, Oak
food_matching: Red Meat, Grilled Steak, Lamb, Hard Cheese, BBQ
desc_en_short: Château Siran 2019 is a polished, elegant Margaux Cru Bourgeois — a vintage of exceptional quality showing dense cassis, cedar, violet, and silky Cabernet tannins with the refinement and mineral depth characteristic of the appellation's finest soils.

name: Chateau Fonroque  Grand Cru Classe
flavor_tags: Blackberry, Limestone, Mushroom, Truffle, Mineral, Earthy, Cedar, Earth, Plum, Oak
food_matching: Pasta, Pizza, Roasted Chicken, Pork, Medium Cheese
desc_en_short: Château Fonroque is a certified organic Grand Cru Classé from Saint-Émilion, producing a distinctive Merlot-dominant Right Bank Bordeaux with dark plum, truffle, and earthy depth, shaped by biodynamic farming and precise winemaking.

name: Fugue De Nenin  "Le 2nd Vin De Chateau Nenin"
desc_en_short:
The year 2020 began with a lot of difficulties, with a wet and mild winter's exit, followed
by a capricious spring that could not tolerate approximation. Although rain and
temperatures initiated a historic precociousness, water reserves were sufficient to get
through the long summer season without the vines suffering, and the grapes ripened in
splendid weather. Warm days and cool nights alternated until the grapes were carefully
harvested to ensure homogeneous ripeness, with no compromise. The Fugue de Nénin
2020 is a very suave Pomerol, in which the fruity roundness is enhanced by a very nice
straight forward freshness. A very nice balance based on lusciousness.

name: Talamonti  Tre Saggi Montepulciano
desc_en_short: Dark ruby-red with violet undertones. Complex wild berry notes framed by elegant oak spices. Blackcurrant, spicy cherry integrated with hazelnut and coffee. The wine pair perfectly with all the traditional italian meals such as: pasta, veal, lamb and grilled meats.

name: Pio Cesare  Barolo Mosconi DOCG
desc_en_short: Produced in very small quantities since the 2015 vintage. Sourced from the last acquisition of 10 hectares at the Mosconi appellation in Monforte d’Alba, made by the 4th generation of our Family, Pio Boffa, for his 60th birthday. Supple, ripe fruit, complexity, soft tannins. May be appreciated immediately, but with a very long life.

name: Chateau Clerc Milon  2016
wine_color: The wine has a very deep, almost black colour with a glittering hue.
desc_en_short:
Climatic conditions

In 2016, there were two main trends in the weather as we experienced it in Pauillac:

– a very wet winter and spring: more than half of the annual rainfall came in the first four months of the year, including a record 240 mm in January;

– an extremely dry summer and autumn without any significant rainfall, resulting in a water deficit at the end of the year.

As a consequence of the summer drought, the grapes were numerous but remained rather small, making for density and concentration.

High temperatures in August and September allowed for slow ripening and excellent maturity, so that the harvest started with the Merlot on 26 September and continued in perfect conditions until 15 October.

In the vat house, each grape variety and each plot were, as usual, vinified separately in order to let their intrinsic character shine through.

The wines, which have now been blended, offer remarkable colour, intense fruit and spice aromas and a dense texture of very rich and well-rounded tannins.

name: Chateau Lagrezette  Chevalier du Chateau Lagrezette
wine_color: The dress is a dark red with purple hues.

name: Brotte  La Fiole Chateauneuf Du Pape (With Box) (1.5 L)
desc_en_short: La Fiole du Pape is the world's best-selling Châteauneuf-du-Pape, crafted by Maison Brotte from a masterful blend of Grenache and reserve wines aged in century-old oak barrels — presented in the iconic, hand-crafted twisted bottle that has defined this legendary southern Rhône cuvée since 1952.

name: Chateau Petrus  2011
desc_en_short:
Chateau Petrus Winery

Little known 50 years ago, this château has seen the rise of a myth about the uniqueness of its wine. The wine’s inimatibility is due to many factors, first of all, an exceptional terroir - 40 meters above sea level, the highest point of the appellation - with a layer of heavy clay soil and an iron subsoil. These are ideal conditions for the expression of the Merlot grape. With such a special terroir, the approach in the vineyard and cellar is traditional and respectful.

The work done in the vineyard is fastidious - severe pruning in the winter, regular ploughing, crop-thinning, de-leafing, manicuring the clusters in the summer - and allows the perfect ripening of the fruit. The grape are manually harvested within two afternoons and sorted before crush.

Fermentation is carried out gently, without any overextraction, in temperature-controlled concrete tanks. The blend, very often pure Merlot, is defined in December and the young wine is aged in 100% new oak barrels.

This property made famous by Madame Edmond Loubat and then by Monsieur Jean-Pierre Moueix, culminates at 130 feet on the plateau of Pomerol. Ets Jean-Pierre Moueix is responsible for the cultivation, vinification and aging as well as the export distribution of Petrus wines.

name: Torres  Sangre de Toro Red
desc_en_short: Beautiful ruby red and rich aromas of spices and wild blackberries. Softly textured tannins and elegant notes of licorice and black pepper. Irreplaceable companion of roasts, stews and traditional Spanish wild game and meat recipes.

name: Conti Zecca  Negroamaro Leverano Liranu Riserva
wine_color: Intense ruby red with garnet reflections.
desc_en_short: Liranu is the dialectal name of Leverano, town where 5 centuries ago the Zeccas settled and where the winery was built. Liranu is produced from Negroamaro grapes, the most important variety in Salento that creates a deep colored wine with a strong but soft taste.

name: Fattoria Le Pupille  Saffredi Maremma Toscana
wine_color: Deep ruby colour with purple reflections.
desc_en_short: Saffredi is Fattoria Le Pupille’s flagship wine and with 2017 vintage, we celebrate not its 30°anniversary only, but as well winery’s consolidated experience and history as a top player within qualitative Italian wine making. This wine is the outcome of Elisabetta’s intuition and aspiration to make a great wine in Maremma, a wish realized with Giacomo Tachis’s precious help. Saffredi is a special dedication to Fredi, the one who inspired Elisabetta’s passion for wine.

name: Maxville  Cabernet Sauvingon Napa Valley
desc_en_short: Our Cabernet Sauvignon has deep opulent ruby and garnet hues with tantalizing aromas of perfume, cedar and ripe dark fruit layered with vanilla, cassis and black pepper. The finish is long and rich on the palate. A powerful wine with crème de cassis and graphite notes. Superb concentration, sweet tannins and loads of fruit makes this wine sensational.

name: Le Petit Haut Lafitte  (Le 2nd Vin De Chateau Smith Haut Lafitte) 2016
Ceretto  Langhe Rosso Monsordo BIO DOC
wine_color: Deep ruby red in color with garnet highlights.
desc_en_short: It has a charged ruby red color with light garnet reflections. The smell is rich, various with spicy and vanilla aromas The taste is opulent with sweet and soft tannins that express the longevity of this wine and its class.

name: Tenuta delle Terre Nere  Etna Rosso Santo Spirito DOC
desc_en_short:
The Contrada borders with the steep, bumpy and lean Contrada Guardiola: adjacent to its northern limit, and lower in altitude, it follows the descent of the hill towards Alcantara.

Although adjacent, they could not be more different from each other. A place of extraordinary beauty, Santo Spirito, with large and serene terraces that flow gently downstream. Deep and rich soils that flaunt sumptuous grass, vigorous vines that display their nourished abundance.

Santo Spirito wines are sensual and succulent, always seductive, with an almost fleshy bouquet and a rich and enveloping palate. But always pure and balanced. Very refined, yes, but also delicate. At the same time generous and vulnerable. Sophisticated Lady by Duke Ellington can give you a musical image. Velvety, noble poultry, pork loin, escalopes with Marsala.

name: Tenuta delle Terre Nere  Etna Rosso San Lorenzo DOC
desc_en_short: The Etna Rosso San Lorenzo is from 4 hectares of vineyards in the same named district in the town of Randazzo. The vines are more than 70 years and the altitude is 750 meters above sea level, the soil is almost pure volcanic sand. The estimated production is about 60 hl. The terroir in contrada San Lorenzo is originated by lava flows and volcanoclastic deposits related to the effusive and explosive activity of the the Ellittico eruptive center, which dates back from 60,000 to 15,000 years ago. Although very young by geological standards, the soils from the Ellittico eruption are the oldest superficial strata in which one may plant. The reason is simple: millennia of lava flows have buried all older soils, leaving, in fact, only very small and rare parcels of Ellittico soils. On the northern slopes of Etna there are four or five Contrade that have terroir from the Ellittico. Three, however, have mixed soils, blending soil from Ellittico of igneous nature with alluvial soils of sedimentary nature due to the overflowing of the Alcantara river. Only two Contrade out of hundreds and hundreds are “pure” terroir Ellittico: Calderara and San Lorenzo. I wanted to mention this on their labels, so as to facilitate a distinction. The wine from this cru is particularly rich, fruity and has very soft tannins, making it velvety and voluptuous on the palate.

name: Agricola San Felice  San Felice Chianti Classico DOCG
desc_en_short:
Winemaker Notes

Produced entirely from native varieties, predominantly Sangiovese with addition of Colorino and Pugnitello. It is a medium-bodied Chianti Classico with a distinguished personality and notable for its elegance. Traditional fermentation practices are employed with an average-lenght maceration, followed by 12 months maturation in large slavonian oak casks.

name: Tenuta Lunelli  Ziggurat Montefalco Rosso DOC
wine_color: A brilliant ruby red in colour.
desc_en_short: A combination of the power of Sagrantino and the elegance of Sangiovese, the Montefalco Rosso from Tenuta Castelbuono, which is certified as organic, expresses all the charm of a region with an age-old winemaking tradition.

name: Altos de Rioja  Altos R Tempranillo
desc_en_short: Altos de Rioja's Altos R Tempranillo is a fresh, aromatic red from Rioja Alavesa, offering juicy blueberry fruit, herbal lift, and a clean, medium-bodied palate that typifies the bright, food-friendly style of this celebrated Spanish appellation.

name: Altos de Rioja  Altos R Crianza
desc_en_short: Ruby red color. Good aromatic intensity with berry fruit (blueberry) and a touch of herbs/grass. Smooth, fruit and spice flavors with toasted oak. Complex and structured. A pleasant finish with red fruits and hints of eucalyptus.

name: Cuatro Mill  Discolo Uva Tinta de Toro
wine_color: Deep cherry red, clean and bright.

name: Viu Manent  Single Vineyard Syrah
wine_color: Purple in color with glints of violet,
desc_en_short:
Purple in color with glints of violet, the wine’s nose is elegant, with aromas of ripe blue fruit with hints of cassis and blueberry, together with a subtle toasted note. On the palate the wine is balanced with fine, sharp tannins with excellent texture leading to a long and persistent finish.

Awards

- 90 Points Robert Parker's Wine Advocate

name: Castelli del Grevepesa  Castelgreve Fiasco Chianti Classico DOCG (500 ml)
Castelli del Grevepesa  Clemente VII Riserva Chianti Classico DOCG Riserva
desc_en_short: Very intense ruby red colour, sharp fragrance with forest fruit aromas well integrated with spicy notes and an elegant hint of vanilla. Full-bodied, perfectly structured flavour, balanced and harmonious wine with a persistent aftertaste.

name: Maison de Grand Esprit  La Miraculeuse Bordeaux
desc_en_short: This approachable bordeaux has an inviting palate of juicy blackcurrant and plum. The silky mouth-feel enhances undertones of gentle spice and an attractive hint of oak influence. Delightfully modest and smooth, this wine is ready to enjoy now.

name: Maison de Grand Esprit  La Mysteriale Lussac Saint Emilion
Beaulieu Vineyard  Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: "For more than a century our Cabernet Sauvignon has defined the unique character of Napa Valley. I've had the honor for more than 20 years to carry on this tradition. I am pleased to off this elegant and balanced wine, which expresses velvety layers of blackberry, ripe plum and chocolate." - Jeffrey Stambor, Winemaker

name: Chateau la Croix de Mouchet  Montagne St.Emilion
desc_en_short:
Nose with notes of ripe red fruit such as cherry and raspberry. Subtle woody touch with vanilla and spices. Structured taste with a nice sucrosity. A wine with a lot of density, but still easy to drink.
​

name: Cantine Leonardo Da Vinci  Da Vinci I Capolavori Rosso Di Montalcino DOC
wine_color: It appears intense, very thick red crimson in colour, with tight legs.
desc_en_short: Wine-making with maceration on the skins for about 10 days. A medium-intensity maceration is performed to achieve a suitable balance between structure and aromas. Gentle pumping over and fermentation at temperatures of 28-30°C are performed

name: Velenosi  Passo Adagio Montepulciano d' Abruzzo DOC
wine_color: Red ruby in with violet rim.
desc_en_short: Red ruby in with violet rim. Fresh and fruity; soft and velvety mouthfeel. Pairing with Beef, Pasta, Veal, Pork.

name: "Tormaresca" By Antinori  Neprica Primitivo IGT
flavor_tags: Dried Herbs, Blackberry, Dark Berry, Chocolate, Cinnamon, Cherry, Cocoa, Plum, Oak
food_matching: Pasta, Pizza, Roasted Chicken, Pork, Medium Cheese
desc_en_short: Neprica Primitivo is a rich, vibrant southern Italian red from Antinori's Tormaresca estate in Puglia — dark berry fruit, chocolate, warm spice, and a generous, smooth finish that captures the sunny intensity of the Primitivo grape.

name: "Tormaresca" By Antinori  Neprica Negroamaro IGT
flavor_tags: Liquorice, Chocolate, Tobacco, Cherry, Earthy, Fig, Oak
food_matching: Pasta, Pizza, Roasted Chicken, Pork, Medium Cheese
desc_en_short: Neprica Negroamaro showcases one of southern Italy's most distinctive native varieties — deep, rustic, and characterful with dark cherry, dried fig, tobacco, and earthy Mediterranean depth, crafted with Antinori's characteristic refinement.

name: Tenuta San Guido  Sassicaia 2019
wine_color: An intense, concentrated and deep ruby color.
desc_en_short:
100 points Decanter

Sassicaia 2019 spent 25 months in oak (one-third new). ‘We are going longer in oak in the past few years,’ said Carlo Paoli, managing director of Tenuta San Guido. Quite pale in the glass, the nose is extremely graceful and intense with a lavender note enhanced by restrained bramble fruits, fermented citrus peel, an intense violet aroma and graphite minerality in depth. The attack is soft and full, the flavor savoury and cedary through to the finish, with integrated velvety tannins and lifted acidity. A perfectly woven structure is bound with signature freshness and fruit vibrancy, making this one for the long haul.

name: Hardys  Brave New world Shiraz Black
wine_color: Deep, dark purple in colour with a vivid crimson hue.

name: Chateau Musar  Red 2017
desc_en_short:
An equal blend of Cinsault, Carignan and Cabernet Sauvignon, from a bakingly hot vintage, it has all the Musar hallmarks of rich, ripe, savoury fruit backed by an underlying sweetness and softness – Jonny Ray, The Spectator, March 2019

The Hochar family has turned out an exceptional 2012 vintage of their flagship wine. Deep in colour, intensely smoky and spicy with black fruit, full body and a finish that lasts and lasts. Unmistakably Musar in style and personality, it is immediately appealing but will age gracefully over the next 10 to 15 years – The Wine Society, June 2019

Dense red, still very young and thick ‘legs’ on the glass showing richness to come, the nose still quite closed with autumnal black stone fruits which show exuberance and spice on the palate with almost a sweet warmth of texture from a small, late and naturally concentrated harvest, not ready yet and needing to lose its ‘puppy fat’ and move into its second decade to show its vineyard character to the full – Steven Spurrier, September 2019

name: Domaine Robert Groffier Pere & Fils  Bonnes Mares Grand Cru 2014
desc_en_short: From one of the Côte de Nuits' most respected estates, the Groffier Bonnes-Mares Grand Cru 2014 delivers a compelling earthiness layered with red berry fruit, woodland nuance, and a sappy, spice-laced finish — a beautifully supple expression of this storied Burgundy climat.

name: Rochester  Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Brimming with abundant blackcurrant aromas. This Medium-bodied wine is a mouthful of juicy plum flavours .Delight fully versatile, it makes a delicious partner to a wide variety of foods.

name: Mascota Vineyards  Grand Mascota Malbec
desc_en_short: Aromas of ripened red fruits, such as plums and cherries with mint notes. Very juicy with velvety tannins. Grassy in the middle palate with mineral character. Long lasting finish.

name: Leeuwin Estate  Art Series Cabernet Sauvignon
Chateau Clerc Milon  2018
wine_color: The wine has a deep colour with a crimson hue.

name: Bosquet Des Papes  Chateauneuf-du-Pape Chante Le Merle
wine_color: A shiny red color with dark purple highlights.
desc_en_short: A shiny red color with dark purple highlights. The nose is complex. This very aromatic Chateauneuf-du-Pape is elegant and long in the mouth. A powerful wine with a cellar potential for many years. This powerful wine perfectly matched with jugged hares, game, and truffled omelets.

name: Messenez Family  Donum Massenez Red Premium Assemblage
Oddero  Barolo Bussia Vigna Mondaca Riserva DOCG
desc_en_short: Mellow and elegant bouquet with scents of berries and natural balsamic notes, Mediterranean woodlands and dried rose reminiscent of goudron with ageing. Well-balanced on the palate with elegant and assertive tannic texture, long and complex finish.

name: Sartori di Verona  “Corte Bra” Amarone Delle Valpolicella DOCG
desc_en_short: Intense red wine tending to garnet with aging. The bouquet is broad, fine and complex with characteristic notes of red fruit jam and spices. There are fragrances of cherry, dried fruit and tobacco. Upon tasting this wine is able to inebriate the palate thanks to its exceptional power and at the same time extreme elegance. Elegant and persistent.

name: Poggio Al Tufo  Rompicollo Toscana IGT
wine_color: A deep, bright ruby red in color
desc_en_short: A deep, bright ruby red in color, on the nose it offers an elegant, varied bouquet of ripe berry fruits (such as blackberries and raspberries), dried aromatic herbs and delicate sweet spices. On the palate it is full-bodied, mellow and mouth-filling, with velvety tannins. Though richly flavored, it displays an attractive suppleness in the mouth.  Ideal with risottos and rich pasta dishes, white meats, Italian cold cuts, and cheeses (both fresh and moderately aged).

name: Victoria Park  Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short:
This Cabernet Sauvignon is deep purple in colour. The palate is true to its variety, elegantly structured with layers of flavour reminiscent of dark berries, chocolate and spice.With a smooth silky texture and soft tannin finish, this wine matches perfectly with
beef fillet or roast lamb.

name: Victoria Park  Shiraz
desc_en_short: This Shiraz is deep crimson red in colour. The palate is true to its variety with a generous sweet fruit core and delicate flavours reminiscent of plums and blackberry. A subtle oak character lingers through the long succulent finish.

name: Jacob's Creek  Double Barrel VSOP (750 ml)
wine_color: Deep Crimson with a bright purple hue

name: Eleve  Cabernet Sauvignon
wine_color: The wine has a beautiful and dense purple-red in colour.
food_matching: Pasta, Pizza, Roasted Chicken, Pork, Medium Cheese

name: Joseph Drouhin  Beaujolais Villages Nouveau 2021
wine_color: A dark red colour, deep, with bluish tints.

name: Opus One  Vintage 2019
desc_en_short:
WINEMAKING

The Opus One 2019 has intense aromas of black plum, blueberry, black currant, and dried rose petals, accentuated by mineral undertones. The creamy, satiny texture is framed by fine-grained tannins. The freshness and soft glow of acidity create a subtle tension with dark fruit flavors, savory herbs, espresso, and cocoa. A delicate dark chocolate bitterness lingers on the finish.

name: Hardys  Tintara Reserve Shiraz
wine_color: Bright violet with dark purple edge.

name: Wynns  Coonawarra  Estate Cabernet Shiraz Merlot
desc_en_short:
The first Wynns blend (then named Cabernet Hermitage) was produced in 1969, allowing Wynns a long history with this traditional Australian-style blend.

The “red-stripe” blend of three red varieties creates a versatile wine suited to many occasions. Soft fruit and judicious oak create a wine that is perfect for current drinking or medium-term cellaring. The Wynns Cabernet Shiraz Merlot is a well-balanced and approachable wine, providing a true reflection of its regionality.

name: Wynns  Coonawarra  Estate Shiraz
desc_en_short: Typically the Wynns Coonawarra Estate Shiraz has aromas of ground black pepper, berry and distinctive floral notes. Delicate oak is used to match and support the fine palate structure, without dominating its distinctive, cool-climate character. A mediumbodied wine with a lingering finish that will age gracefully in the tradition of the original Wynns Hermitage wine.

name: Wynns  Coonawarra  Estate  The Siding Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short:
The Siding is named after the railway siding - a local landmark that played a defining role during Coonawarra's early settlement.

"the aim of this wine is to deliver a leading affordable Cabernet Sauvignon, showcasing exceptional varietal and regional characteristics of red cherry, mint and dark berry flavours, while an array of gentle tannins will further reward from short to medium term cellaring" - Sue Hodder.

name: Wynns  Coonawarra  Estate  Black Label Shiraz
desc_en_short: Today Wynns is privileged to hold Shiraz vineyards on many prime locations within Coonawarra. Vines for this label are between 30 and 110 years old. Wynns ‘Black Label’ Shiraz is a superb example of Coonawarra’s cool climate style. Displaying great fruit character, this wine has rich and complex flavours of red berries, spice and chocolate with layered fruit underpinned by tightly focused tannins.

name: Lindeman's  Gentleman Collection Cabernet Sauvignon
wine_color: Pale to gold straw in colour.
desc_en_short: Opaque dark red black colour with a bright dark red hue. Aromas of dark cherries and mulberries are followed by a hint of bay leaf and spicy cedar. Medium bodied and sweetly fruited the palate has flavours of cherries soaked in Kirsch, cassis liqueur, sweet plums and a touch of spice. Soft tannins. Modest aftertaste of sweet ripe cherries, cassis liqueur and plums. A concoction of sorts. An earnest drop to match the earnest gent.

name: J. Lebegue  Bordeaux Rouge
style: Merlot, Cabernet Franc E Cabernet Sauvignon

name: Louis Latour  Mercurey Cote Chalonnaise Rouge
desc_en_short: The name of Mercurey and its reputation as a viticultural commune date from the period when the Roman legions erected a temple there to Mercury, their God of Commerce and Trade amongst other things. As regards the character of the wine, Mercurey possesses an individual appeal despite obvious parralels with the Côte de Beaune. Typically, it has a penetrating, earthy fruitiness allied to an ample backbone with plenty of grip on the palate.

name: Robert Mondavi  Private Selection Vint Red Blend
style: Zinfandel, 24% Merlot, 20% Petite Sirah, 14% Syrah, 4%, Grenache 1% Other Reds

name: Dominio de Punctum  Oak Aged Tempranillo / Petit Verdot
2Naturkinder  Kleine Wanderlust
desc_en_short: The Kleine Wanderlust from 2Naturkinder is a blend of Regent grapes (85%) and skin fermented Pinot Gris. It presents a slight fizziness at first and a beautiful purple color. It’s a light bodied summery red wine. In the nose black currant leaf, blackberry, woodruff and a hint of yogurt. On the palate aromas of cherry and red currant.

name: 2Naturkinder  Spatburgunder
desc_en_short: The Spätburgunder (German for Pinot Noir) is the least crazy within the 2Naturkinder‘s wines. Due to the cool climate it is not the jammy rich Pinot Noir, rather an elegant one. Light and mineral with amazing wild blueberry and raspberry aromas, thyme notes plus a hint of yougurt (coming perhaps from the malolactic fermentation).

name: Domaine Jean Fery & Fils  Pernand-Vergelesses 1er Cru "les Vergelesses"
desc_en_short:
