The Domaine Jean Fery et Fils is a Domaine of nearly 14 Hectares in Burgundy. Reflecting the diversity of the region, the Domaine cultivates a mosaic of appellations, a true palette of tastes on both red and white wines from the Cote d'Or : from Gevrey-Chambertin, from the Cote de Nuits to the Puligny-Montrachet, from the Cote de Beaune.

They never hesitate to innovate the new techniques or equipment such as “new barrels, if they can prove to be beneficial to the wine ; quality is priceless” The vineyards are farmed according to the principles of organic farming (the domaine has been certified by ECOCERT since 2011), which requires a great deal of dedicatioins and physical labor. Everyone who works at the Domaine are linked by a passion for wine, for nature, and for winetasting. Their method is to please one another and themselves. They do this by proposing wines, of which they are proud, and by working together in a joyful atmosphere. This is a Domaine which places its confidence in nature, in people, and their competence.

name: Les Solstices  Cuvee Tradition Rouge De France (Fruit Wine)
food_matching: Pasta, Pizza, Roasted Chicken, Pork, Medium Cheese

name: Grange Mazan  Cabernet Syrah Pays d' Oc IGP
desc_en_short: A sun-drenched southern French blend from the Pays d'Oc, Grange Mazan's Cabernet-Syrah is a crowd-pleasing everyday red delivering ripe dark fruit, gentle spice, and smooth, approachable tannins — perfect for relaxed weeknight drinking.

name: Ropiteau  Pinot Noir Les Plants Nobles Vin De France
wine_color: Light ruby (รูบี้อ่อน)
desc_en_short: Ropiteau's Les Plants Nobles Pinot Noir is a graceful, fruit-forward French red that captures the delicate soul of the variety — bright cherry aromatics, silky tannins, and a refreshing finish that makes every casual pour feel quietly elegant.

name: Chateau De Parenchere  Bordeaux Superieur
wine_color: Deep ruby (รูบี้เข้ม)
food_matching: Red Meat, Grilled Steak, Lamb, Hard Cheese, BBQ

name: Anura  Pinotage
desc_en_short: An elegant and aromatic nose, complimented by subtle, juicy fruit. A velvety palate with prominent notes of black and red berries, featuring spicy undertones of cinnamon. This wine shows great balance between oak and fruit flavour with a good tannin structure finish. Food pairing suggestions include grilled red meats and venison, rich tomato based pasta sauces, full flavoured mature cheeses and charcuterie.

name: Masseria Borgo Dei Trulli  Primitivo Di Manduria DOP (750 ml)
desc_en_short: Dark scent of currants and ripe blackberries aroma. Sun-baked fruit flavours mingle with a slight herbaceousness for a powerful burst of flavour. Pairing with grilled red meat and savoury first courses.

name: Quinta Da Fonte Souto  Florão Red
Cabriz  Cohleita Dao (Organic)
wine_color: A bright red colour with slight violet tones.

name: Domaines Barons de Rothschild (Lafite) Saga R Bordeaux Rouge
desc_en_short: Crafted by the legendary house behind Château Lafite Rothschild, Saga R Bordeaux Rouge is an approachable, elegantly structured everyday red blending Cabernet Sauvignon and Merlot from across the celebrated Bordeaux appellation.

name: Grand Napa Vineyards  "Stone Crib" Rutherford Estate Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: This limited 2018 Estate Grown Cabernet Sauvignon is from the beautiful Stone Crib Single Vineyard in the heart of Rutherford, California. The magnum is 100% hand-carved in immaculate detail.

name: Grand Napa Vineyards  Reserve Cabernet Sauvignon
wine_color: The dark ruby color is enticing.
desc_en_short: The dark ruby color is enticing. Blackberry and cassis aromas are jumping off the glass. On the palate, it has a concentrated body, harmonious tannins and a black peppery and fresh finish. Intriguing and full body. We recommend pairing it with red meat and all grilling fairs.

name: Grand Napa Vineyards  "Master Red" Red Wine
wine_color: deep and dark ruby red appearance.
desc_en_short: Master Red shows a deep and dark ruby red appearance. The nose jumps out of the glass with fresh Asian spice aromas intermixed with plum confiture and blackberry note. On the palate, the wine shows its opulence in a brooding and emphatic way. The flavors are intriguing and mix blackberry, fresh red meat, intense violet extract and plum jam. It is a great addition to all your barbecue fares and especially ribs or a marinated pork tenderloin.

name: Noble Hill  Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: The granite slopes of the Simonsberg mountain are known within South Africa as "Cabernet country" for a good reason. Cabernet has grown here for over 300 years and produces classic, elegant examples of the varietal. Aromas of cassis and Moroccan mint underlined by robust tannins and a long finish.

name: Noble Hill  Field Atlas Syrah
desc_en_short: Field Atlas is made from organically grown Syrah plus a little Mourvedre and a splash of Viognier from Noble Hill's vineyards on the slopes of Mount Simonsberg. A delicious soft, medium-bodied South African red wine with soft dark cherry and berry fruit, a dash of toast and hints of clove; very versatile and moreish.

name: Penfolds  Bin 704 Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Penfolds Bin 704 is the Napa Valley mirror image of the iconic Australian Bin 407, crafted through a distinctly Penfolds lens — delivering silk-like texture, crunchy acidity, and a dense black fruit core matured in French barriques for a confident, cellar-worthy Cabernet Sauvignon.

name: Penfolds  II Dourthe Cabernet Shiraz
wine_color: Dark and deep; brilliant/bright hue; purple core
desc_en_short: The creation of this limited release cabernet shiraz began in a quest to create something real, different, and aspiringly lofty, together with our trusted partner Dourthe Bordeaux. The French component of this wine was made at two of the Dourthe-owned wineries. Australian components of this wine were made at Penfolds Nuriootpa Winery (South Australia). The French and Australian components were blended and bottled in South Australia.

name: Notte Rossa  Primitivo Di Manduria DOP
desc_en_short: Ruby red, enriched with violet reflections, generous perfume, which recalls ripe cherries and plums, with pleasant notes of cocoa and vanilla. This wine has a velvety texture, softened by the warmth of the Primitivo, and ends with notes of persistent sweetness.

name: Notte Rossa  Negroamaro Di Terra D'otranto DOP
desc_en_short: Very deep purple red, wide and complex to the nose, with notes of spices, soft fruit, and cherry jam. A full-bodied wine, soft and balanced, rich in fine tannins, with a pleasantly long lasting finish.

name: Vivaldi Amarone della Valpolicella Classico D.O.C.G
desc_en_short: Ruby red, dense and compact. Intense and persistent, ethereal, fruity with hints of cherries and dried prunes, dried flowers and spices. Full bodied and very smooth, with beautifully balanced velvety tannins.

name: Vivaldi Amarone della Valpolicella D.O.C.G
desc_en_short: Ruby red, dense and compact. big intensity and persistence, ethereal, fruity with hints of cherries and dried prunes, dried flowers, sweet spiced. full-bodied and determinate smooth, counterpoint of velvety tannins

name: Vivaldi Valpolicella Ripasso Classico
wine_color: intense ruby red with hints of violet.
desc_en_short: Intense ruby red with hints of violet. Complex, aromas of red fruits, vinous and spicy. Harmonious, full bodied, velvety smooth with the ideal balance of tannins and acidity.

name: Vivaldi  Bordolino
wine_color: intense ruby red with hints of violet.

name: Bertani  Amarone della Valpolicella Valpantena DOCG
Bertani  Ripasso della Valpolicella Valpantena  DOC
Chateau La Bridane Saint Julien 2018
food_matching: Red Meat, Grilled Steak, Lamb, Hard Cheese, BBQ

name: Le Carillon de Rouget  Pomerol 2019
desc_en_short: Le Carillon de Rouget is the second wine of the esteemed Château Rouget in Pomerol, offering a plush, fruit-driven expression of Merlot with dense ruby colour, layers of ripe black and red fruit, and warmly enveloping tannins that make it accessible yet genuinely characterful.

name: Naudin Père & Fils  Pommard Premier Cru
Allegrini  La Bragia IGT
desc_en_short: Its premium ruby red is the icing on the cake for any special occasion. Your friends will tell you. The La Bragia Villa della Torre's distinctive scent spectrum of black pepper, spices and tobacco shows aromatic complexity and a lot of finesse. The striking nuances of red plum, strawberry and fig create their individual texture. Strong body and outstanding acidity result in the red wine, which shows a lot of character and class with dominant tannins in the mouth.

name: Michele Chiarlo  Nizza La Court Riserva DOCG
desc_en_short: In the heart of "Nizza", in Castelnuovo Calcea is to be found our La Court estate. La Court is the name, in Piedmontese, of one of the estate's three farmhouses: two magical hills where the art Park "Orme su la Court" was born. Barbera "Nizza" La Court comes out only in the years that we feel are excellent.

name: Michele Chiarlo  Barbaresco Reyna DOCG
desc_en_short: The Michele Chiarlo Reyna Barbaresco is garnet red with brilliant hues. The nose is noble and complex, of the utmost elegance. Ethereal notes of small red fruits, rose petals and tea leaves aristocratic, remarkable fine tannins and the finish is long, balanced full of flavor.

name: Belleville  Medoc AOC
style: Subtle Blend Of Merlot And Cabernet Sauvignon

name: Belleville  Bordeaux AOC Red
style: Subtle Blend Of Merlot, Cabernet Sauvignon And Cabernet Franc I Ntensely Fruity, Tender To The Palate And Elegant

name: Langmeil  Steadfast Shiraz Cabernet
wine_color: Medium depth crimson with purple hues.
desc_en_short:
Founded in the 1840s, the Barossa is one of Australia’s oldest wine regions. Generations of grape
growers and winemakers have ensured its Steadfast reputation for quality which is recognised
worldwide. This blend is truly a part of Australian culture and is difficult to replicate anywhere else
in the world.

name: Angove  Chalk Hill Blue Shiraz Cabernet
desc_en_short: Dark garnet in appearance. Blackberry, leather, spice and cedar. Medium to full-bodied with good balance between savoury elements and juicy dark fruits, tight acid and tannin harmony and touches of bay leaf and leather on the savoury finish.

name: Aromo  Winemaker's Selection Cabernet Sauvignon - Syrah
desc_en_short: This wine is a terrific blend of a serious, concentrated and spicy Cabernet Sauvignon and a young, flavorful and expressive Syrah, loaded with black fruit and featuring an attractive, purplish red robe.

name: Aromo  Reserva Privada Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: This wine is bright ruby red. Intensely ripe red fruits, with hints of prunes and spices. A delicate and fruity palate, with good structure and abundant tannins that leave a sweet sensation. Some chocolate and smoke in the aftertaste.

name: Aromo  Reserva Privada Carmenere
desc_en_short: This wine is intense brigth red with violet hues. Deep aromas of spices, pepper and black fruits, with hints of coffee and bitter chocolate. Good balance, smooth tannins, and a sweet, lingering sensation. The aftertaste is dominated by spices, smoke and caramel.

name: Chateau Meillier  Cuvee Prestige Bordeaux Superieur
desc_en_short: Dark ruby in color with ripe, red fruit aromas. Medium-full bodied and structured with generous almost jammy - fruit, balanced by gentle acidity, and ripe tannins.

name: Barton&Guestier  Partager Rouge
desc_en_short: This wine is very aromatic and pleasant with red fruit aromas of blackberry and raspberries. Medium bodied and well-balanced, with round tannins and jammy, ripe fruit aromas at the end of the palate.

name: Fraser Gallop  Margaret River Parterre Cabernet Sauvignon
wine_color: A medium bodied ruby red wine with crimson hues.
desc_en_short: A medium bodied ruby red wine with crimson hues. Savoury on the nose with aromas of nori sheet, bay leaf, roast capsicum, earthy, cedary with some red berry notes. Nicely balanced on the palate with soft grainy tannins and moderate acidity and subtle oak.

name: Satellite  Pinot Noir
desc_en_short: A fragrant New Zealand Pinot Noir brimming with spiced cherry, vanilla, and earthy mushroom, delivering a beautifully rounded, silky palate that lingers with elegance — an approachable, soothing red that punches well above its price point.

name: Cakebread  Vine Hill Ranch Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: From three select blocks within Oakville's revered Vine Hill Ranch, this 100% Cabernet Sauvignon delivers cashmere-smooth richness — layering cocoa, blackberry, cassis, and graphite minerality into a seamlessly structured, cellar-worthy Napa classic.

name: 2:am  Shiraz Barossa Valley
desc_en_short:
Rich dark cherries, mocha and mulberry fruits mingling with fine dark chocolate, white
pepper and cinnamon jumps out of the glass. Full-bodied, palate with lovely plums and
cherries carries the undertones of American oak on a fine tannin structure. The finish is
long, juicy and everlasting. Drink this premium drop now or cellar it for up to 10 years.

name: Pares Balta  Mas Elena
style: Mas Elena Is Made With Grapes Grown Biodynamically.

name: Concha Y Toro  Casillero Del Diablo Black Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: A dark and intense red colour, this wine has a mix of flavours that attract, seduce and envelop. It has captivating notes of black fruit that intermingle with elegant touches of dark chocolate. It is versatile, particularly recommended with red meats and spicy dishes.

name: Toro De Piedra  Reserve Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short:
*Minimum Qty Allowed in Shopping Cart 6 Bottles.

This wine is pronouced aromas of black cherry, cedarwood and liquorice. full bodied with a good acidity that carries the fresh mouthfeel to the finish.

name: Enzo Bartoli  Barolo Bussia DOCG
desc_en_short: From the prestigious Bussia cru in the heart of Barolo, Enzo Bartoli's Barolo DOCG is a textbook expression of Nebbiolo — layered, structured, and built for the cellar, with a deep garnet hue, complex aromatics, and a long, polished finish.

name: Penfolds  Bin 389 Cabernet Shiraz (1.5 L) Limited Edition Box - Year of The Dragon 2024
Fraser Gallop Estate Margaret River Cabernet Merlot
desc_en_short:
A medium to full bodied and crimson red wine with vibrant ruby hues. Dusty mulberry,red berries, dried bay leaf, currants, sweet cedar nose, new cigar box aroma and some hints of dried herbs. Ripe fresh berry fruits, fleshy tannins but soft and supple.

The style of Cabernet Merlot we are making at Fraser Gallop Estate is a wine that has greater freshness from a short time on skins and short barrel maturation and good concentration of flavour that comes naturally from dry grown Cabernet Sauvignon in the blend.

name: Escorihuela Gascón Pequeñas Malbec
wine_color: Bright and concentrated red color with purple tones.
desc_en_short: Bright and concentrated red color with purple tones. Captivating aromas of ripe fruits such as plums, cherries, and blueberries. Notes of fresh violet and wild berries combine with earthy, smoky, and spicy hints. Broad and juicy with a sweet and fruity mouthfeel. Dry, fresh and flavourful midpalate Its young and velvety tannins are in balance with its fruity, persistence and intense finish.

name: Chateau Du Mont Haut-médoc AOC
desc_en_short:
Ripe dark berries and dark plums make for an attractive nose leading to a palate that has quite an assertive, grippy tannin frame. Chewy finish needs some time.

Gold Medal – Concours des Grands vins de France a Macon

Gold Medal – Concours des Feminalise

name: Chateau Passe Craby Bordeaux Superieur AOC
desc_en_short: Intense garnet color – purple reflections. The Nose is dense and greedy with notes of red and black fruits, blackberry, slightly spicy and vanilla. The palate is fleshy, with round tannins, a good length, light woody notes on the finish. To taste on duck aiguillettes – a braised ham or a roasted camembert.

name: Memoire de Maison Bouey Pauillac AOC
desc_en_short: Deep red color. Delicate bouquet with aromas of black cherry, licorice, crème de cassis, sour cherry, rose, iris, cedar, smoke, and incense. A robust wine, rich, dense and deep with a strong tannic structure.

name: Bosquet des Boiron Cotes du Rhone
desc_en_short: An intense red colour. This wine with delicate aromatic notes. Structured and soft tannins. Well balanced, it can be drunk young but has a good cellar potential.

name: Bosquet des Papes Chateauneuf-du-Pape Tradition Rouge
desc_en_short: A nice red purple colour with shiny highlights. On the nose, this Châteauneuf-du-Pape spreads aromas of little red berries. It has a sweeping silky smoothmouth.

name: Sartori di Verona Regolo Valpolicella Ripasso Superiore DOC
desc_en_short: Bright garnet red in colour. Its bouquet is characterized by intense aromas of undergrowth and spicy notes. Dry and velvety flavor with hints of cherry. Robust, persistent and harmonious body.

name: Oddero  Barbera D'Alba Superiore DOC
wine_color: Intense ruby-red color with purple tinges.
desc_en_short: Intense ruby-red color with purple tinges. A bouquet of cherry, blackberry, small red fruits, pepper and mineral flavors with an excellent dash of freshness. Tannins are soft and fresh in the mouth, maintaining the classic Barbera backbone, thanks to its pleasant acidity.

name: Pian delle Querci Brunello di Montalcino Riserva DOCG
desc_en_short: Intense red garnet. Intense and very complex, with notes of matured red fruits, sweet spices, toasted touch and underbrush sensation. On the palate the wine is smooth, elegant and fresh with a long and warm persistence.

name: Vite Colte Barbera d'Asti "San Nicolao" DOCG
desc_en_short: Ruby red shading to purple. Opulent and complex, with blueberry and violet notes. Dry, with rich and deep flavours, such as cherry and licorice. Silky texture remarkable for such a young Barbera.

name: Vite Colte Barolo del Comune di Serralunga d'Alba "Essenze" DOCG
desc_en_short: Red, tending towards garnet. Intense and complex, with notes of dried flowers, like rose and violet, as well as vanilla and tobacco. Dry and warm, with good body The long finish reveals ripe fruit and berries, along with balsamic notes.

name: Bindi Surgadi Sur Gardo Chianti Classico DOCG
desc_en_short: Intense ruby red in color. A full, fresh, fruity bouquet, with distinct notes of cherries and flowers. A round and soft palate, fused with much flavor, make this an extremely inviting and balanced wine. A long and elegant finish. A true and authentic expression of Sangiovese.

name: Tarapaca  Gran Reserva Organic
wine_color: Intense red in color with violet highlights

name: Chateau Labegorce Margaux
desc_en_short: Strong grilled oak on the nose that will settle down but definitely needs time. Black fruit comes through on the palate, and a ton of juice that is shot through the fruit and helps the entire thing to power along enjoyably. Good-quality. Drinking Window 2024 - 2042

name: Chateau Pedesclaux Pauillac
wine_color: Medium to deep garnet-purple in color.
desc_en_short: Like the very best wines of its appellation, Château Pédesclaux reflects its complex terroir. Pédesclaux embodies the density of Pauillac tempered by a unique sensuality. Complexity, depth, sensuality, freshness and tension.

name: La Valentina  Montepulciano d'Abruzzo DOC
wine_color: Deep ruby colour, with purple shadows.

name: Chateau Belair Monange  Saint-Emilion
wine_color: Medium to deep garnet-purple in color.
desc_en_short: Château Bélair-Monange combines the terroirs of the most privileged sites ofSaint-Émilion. The limestone from the central plateau parcels offers freshness,minerality, and delicate, lingering aromatics, while the dense, blue clay of theslopes provides intensity, length, and a unique elegance to the wine.

name: Chateau La Gaffeliere  Saint-Emilion 2018
desc_en_short:
The winter was very wet, so it was difficult to get into the vineyard before the beginning of April. Bud burst occurred in early April. We escaped two hailstorms at the end of May. Flowering was accompanied by heavy rainfall but fortunately fruit set was not much affected. Storms in June and July accentuated the pressure from mildew until véraison, which occurred at the end of July for the Merlot and during August for the Cabernet Franc.

Early August saw a heatwave, with temperatures approaching 40°C, causing some blockage at the end of véraison. We had to do some thinning on the Cabernet Franc for ripening purposes, by cutting out bunches showing delayed véraison. The whites were picked on 30/08 to maintain a certain acidity. The high temperatures and the mild weather allowed for harvesting in good conditions. Cool nights and warm days favoured finesse in the tannins.

name: Chateau Peby Faugeres  Saint-Emilion
wine_color: Medium to deep garnet-purple in color
desc_en_short: A very intense yet playfully ripe and balanced expression of dark plums, dark stones and blackberries. Then wait for the dark, leafy notes of dark tea and charcoal as well as deeply integrated wood aromas of violets and cloves. The palate moves on a very energized and fluid bed of tannin that builds very smoothly into an ascending finish. Plush, impressive and very composed. Super long and focused finish.

name: Chateau La Dame de Montrose  Saint-Estephe
wine_color: The colour is ruby red, bright and intense.
desc_en_short: 2018 marks an important step in the conversion of our vineyard to organic viticulture. The weather conditions resulted in strong pressure from parasites, requiring extreme vigilance. Vineyard management was complex, therefore, but the direction of our environmental approach was firmly maintained. The fine weather and heat at the end of summer, comparable to 2009, made the vintage, which expressed incredible potential in the cellar.The first tastings show the signs of a very great vintage, a subtle combination of the fruity aromatic profile of the 2009 and the precision of the 2016.

name: Chateau Leoville Las Cases  Saint-Julien
desc_en_short: The Grand Vin is the product of exceptional terroirs from the former Léoville estate. These terroirs are located mainly in the Clos Léoville Las Cases, which you pass as you leave Saint- Julien village for Pauillac. They extend over nearly 60ha producing Cabernet Sauvignons and Cabernet Francs with a complex, polished expression and characteristics which are totally unique to the Grand Vin of Léoville du Marquis de Las Cases and have been widely recognized for years.

name: Chateau Poujeaux (Moulis-en-Medoc)
desc_en_short: Chateau Grand Poujeaux 2018 displays a deep garnet colour. With its great aromatic richness, the bouquet reveals complex notes of red and black fruit. The very subtle wine envelopes the palate with its opulence and complexity, revealing a silky tannic structure. With great elegance and finesse, the palate persists long into the finish.

name: Domaine du Vieux Bourg  Chenas Au Bois Retour
1853 Old Vine Estate  Grand Reserve Heritage Malbec
1853 Old Vine Estate  Selected Parcel Malbec
desc_en_short: Savoury and spiced lingering attractive nose, with hints of redcurrants and raspberry. Palate is well balanced with good acidity.

name: Maison Castel  Merlot Pays d'Oc
desc_en_short: A classic Pays d'Oc Merlot from Maison Castel, brimming with red cherry and wild strawberry aromas, touched by warm spice, and finishing with an easy, lingering softness that makes it an effortless everyday pour.

name: Los Vascos Cromas Gran Reserva Carmenere
desc_en_short: A flagship expression of Carmenère from Domaines Barons de Rothschild's Los Vascos estate in Colchagua Valley, delivering ripe blackberry, plum, and black cherry alongside signature white pepper and herbaceous notes, with silky tannins and a beautifully balanced finish.

name: Los Vascos Chagual Reserva Cabernet Sauvignon
Spy Valley  Pinot Noir
desc_en_short: Alluring aromas of Red berry fruits and cinnamon. Fresh and vibrant on the palate with layers of plum and spice, creating a finely balanced and long finish.

name: Tenuta dell'Ornellaia  Ornellaia Bolgheri DOC
wine_color: With its usual deep ruby red colour.
desc_en_short: “With its usual deep ruby red colour, Ornellaia 2020 stands out on the nose with ripe red fruits and delicate vanilla and gentle tobacco notes. Upon tasting, the wine reveals itself to be rounded and velvety, making an enjoyable and engaging first impression that entices for a second sip. The tannins are dense yet elegant and the finish proves to be savoury and enduring.”

name: Rainer Wess  Zweigelt St.Laurent
desc_en_short: A characterful Austrian red blending Zweigelt and St. Laurent from Rainer Wess, delivering vibrant cherry fruit, silky texture, and bright acidity in a medium-bodied style that pairs beautifully with grilled meats, cured charcuterie, and boldly spiced dishes.

name: Dog Point  Pinot Noir
desc_en_short: A bright perfumed, supple expression of Marlborough pinot noir from clay hill slopes. The fruit is supported by bright florals of rose and violets with crunchy red berry fruit and dried herb notes. The palate is succulent with alluring red cherry, brown spices and silky fine boned tannins. This wine has all the makings of a long lived Marlborough pinot noir and matches perfectly with duck, red meats (particularly venison and lamb), and mushroom dishes.

name: Brendel  "Cooper's Reed" Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon
Dana Estates  Vaso Cabernet Sauvignon Napa Valley
style: Cabernet Sauvignon, 2% Petit Verdot, 1% Merlot, 1% Malbec, 1% Cabernet Franc
desc_en_short: Dana Estates' Vaso Cabernet Sauvignon from Napa Valley delivers a plush, full-bodied expression of blackberry compote, spiced plum, and savory herbs, framed by round, well-integrated tannins and a silky, creamy chocolate finish that is equally rewarding now or with further cellaring.

name: Durant & Booth  Bourbon Barrell Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon
style: Cabernet Sauvignon, 2% Petit Verdot, 2% Cabernet Franc

name: Joel Gott  Willamette Valley Pinot Noir
desc_en_short: Joel Gott's Willamette Valley Pinot Noir delivers classic Oregon elegance — ripe cherry, raspberry, and cola aromas layered with allspice, leading to a silky mid-palate and a long, delicate finish with a whisper of licorice.

name: Belle Glos " Eulenloch Vineyard" Napa Valley Pinot Noir
Louis Jadot  Côte de Nuits Villages
Louis Jadot  Santenay Clos De Malte
desc_en_short: Louis Jadot's Santenay Clos de Malte is a beautifully expressive Côte de Beaune Pinot Noir, offering bright red fruit aromatics of cherry, raspberry, and strawberry alongside gentle spice, fine structure, and a textured, terroir-driven finish that epitomises classic Burgundy.

name: Chateau Meyre  M De Haut Medoc
desc_en_short: This wine is Ruby Red color. aroma of Black fruit, cedarwood and blackberries. on the palate round simple.

name: Sileni Estates	 The Plateau Pinot Noir
Olek Bondonio  Barbera D’alba DOC
desc_en_short: Barbera from forty to eighty year old vines in his Altavilla vineyard, high in the hills above the city of Alba. It spent about a month on the skins, before being pressed off to botti for a year of rest. This is a Barbera of rare depth and complexity, with dense, brambly fruit and a welcome freshness thanks to the hallmark acidity for which the grape is so well known.

name: Chateau Lilian Ladouys  Saint-Estephe 2019
style: Merlot, 37% Cabernet Sauvignon, 3% Petit Verdot, 1% Cabernet Franc

name: Chateau La Fleur De Bouard  Le Lion De La Fleur De Bouard
desc_en_short: "Lots of blueberry and blackberry character with firm, chewy tannins and a flavorful finish. It’s full bodied and very polished. Plenty of tar and dark fruit."

name: Daou Cabernet Sauvignon Paso Robles
style: 80.4% Cabernet Sauvignon, 11.5% Petit Verdot, 7.8% Merlot, 0.3% Cabernet Franc

name: Granduc  Tempranillo Crianza
wine_color: An intense cherry color with copper ‐ colored shade.
desc_en_short: An intense cherry color with copper ‐ colored shade. Clean and bright hints of coffee, cinnamon and clove with spices. Roasted notes from ageing complex. very long aftertaste

name: Latue  Cabernet Sauvignon & Syrah (Organic & Vegan)
desc_en_short: An intense cherry color. Clean and bright aromas of red fruit with roasted and coffee hints liquorice, ripen fruits and plum jam tasty, elegant and well ‐ balanced with a nice finish.

name: R.A.W. Really Awesome Wine  Cabernet Tempranillo Merlot (Organic & Vegan)
desc_en_short: Really Awesome Wine. it is stand for pure, organic and vegan natural wines for people that love life as much as we do in the small town of villanueva de alcardete. A deep red purple colour and aromas of dark fruits and spices with hints of chocolate full and fruity.

name: Chateau Mouton Rothschild  2018 (Premiers Crus)
wine_color: The wine has an intense, deep black colour.
desc_en_short: At the tasting, the Château Mouton Rothschild 2018 reveals an intense, deep black colour. Intensely aromatic, the nose opens with notes of ripe fruit, evolving spicy notes of nutmeg. Fresh menthol aromas punctuate the bouquet. The wine weaves a gorgeous palate from the onset, revealing great scale and aromatic richness, especially delicious notes of black fruits and spices. With its beautiful structure, creamy texture and velvety, mouth-coating tannins, the wine provides a feeling of indulgence. The end of the palate is marked by a great finesse, stretching into a long finish. A magnificent vintage of Château Mouton Rothschild.

name: Chateau D'Armailhac  2019
wine_color: The wine is dark and deep with purple tints.
desc_en_short: The wine is a deep, garnet-hued red. The nose exudes intense black fruit aromas enhanced by notes of vanilla, pepper and mild spice. From a structured and sappy attack, the mid-palate reveals a creamy, satin-smooth body on the black fruit and chocolate flavors. Perfectly integrated, smooth and well-rounded tannins linger on a pleasant touch of fruit. Floral and licorice notes usher in a long and elegant finish.

name: Chateau Pichon Longueville Comtesse de Lalande 2017
wine_color: A medium to deep garnet-purple color
brand: Chateau Pichon Longueville Comtesse de Lalande
desc_en_short: "Tasting in a blind lineup across Pauillac, it is instantly clear that what you get in this glass is better clarity of fruit, a darker and more serious texture across the palate and some lovely saffron and cinnamon notes to fill out the body. This feels like a Pauillac and even though it doesn't have the concentration of bigger years, there is a lot to be delighted about here. Silky tannins, burnished confidence, well-handled oak. Wait just another five years then ready to go with a carafe." - 95 points Decanter

name: Chateau Pichon Longueville Comtesse de Lalande 2018
brand: Chateau Pichon Longueville Comtesse de Lalande
desc_en_short: "Lovely grilled and graphite notes right off the bat; this is big and muscular, and extremely Pauillac. There is grace here too, with raspberry purée, cassis, fig and blackberry fruits set against charcoal and fine tannins that quickly build up to suggest how well this will age. 1% Petit Verdot completes the blend. 60% new oak used. 13% press wine. Drinking Window 2026 - 2038 " - 98 points Decanter

name: Chris Ringland  North Barossa Shiraz
desc_en_short:
Vigneron Adrian Hoffmann and winemaker Chris Ringland have been working together for more than 25 years to develop the Hoffmann Vineyard signature labels; Reservation Shiraz, North Barossa Shiraz, Dimchurch Shiraz and Hoffmann Vineyard Shiraz.

The North Barossa Shiraz is a blend from 12 growers around the Ebenezer sub-region in the North of the Barossa. Neighbours, friends and relatives of the Hoffmann Family make up the group, many having tilled the land for three or more generations.

Extended maturation sees the wine aged in 20% new & 80% seasoned oak for up to 4 years, the 2016 receiving 45 months prior to blending and bottling under cork.

name: Bindi Surgadi La Boncia Chianti DOCG
desc_en_short:
Ruby red in color the wine has a full and intense fragrance with hints of
grapefruit and red fruits which bring to mind cherries and raspberries. On the palate, the wine is smooth and well-balanced. The finish is characterized by gentle tannins and the persistent flavor of the grapes which make it so delicious and easy to drink. It is meant to be drunk young in order to appreciate its freshness and its bouquet.

name: Pian Delle Querci  Brunello Di Montalcino DOCG
wine_color: A limpid intense ruby colour with garnet red nuances.
desc_en_short:
Brunello di Montalcino is made exclusively from Sangiovese grapes (locally named "Brunello") of Montalcino territory. This wine is, for our firm, the top product, left to age for three years in new 50 hectolitre barrels, in medium toasted oak from Slavonia and left to fine for at least 10 months in the bottle.

Its vinification is made by means of a middle-long soaking on the marcs with frequent and very intense gradual repassings in the early stages of the fermentation and with accurate control of the highest temperature.

Brunello has got a limpid intense ruby colour with garnet red nuances. Its aroma is ethereal and complex, fruity and oaky. Its flavour is delicate and persuasive with a valuable structure and tannin content. Its serving temperature is 20 degrees centigrade.

name: Vite Colte Barolo "Paesi Tuoi" DOCG
desc_en_short: Barolo "Paesi Tuoi" is made with the blending technique, which was typical as early as the beginning of the last century. This is the preferred technique of our estate, which concentrates on making elegant and well balanced wines.

name: Natura  Gioia Sangiovese Lazio Rosso IGP
desc_en_short: Intense ruby in colour. Strawberry, raspberry, and wild berries aromas. Medium bodied, good length and smooth tannins.

name: Natura  Tradizione Cabernet Lazio Rosso IGP
Baron Philippe de Rothschild  Escudo Rojo 'Origine' Cabernet Sauvignon
wine_color: Deep ruby red with a purple tint.
desc_en_short: The wine is refined and complex, intense, forward fruit, the nose that reveals wild strawberry, cherry, and blackcurrant aromas mingled with subtle, delicate notes of vanilla and almond.

name: Baron Philippe de Rothschild  Escudo Rojo Baronesa P.
wine_color: Deep ruby red with a purple tint.
desc_en_short:
Baronesa P. is a selection of our finest micro-terroirs, selected over a period of
several years based on our experience and understanding of these soils and vineyards.
Over many years and after producing countless batches, we refined our selection to
create this cuvée in honor of Baroness Philippine de Rothschild.

name: Georges Duboeuf  Beaujolais Nouveau 2024
wine_color: brilliant garnet color with purple reflections.

name: Joseph Drouhin  Beaujolais Villages Nouveau 2024
wine_color: Dark red colour, deep, with bluish tints.

name: Angove  Brightlands Shiraz
desc_en_short: Brightlands Shiraz is meticulously handcrafted during outstanding years, skilfully selecting and blending the very best single barrel from each of our two distinct and exceptional McLaren Vale vineyards, Angels Rise and Warboys. Each vineyard produces Shiraz with its own distinguished character, and when harmoniously combined, they give rise to a wine of remarkable intensity, depth, concentration, and ageing potential.

name: Velenosi  Solesta Rosso Piceno DOC Superiore
wine_color: Ruby with hues of red garnet
desc_en_short: A richly expressive Rosso Piceno Superiore from the Marche benchmark producer Velenosi, blending Montepulciano and Sangiovese into a harmonious, medium-bodied red layered with red currant, morello cherry, tobacco, and warming spices of cinnamon, licorice, and nutmeg.

name: Velenosi  Verso Sera Montepulciano d’Abruzzo DOCG Colline Teramane
desc_en_short: An intense, impenetrable ruby red. Intense and complex. Scents of ripe fruit such as plum, blackberry and currant give way to a bouquet of spices like tobacco and leather, typical of the variety. Complex and full-bodied with smooth, velvety tannins.

name: Tua Rita  Giusto di Notri IGT
desc_en_short: Open-hearted nose of ripe berry fruit, bright spice, very rich cherry, raspberry, slightly earthy undertone in the finish, complex. Flattering and red berry on the palate, opens promptly and clearly, still young, pleasant spicy undertone, complex and very drinkable. Ideal for barbecued ribs, steaks, grilled meats and mediumaged cheeses.

name: Concha Y Toro  Casillero Del Diablo Devil's Carnaval Fabulous Red
desc_en_short: Fabulous Red has an expressive colour, with fabulous and attractive plum and blackberry aromas that perfectly combine with vibrant textures. Ideal to enjoy with all kinds of meat and pasta, and perfect for celebrations accompanied with chicken wings, pulled pork or hamburgers.

name: Domaine Jaume  Vinsobres Altitude 420 AOP
desc_en_short: From the elevated hillside vineyards of Vinsobres in the southern Rhône, Domaine Jaume's Altitude 420 delivers a vibrant burst of blackcurrant and redcurrant on the nose, leading to a supple, long palate shaped by Grenache warmth and Syrah structure — an elegant expression of altitude-driven freshness.

name: Domaine Jaume  Vinsobres Reference Rouge AOP
desc_en_short: Domaine Jaume's Référence Rouge is the flagship red of this historic Southern Rhône estate, blending Syrah, Grenache, and Mourvèdre from limestone hillsides in Vinsobres AOP to deliver dark fruit richness, garrigue spice, and satisfying structure for everyday drinking and short-term cellaring alike.

name: Apollonio Terragnolo Negroamaro
wine_color: Intense ruby red with violet reflections that are almost impenetrable

name: Chateau Du Gazin Cannon Fronsac
desc_en_short: Aromas and flavors of blackberry, currant, and dark chocolate, creating a rich and indulgent experience. The texture is full and chewy with lots of firm tannins, culminating in a flavorful and satisfying finish.

name: Chateau Premeaux  Nuits Saint Georges
desc_en_short: Solid nose of red fruits and spices (pepper-cinnamon). Beautiful silky tannins; a perfectly balanced wine, medium (+) body and round.

name: Baron Philippe de Rothschild  Baron Nathaniel AOC Pauillac
desc_en_short: Opaque with tight purple rim. Complex nose packed with ripe berry fruits and big floral backing. Super rich palate filled with ripe berries, plum and dark cherry. Lots of sweet spice. Lively entry into the mouth where all the fruit fills the palate. Lovely freshness and lively tannins will ensure lots of good development to come.

name: Louis Latour  Les Chaillots Aloxe-Corton 1er Cru
desc_en_short: Aloxe-Corton is the home village of the Latour family who have been closely involved in the affairs of the commune for over three centuries. Of the total hectarage of this Premier Cru, Domaine Louis Latour controls over 90% of the production centred on the famous Château and cuverie of Corton-Grancey. These vines are an important part of Domaine Louis Latour. The name 'Les Chaillots' refers to the stony, pebbly nature of the soil in this vineyard, as 'caillou' means pebble in french. There is an alliance in the wines of Aloxe-Corton between the finesse of a Côte de Beaune and the mellow, powerful appeal of the Côte de Nuits.

name: Louis Latour  Echezeaux Grand Cru
desc_en_short: This is a superb vineyard situated above Clos Vougeot, between Vosne-Romanée and Vougeot in the Côte de Nuits. It belongs to the era of the Cîteaux Abbey. Echézeaux offers quite diverse and complex soils depending on each climate, all with an easterly exposure. Echézeaux is an exquisite red wine that is robust, solid, and completely harmonious. It is always a great wine to age.

name: Louis Latour  Romanée St Vivant Grand Cru
desc_en_short: The Latour family has been proprietors of a part of Romanée-Saint-Vivant since December 1898. "Les Quatre Journaux" is a magnificent plot of land situated at the South-West of Romanée Saint Vivant, a few meters from the Romanée-Conti vineyard. A "Journal" is an old Burgundian measurement corresponding to approximately 0.4 hectares (34,28 ares). Even though the Latours' initial purchase carried the entirety of the plot, half of it was sold some years later. Today Maison Louis Latour owns 0.8 hectares of Romanée-Saint-Vivant. It offers a marvelously aromatic wine, with a velvety texture which culminates in a persistent and powerful finish in the mouth. It is one of our greatest red wines.

name: Viu Manent  Single Vineyard Carmenere
desc_en_short:
With a deep purple color, the wine’s nose shows the typical varietal character of Carménère, with notes of berries and blueberry mixed with aromas of damp earth and black pepper. The palate is elegant and velvety with good structure and firm, silky tannins that add texture and balance, and lead to a long, pleasing finish.

Awards

- 91 Points Robert Parker's Wine Advocate

- 91 Points James Suckling

name: Giustini  Vecchio Sogno Negroamaro Salento IGP
Xige Estate  Jade Dove Single Varietal Cabernet Gernischt
Xige Estate  N50 (Cabernet Sauvignon, Cabernet Gernischt) (With package)
Xige Estate  N609 (Cabernet Sauvignon, Cabernet Gernischt and Malbec) (Wooden Case)
desc_en_short: A mountain-grown Ningxia red of real ambition, the Xige Estate N609 blends Cabernet Sauvignon, Cabernet Gernischt, and Malbec into a structured, darkly fruited wine shaped by high-altitude desert conditions on the Helan Mountain East Foothills.

name: Xige Estate  First Label, Helan Mountain Ningxia (Wooden Case)
wine_color: Deep ruby to opaque purple with youthful intensity.
desc_en_short: Xige Estate's First Label is a flagship expression from the Helan Mountain foothills of Ningxia, blending Cabernet Sauvignon and Cabernet Gernischt into a full-bodied, concentrated red with layered cedar, ripe dark fruit, spiced oak, and fine-grained tannins.

name: Donnafugata  Dea Vulcano Etna Rosso DOC
style: Nerello Mascalese, Small Part Of Nerello Cappuccio
grape_variety: Nerello Mascalese, Pinot Noir, Nerello Cappuccio, Pecorino
desc_en_short: Donnafugata's Dea Vulcano Etna Rosso is a refined expression of high-altitude Nerello Mascalese from Sicily's volcanic Mount Etna, offering wild strawberry, violet, and sweet tobacco in a fresh, elegantly structured red with silky, well-integrated tannins.

name: Luca & La Posta by Laura Catena  Luca Old Vine Malbec
brand: Luca & La Posta by Laura Catena
desc_en_short:
Spice and black cherry cola aromas with notes of cocoa. The berry flavors pop on the palate from its depth and lively acidity, finishing with hints of espresso.

Pairs well with foods such as venison or wild game, steak, pork, quail, all types of lamb, and medium-strong cheeses.

name: Dry Creek Vineyard  Heritage Zinfandel
desc_en_short: The 2020 Heritage Vines Zinfandel is delicious and wonderfully balanced. This vintage presents alluring aromatics of boysenberry, black raspberry and plum with nuances of toasty cedar, warm spices and white pepper. On the palate, brambly flavors of dark berries come forward. The wine is complex, with bright acidity complimented by deeper notes of nutmeg, cardamom and mocha. From start to finish, this remarkable wine offers refreshing acidity paired with excellent structure.

name: Martin Ray  Stags Leap Cabernet Sauvignon
Two Hands  Lily's Garden Shiraz McLaren
desc_en_short:
LILY’S GARDEN: The pick of the bunch from our McLaren Vale vineyards.

Lily’s Garden is a generous wine with cascading blue fruits and a rich long palate. General sand based soils provide lovely lifted aromatics, softness and roundness. The label’s blue colour takes inspiration from McLaren Vale’s close proximity to the sea.

name: Intipalka  Reserva Cabernet Sauvignon Syrah
desc_en_short: Intense red-viole color. Aroma of cherry and blackberry, horse farm, black current and sauteed mushroom and forest floor. The palate is same as aromas with shade of apple cider vinegar bbq sauce and smoky cedar.

name: Los Cerros De San Juan  Cuna De Piedra Estate Cabernet Franc
wine_color: Intense red color with violet tints.
desc_en_short: In our new vineyard in Colonia Sacramento, soil fertility is ensured with cultural tasks seeking excellence in pruning, bud removal, bunch thinning, and leaf removal. Conceived and produced in our wonderful facilities that showcase the most modern aspects of the industry with the greatest wealth of history in Uruguayan viticulture.

name: Los Cerros De San Juan  De La Colonia Tempranillo & Merlot
desc_en_short: A crisp, medium-bodied and fruity blended with velety tannins. This wine has the versatility and fruit character of Tempranillo combined with the complex texture and notable spiced aromas of the Merlot. A delightful red wine for any occasion.

name: Cellier Des Princes  Cotes du Rhone Grande Reserve
desc_en_short: This wine is a blend of three classic grape varieties from the Chateauneuf du Pape area: Grenache, Syrah and Mourvèdre. Grenache brings strengh, fatness and softness. Syrah brings the structure, the spices with aromas of violets and a deep ruby colour. Mourvèdre brings tannins and body. The oak treatment adds complexity, toasted notes of vanilla, grilled spices to the fruit driven base. This Grande Réserve Côtes du Rhône has a solid structure, good concentration, and ripe fruit. It is well balanced and shows a lot of elegance and finesse.

name: Cellier Des Princes  Cotes du Rhone Selection Vieilles Vigues
wine_color: This ruby red coloured wine with purple glints
desc_en_short: This ruby red coloured wine with purple glints develops red fruits aromas and spicy overtones. In the mouth, this wine is smooth and its supple structure emphasizes aromas. Fruitforward and easy drinking wine showing light spices and silky tannins. A perfect everyday wine.

name: Platinetti Guido  Ghemme DOCG Vigna Ronco Maso
desc_en_short: The heady aromas of Merlot, Croatina and Barbera mingle perfectly with floral notes and the small red berries of Nebbiolo, Vespolina and Bonarda Novarese, which are also reflected on the palate, giving a mouthfeel which is both soft and vibrant at the same time. It thus lends itself to simple food pairings such as cold cuts and savoury snacks in convivial company.

name: Platinetti Guido  Colline Novaresi Barbera Pieleo
desc_en_short: Floral and slightly herbal scent of mixed berries and cherries with some earthy tones. Straightforward and fruity in the mouth, noticeable acid bite, fine sandy tannin, dried-vegetable and slightly peppery spice on the palate, noticeable alcohol, some persistence, good, again quite fruity finish.

name: I Vigneri  Vinupetra Etna Rosso DOC
desc_en_short: In Sicilian dialect, Vinupetra means “wine produced in a land full of stones”. The cultivation of the vineyard is done by hand. using natural products. Biotechnologies are not used in winemaking.Racking and bottling are carried out according to the phases of the moon

name: Jacob's Creek  Cherry Red (750 ml)
wine_color: bright purple and red to the eye.
desc_en_short: Light body, full flavour. Jacob’s Creek Cherry Red is breaking away from typical red wine expectations. It is semi-sweet, it is approachable, playful and it does not follow the traditional codes of red wine. Perfect for light-hearted occasions.

name: Confidences De Prieure-Linchine 2019 "Le 2nd Vin De Chateau Prieure-Lichine"
wine_color: Dense, dark garnet color, drawing on purple in its youth.
desc_en_short: The modernity and fruitiness of a Second Wine with a savoury and charming structure, recalling the elegance typical of Margaux. Produced from younger vines, it is harvested, vinified and aged with the same care as the Grand Cru.

name: Fontanafredda  Dolcetto Briccotondo DOC
wine_color: A clear, ruby-red wine with violet highlights.
desc_en_short:
A clear, ruby-red wine with violet highlights. Its vinous bouquet is fruity, very intense and rather attractive and
persistent. Nicely dry, well-balanced and velvety, it has a light almondy aftertaste.

name: Fontanafredda  Barolo Del Commune di Serralunga D'Alba DOCG
wine_color: A bright, ruby red color, with bright garnet reflections.
desc_en_short: A Barolo with a bright, ruby red color, with bright garnet reflections, which has an intriguing bouquet to the nose and recalls withered rose and underwood. The intense fragrance leaves room for spicier, more complex and more elegant hints. In the mouth it’s silky, but at the same time, tense, rotund and vibrant. We can easily perceive an aroma of small red fruit, as well as a hint of mint. The tannin is young and energetic, and it expresses all its ageing potential, which is typical of a great Barolo.

name: Casarena 505 Malbec
desc_en_short: The grapes are carefully destemmed and go through a cold maceration during four days. The must is fermented at low temperatures (26°C/78.8°F) in order to obtain a higher aromatic quality. The fermentation is completed through smooth and delicate pump overs until it is time to rack the wine.

name: Penfolds  Bin 389 Cabernet Shiraz (1.5 L) Limited Relese Lunar New Year Snake Edition
desc_en_short:
Celebrate the Year of the Snake with an iconic Bin 389 Magnum presented in a Lunar New Year-inspired gift box.

Bin 389 was often referred to as ‘Baby Grange’, in part because components of the wine are matured in the same barrels that held the previous vintage of Grange. First made in 1960 by the legendary Max Schubert, this was the wine that helped forge Penfolds reputation with red wine drinkers by combining the structure of Cabernet Sauvignon with the richness of Shiraz. Exemplifying the judicious balance of fruit and oak, Bin 389 highlights the generous mid-palate Penfolds is known for.

name: Penfolds  RWT Bin 798 Shiraz Barossa Valley Limited Relese Lunar New Year Snake Edition
desc_en_short:
Celebrate the Year of the Snake with RWT Shiraz, a mark of refined excellence. Presented in a Lunar New Year gift box, it embodies the essence of prosperity and good fortune.

The initials RWT stand for ‘Red Winemaking Trial’, the name given to the project internally when developmental work began in the early 1990s. Naturally, now no longer a ‘trial’, RWT Shiraz was launched in May 2000 with the 1997 vintage. Stylistically, RWT is contemporary, opulent and finely tuned. An interesting contrast to the well-established Grange, which is a more concentrated, muscular and assertive style. RWT is made from Barossa Valley Shiraz grapes primarily selected for their aromatic qualities, varietal typicity, fine tannins and plush texture. Maturation in French oak provides another contrast to Grange. The result is a wine that redefines Barossa Valley Shiraz at the highest quality level. While delightfully approachable on release, RWT Bin 798 has the concentration and balance to age for many years.

name: Penfolds  Bin 707 Cabernet Sauvignon Limited Relese Lunar New Year Snake Edition
desc_en_short:
Welcome the Year of the Snake with Bin 707, a testament to timeless elegance. Presented in a Lunar New Year gift box, this iconic wine celebrates the promise of a prosperous year.

Bin 707 is a perfect Cabernet Sauvignon representation of Penfolds ‘House Style’: intensely flavoured fruit; completion of fermentation and maturation in new oak; expressing a Penfolds understanding of multi-vineyard, multi-region fruit sourcing. Bin 707 was first vintaged in 1964. The wine was not made from 1970 to 1975 (when fruit was directed to other wines) nor in 1981, 1995, 2000, 2003, 2011, 2017 or 2020 (when fruit of the required style and quality was not available). Full-bodied and with proven cellaring potential, Bin 707 retains a secure place among the ranks of Australia’s finest Cabernets.

name: Penfolds  Grange Bin 95 Shiraz Limited Relese Lunar New Year Snake Edition
wine_color: Dense and impenetrable – deep red to the rim.
desc_en_short:
Gift your loved ones a symbol of strength, vitality, and generosity this Lunar New Year. Celebrate the Year of the Snake with an iconic Grange encased in a bespoke gift box.

The most powerful expression of Penfolds multi-vineyard, multi-district blending philosophy, Grange is arguably Australia’s most celebrated wine and is officially listed as a Heritage Icon of South Australia. Crafted utilising fully ripe, intensely flavoured and structured Shiraz grapes, the result is a unique Australian style that is now recognised as one of the most consistent of the world’s great wines. With an unbroken line of vintages from the experimental 1951, Grange clearly demonstrates the synergy between Shiraz and the soils and climates of South Australia.

name: Idi Di Marzo Atto Finale - Organic
desc_en_short: Aromas of cassis, blackberries, leather and spices. The taste is extremely powerful and intense with fruity notes of blackberry and rose hips, combined with an incredible finish.

name: Château Du Couvent  Pomerol
desc_en_short: The wine of the Château du Couvent comes from vineyards located in the world famous Pomerol belonging to the Bordeaux. These wines are known for their smoothness combined with refinement. The grape varieties for Château du Couvent are mainly Merlot (70%) supplemented with 30% Cabernet Franc and Malbec. After fermentation, the red wine matures for about 18 months in small oak casks, one quarter of which is renewed annually. Château du Couvent belongs to the much older Clos René with which the wine cellar is shared. Aged in oak and with a soft elegant taste.

name: L'Esprit de Chevalier Pessac Leognan Second wine of Domaine de Chevalier
wine_color: Very intense color, black in the middle.
desc_en_short: The second wine of the legendary Domaine de Chevalier, L'Esprit de Chevalier delivers the soul of this Pessac-Léognan estate in a polished, approachable package — blending Cabernet Sauvignon's structure with Merlot's supple fruit for a Graves red of genuine class.

name: Duluc De Branaire Ducru Saint-Julien Second wine of Chateau Branaire-Ducru
desc_en_short: This second wine reveals itself as a true competitor to many first wines, thanks to its impressive structure and aromatic balance. A supple wine full of freshness, that can be drunk as of now.

name: Sarget De Gruaud Larose Saint-Julien Second wine of Chateau Gruaud Larose
grape_variety: Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, Cabernet Franc, Petit Verdot
desc_en_short: "The 2016 Sarget de Gruaud Larose is a blend of 51% Cabernet Sauvignon and 31% Merlot with smaller parts of Cabernet Franc and Petit Verdot, bottled in May 2018. Medium to deep garnet-purple colored, it offers up expressive redcurrants and blackberry compote notes with hints of cassis, unsmoked cigars, dried herbs and rose hip tea. Medium-bodied, soft, very fresh and with exhilarating vibrancy, it has loads of mineral sparks on the finish."

name: Chevalier De Lascombes Second wine of Chateau Lascombes
desc_en_short: The Queen of the Medoc the wines from Marguax are the most feminine of the great growths of Bordeaux. The Lurton family control many of the estates and Chateau Brane Cantenac 2nd Great Growth is run with meticulous care by Henri Lurton.

name: Chateau Lagrezette Paragon Malbec
wine_color: Dark purplish red color, almost black.
desc_en_short: For this great cuvée produced in plot selection, the grapes are delicately and rigorously harvested by hand. A great wine to keep many times awarded by critics around the world, Paragon, as its name suggests, represents our purest gem of the Landiech region. This nectar can age and improve for more than 25 years.

name: Fantini Sangiovese Terre Di Chieti
desc_en_short: Garnet red color. Intense and persistent, fruity with a winy note and wood flavor. A medium -bodied wine, good tannins, balanced and ready to drink.

name: Maison Jaffelin  Chorey Les Beaune Rouge
desc_en_short: The grapes are handpicked and sorted by hand. Maceration last around 2 weeks with the extraction carried out mainly via pumping over operations (remontage) in order not to extract too much bitterness. The grapes are entirely destemmed. The wines are aged for 16-18 months in French oak barrels, of which around 20% are new.

name: Chateau Fombrion  Cuvee La Griveliere
desc_en_short: This Cabernet and Merlot blend is owned by the courtiers Horeau-Beylot (founded in 1740), one of the oldest such in Bordeaux.

name: Antichello Valpolicella Ripasso DOC Superiore
wine_color: Deep ruby red with garnet hues.
desc_en_short: Rich and velvety Valpolicella Ripasso bursting with cherries, plums, blackberries, spice, and chocolate — perfect for grilled meats and cheeses.

name: Chateau La fon Du Berger Pauillac
wine_color: Displaying a deep ruby color with garnet hues
desc_en_short: Classic Pauillac elegance with Cabernet Sauvignon and Merlot - dark fruits, floral spice, firm tannins, and long finish. Perfect with lamb or fine red meats.

name: Domaine Pierre-André Dumas Les Pierreuses Brouilly
wine_color: Pouring a deep ruby red with delicate purple hues
desc_en_short: Elegant Brouilly (Beaujolais) from Gamay — vibrant cherry, raspberry, and strawberry notes, fine tannins, and mineral elegance. A versatile red for meats, cheeses, and light dishes.

name: Chateau Fleur la Mothe Medoc Cru Bourgeois
desc_en_short: Refined Médoc Cru Bourgeois blending Merlot & Cabernet Sauvignon , layered with black fruits, fine tannins, and elegant structure — perfect for grilled meats and fine cheeses.

name: Palmila Cabernet Sauvignon
style: Cabernet Sauvignon (คาเบอร์เนต์ โซวีญง)
desc_en_short: A bold Cabernet Sauvignon from Maule Valley, Chile, with ripe blackcurrant, plum, and spice. A well-structured Reserva-level wine with smooth tannins and a lingering oak-kissed finish.

name: Palmila Merlot
desc_en_short: Smooth and fruit-forward Merlot from Chile, offering ripe plum, blackberry, and soft vanilla notes. Silky tannins and a velvety finish make it perfect for pairing with pasta, roasted meats, and mild cheeses.

name: Chateau Haut-Brion  Le Clarence de Haut-Brion 2020
wine_color: A very beautiful vivid purple colour
brand: Chateau Haut-Brion  Le Clarence de Haut-Brion
desc_en_short: A very beautiful vivid purple colour, along with a superb nose, revealing ripeness on aromas of blackcurrant and cherry. There are scents of fresh red fruit and woody, spicy hints of great elegance. The first taste is tightly-knit and flavoursome, then the wine progresses, with excellent concentration, powerful, but never dry. The tannins are tightly-knit and plump. Marvellous length on the palate, fruity and pleasant. This is a superb Clarence de Haut-Brion, flawless and very well-balanced.

name: Chateau Haut-Brion  Le Clarence de Haut-Brion 2019
wine_color: A very beautiful vivid purple colour
brand: Chateau Haut-Brion  Le Clarence de Haut-Brion
desc_en_short: Tasted en primeur, the Le Clarence de Haut-Brion 2019 catches the eye with its beautiful dark red colour. The intense aromatic bouquet charms the nose with its notes of red fruits. From the start, the palate reveals a beautiful substance, with a tannic structure that is both tight and mouth-coating. The freshness of the fruit stretches out on a long and lingering palate, leaving a pleasant sensation on the palate. Reminiscent of the 2006, the Le Clarence de Haut-Brion 2019 has all the character of a Grand Cru and will delight wine lovers even in its youth.

name: La Chapelle  de la Mission Haut-Brion 2019
style: Merlot, 40% Cabernet Sauvignon And 10% Cabernet Franc
desc_en_short: Rich, ripe fruit flavors such as blackcurrant and plum, along with earthy nuances of tobacco, graphite, and a hint of spice. Medium to full-bodied with silky, integrated tannins. The fruit character is concentrated and ripe, with layers of dark fruit flavors, earthy nuances, and a hint of oak. The texture is smooth, and the wine is balanced, with good acidity. Long, elegant, and refined, with a touch of minerality and spice lingering.

name: Chateau Kirwan 2021
grape_variety: Cabernet Sauvignon, Cabernet Franc, Petit Verdot
desc_en_short: An elegant, spicy Kirwan that showcases the fresher side of the Margaux plateau.

name: Altos de Rioja  Altos R Reserva
desc_en_short: The Altos R Reserva shows this impressively, already in the fragrance it indicates its fullness. The aroma is reminiscent of leather, dark berries, spices, as well as light roasted aromas and cherries. The taste with its smooth tannin is very typical of the opulent wine style of Altos R, while it also shows a lot of depth, not least due to the 40 to 80-year-old Tempranillo vines, which provide the grapes for this top wine. The wine is now in its best drinking phase, which it will keep for a few years.

name: Fly By  Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Very ripe, very deep and moderately tannic, this potent and full-bodied wine oozes dried cherries, dried plums and black-fig flavors over ample, oaky, vanilla and nutmeg notes..

name: Tenuta San Guido  Sassicaia 2020
wine_color: Medium purple colour, the bottom of the glass is clearly visible.
desc_en_short:
96 points Wine Advocate

The Tenuta San Guido 2020 Bolgheri Sassicaia speaks to those who seek a more voluptuous, opulent and, ultimately, more accessible wine. This vintage is a precise reflection of Coastal Tuscany, as opposed to a more generic "Tuscan" wine from elsewhere in this large central Italian region. You taste the ripeness and soft fruit weight that comes from a coastal appellation with especially bright luminosity and warm Mediterranean offshore breezes. Sassicaia from the cool vintages is a famously reticent or withholding wine in its earliest years, requiring a long lead time before it eases into an ideal drinking window. That's definitely not the case here. This wine is beautiful and compelling straight out of the gate, showing a lovely mix of dark fruit, oak spice, balanced freshness, textural richness, soft tannins and an expertly contained 14% alcohol content. The wine's immediate character is what distinguishes this vintage, and I wouldn't get too fussed by exaggerated cellar-aging ambitions. The wine awards sheer pleasure in its current form, with dazzling primary fruit and soaring intensity over the near and medium term. Reviewed by Monica Larner, Issue date: January 2023. Drinking window: 2024 - 2042.

name: Tenuta San Guido  Sassicaia 2021
wine_color: Medium purple colour, the bottom of the glass is clearly visible.
desc_en_short:
100 points Wine Advocate

Here it is: A quintessential Sassicaia that represents the excellence of the vintage and also respects the unique taste profile of this distinguished Tuscan blend of Cabernets Sauvignon and Franc. The Tenuta San Guido 2021 Bolgheri Sassicaia offers impeccable balance, excellent freshness and absolutely no signs of over-ripeness. The fruit balance is ideal with a hint of crunch and lasting tension from pulp and skins. The tannins are deftly managed with firm grip and enough velvetiness to add volume and length. There is no greenness on the bouquet that instead offers mulled herbs and spice, with cinnamon and clove, layered delicately between mostly red and some purple berry fruits. Redcurrant, blueberry, sweet pomegranate and Rainier cherry run strong in this vintage. A fragrant hint of heritage rose emerges with time. The oak tones are geared toward gingerbread, hazelnut, cigar, sandalwood and something like a grilled sweet red pepper. To the palate, it offers nice weight with no heavy glycerin, and a rinse of acidity that adds to the wine’s natural energy, brightness and viscosity. That marked freshness opens the wine up to long aging potential, but you still need to give it more time in bottle.

name: Chateau Canon  2020
wine_color: The color is a healthy dark ruby/purple.
desc_en_short: The brilliant 2020 Canon looks set to surpass both the 2019 and 2016 as this estate's finest wine since the post-war period, though like many of the best 2020s, it will require more patience than its 2019 counterpart. Unwinding in the glass with aromas of cherries and raspberries mingled with notions of exotic spices and iris, it's medium to full-bodied, deep and concentrated, with vibrant acids and beautifully polished, chalky tannins. Pure and precise, it concludes with a long, mouthwatering finish. This beautifully constructed wine communicates the essence of this superb limestone terroir, and it will be worth a special effort to track down and cellar.

name: Planeta  Maroccoli Syrah
desc_en_short: Sweet oriental spices and a faint memory of toasted cocoa accompany the wine in all its tasting phases, now opening a space to distinct and sunny black fruit, now to more wintery notes of leather and hummus. A captivating hint recalling the consistency of velvet with a finish of mint and black pepper.

name: Clarendelle  Medoc Red
desc_en_short: Clarendelle Medoc, Inspired by Haut-Brion, is a delicate and elegant red wine. Like the great Medocs, often quite tannic when young, it becomes more balanced with age. Clarendelle Medoc, Inspired by Haut-Brion, is a subtle blend of two traditional grape varieties from Bordeaux: Merlot and Cabernet Sauvignon. We find in this wine all the complexity and character of its terroir.

name: Clarendelle  Saint-Emilion Red
wine_color: Brilliant colour, with a beautiful, dark red hue.
desc_en_short: Clarendelle Saint-Émilion, Inspired by Haut-Brion, is a subtle blend of three traditional Bordeaux grape varieties: Merlot, Cabernet Franc and Cabernet Sauvignon. This wine expresses all the mystery of Saint-Émilion, with this unique style. It is a real wine of pleasure and sharing.

name: Domaine Jaume Vinea Natura AOP
wine_color: Deep ruby with garnet highlights—intense and richly hued.
desc_en_short: Vinea Natura from Domaine Jaume is an organically farmed Rhône red blending Grenache and Syrah with minimal intervention, delivering a vivid, terroir-driven expression of southern France's wild garrigue landscape and sun-drenched fruit.

name: Baron Philippe de Rothschild  Mouton Cadet Bordeaux Rouge Bio "Pierre"
wine_color: Cherry red with a poppy hue.
desc_en_short:
This light and succulent, organic and vegan red wine is made with Merlot, the king of Bordeaux grape varieties. It will suit all occasions, whether as an aperitif or as a match for simple food.

Best enjoyed chilled : 8-10°C, served in an ice bucket or from the refrigerator.

name: Chateau Lafite-Rothschild  2019
wine_color: Very dark color, with purple glints, indicating that the wine is still very much in its youth.

name: Maxime Cheurlin Noellat Chambolle-Musigny 1er Cru Les Noirots
desc_en_short:
Georges Noellat was the nephew of Charles Noellat, who was once the proprietor of one of Vosne’s greatest domaines, a domaine who made important contributions to Domaines Jean-Jacques Confuron and Hudelot Noellat and even formed the vast majority of Domaine Leroy. As of 1990, Domaine Georges Noellat sold its production to Jadot and Drouhin for 20 years. Enter 20-year-old Maxime Cheurlin in 2010, who consequently took over the management of the estate from his grandmother.

Cheurlin grew up in Champagne, but it seems Burgundy wine is truly in his blood, as he is a nephew of the Jayer family and a cousin of Emmanuel Rouget’s sons. He complemented his winemaking studies at the Lycee du Viticole in Beaune with stages at Domaine Emmanuel Rouget and Domaine Gros Frere et Soeur in 2009.

name: 2:am  Shiraz McLaren Vale
desc_en_short: Lifted aromas of dark cherry, blackberry and mocha combine with hints of baking spice and vanilla. The palate is concentrated, with rich flavours of cedar oak, plum and subtle hints of coconut and caramel on a firm yet inviting tannin structure. Pair with mushrooms and polenta, barbecued red meats or rich slow cooked stews. Drink this premium drop now or cellar it for up to 10 years.

name: Cantine Di Ora Valpolicella Ripasso Superiore D.O.C. Superiore
desc_en_short:
Intense ruby red, with an evolved
bouquet of cherries. Round and
full-bodied taste with notes of
berries and dried plums.

name: Reguta Altropasso Tre Venezie I.G.P.
wine_color: Ruby red with purple nuances to garnet with aging.
desc_en_short:
Ruby red with purple nuances to
garnet with aging. A very elegant
wine. It contains fruity flavours
like blueberry and blackberry with
toasted and vanilla high quality
notes. It is soft,full - bodied and
persistent at palate.

name: Maturana Wines  Reserva Privada Cabernet Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Intense red colour, aromas of cherries and plum, and a touch of toasted oak. On the palate it has a pleasant texture and delicate notes of chocolate and blackberry.

name: Freixenet  Cordon Rosado Brut
wine_color: bright strawberry in colour with plenty of bubbles
desc_en_short: Cordon Negro Rosé's bright, fruity personality envelops the senses in the glass with fresh raspberry and fruit cocktail aromas. The toasty palate mixes strawberry jam and red currant to deliver a pleasant mouth feel, wrapped up in a slow, light, sweet finish.

name: Bisol & Figli  Jeio Prosecco Extra Dry
wine_color: Brilliant, straw yellow with some lime-green highlights and a fine and lively perlage.
desc_en_short: Brilliant, straw yellow with some lime-green highlights. extremely fresh and elegant with fruity notes that emerge pleasantly on the nose. The characteristic fruity notes also appear on the palate exalting a particularly mellow flavour. The wine meals as an aperitif or as an accom - paniment for light foods.

name: Nino Franco  Prosecco Spumante Superiore "Rustico"
desc_en_short: Fruity and flowery, evident notes of Williams pear and white flowers. At the palate, soft texture; delicate and crystal-like. Ideal serving with finger food,” tapas,” light hors d’oeuvre and delicate dishes.

name: Nino Franco  Prosecco Spumante Superiore "Primo Franco"
desc_en_short: Intense bouquet of exotic fruit and ripe apples with notes of almond and candied lemon peel. In the mouth smooth and creamy with a nice core of ripe grape and apple flavours that gain complexity on the finish , balanced, with a pleasant freshness. Unexpectedly great with salty snacks, meat and spicy foods. Traditionally served with pastries, fruit tarts, “macaroons”,“semifreddi” or custards.

name: Prego Nero  Prosecco Brut
wine_color: Straw yellow with lightly green hints.
desc_en_short: Straw yellow with lightly green hints. Fruity (apple, pear, light hints of apricot and citron) and floral (white and meadow flowers),fresh and pleasant. Elegant on the palate, slightly soft with a fruity aftertaste and subtle floral persistence. An aperitif for the entire meal with delicate foods.

name: Cinzano  Prosecco DOC
wine_color: Pale straw yellow with light green reflections.
desc_en_short: Cinzano Prosecco is a brilliant straw yellow color, an intense floral and aromatic apple and a full flavor, dry and lively. Sparkling wine is very versatile, excellent aperitif, perfect for toast and accompany light food.

name: Fantini  Gran Cuvee Bianco
desc_en_short: Brilliant straw yellow. Complex perfume, with hints of green citrus fruits and foral aromas. Elegant and persistent perlage. In the mouth, it’s elegant, mineral, fresh and well-balanced. It matches perfectly with all kinds of food, in particular with seafood. Good served as aperitif.

name: Villa Sandi  Blanc De Blancs Spumante Brut
wine_color: Pale straw yellow with greenish reflections.
desc_en_short: Pale straw yellow with greenish reflections. The bouquet is fruity and floral with delicate hints of golden apple unripe. The flavor is dry, fresh with notes of artemisia. This wine is suitable for raw crustaceans and molluscs, and ham melon. Excellent as an aperitif and between meals Serve at: 6-8 ° C

name: Gosset Champagne "Grand Reserve Brut"
wine_color: Pale gold/yellow in colour, light, limpid and crystalline, fizzing with thousands of bubbles.

name: Veuve Clicquot  Brut Yellow Label (Magnum) (1.5 L)
desc_en_short:
Winemaker's Notes

A Champagne House is eventually judged on the quality of its Brut Non Vintage. It is in the making of such a wine that the true Art of Champagne blending reveals itself.

This is an art in which the House of Veuve Clicquot excels. Our Brut Yellow Label reflects the superb vineyards we own and the consistent nature of our House style.

The predominance of Pinot Noir provides the structure that is so typically Clicquot, while a touch of Pinot Meunier rounds out the blend. Chardonnay adds the elegance and finesse essential in a perfectly balanced wine.

name: Moet & Chandon  Grand Vintage 2015
wine_color: Pale bright yellow, green reflections, a fine, persistent bead.
desc_en_short:
Each Grand Vintage is unique, expressing Moët & Chandon’s Cellar Master's personal interpretation of the year. In Champagne, 2015 was a year of tension, dramatic heat, uncertainty…

Moët & Chandon Grand Vintage 2015 evokes an awakening, the first rays of a day full of promise – a luminous morning aura. The 76th vintage in the history of the House, it is an initiation into Moët & Chandon’s journey of light.

name: Moet & Chandon  Brut Imperial (Jeroboam) (3 L)
wine_color: An elegant golden straw yellow with green highlights.
desc_en_short: Moet Imperial is the House iconic champagne. Created in 1869, it embodies Moet and Chandon unique style, a style distinguished by its bright fruitiness, its seductive palate and its elegant maturity.

name: Moet & Chandon  Brut Imperial Methuselah (6 L)
wine_color: An elegant golden straw yellow with green highlights.
desc_en_short: Lively and generous, Brut Imperial distinguishes itself by a bright fruitiness, a seductive palate and an elegant maturity, that continually seduce and delight.

name: Dom Perignon  (luminated label)
desc_en_short: "The wine’s opulence – contained and succulent, round at heart – reveals itself in the mouth". The envelope slides and stretches, and the wine becomes more complex and edgy, silkier than it is creamy. "The whole eventually melts into an exquisite bitterness tinged with the briny taste of the sea".

name: Armand de Brignac  Brut Gold
wine_color: Bright gold with a strong bead.
desc_en_short: The first release from Armand de Brignac, the Brut Gold remains the most iconic cuvée in the range. Rich with the old world traditions of champagne blending, it is a trio of vintages from some of the most lauded terroirs in the region, resulting in a prestige cuvée that expresses vibrant fresh fruit character, and layers of complexity.

name: Freixenet  Cordon Negro Brut (200 ml)
desc_en_short:
*Minimum Qty Allowed in Shopping Cart 12 Bottles.

87 Points > "Freixenet's signature Cava is consistent and pure as usual, with aromas of white fruit and white pepper and an overall freshness on the nose. It feels crisp and focused, with a foamy palate that brings apple, lime, peach and spice flavors. The finish is smooth." - Wine Enthusiast Magazine

name: Bortolomiol  Prior Valdobbiadane Prosecco Superiore Docg
desc_en_short: Straw-yellow. Fresh fruits (apple) take centre stage on the nose with a touch of chamomile and fresh mint. Fresh, savoury palate showing lovely volume and structure. The finish is slightly bitter and tannic. A nicely fashioned, characterful wine.

name: Cornerstone  Sparkling Brut
food_matching: Oysters, Caviar, Fried Foods, Appetizers, Celebration
desc_en_short: The golden yellow colour of this blanc de Blancs and its delicate bubbles highlight the finesse of its effervescence. Its fruity nose with notes of yellow fruit, peach and apricot, gives way to a pleasant and soft palate.

name: Martini  Asti  DOCG
wine_color: Light green gold color with a fine and long-lasting bubble.
desc_en_short: MARTINI®’s original sparkling wine. Produced from the aromatic Moscato Bianco grape grown in the unique climate of Asti in the Piemont region. Delicious after dinner as a sweet conclusion to the evening.

name: Martini  Rose
desc_en_short: Elegance, born from MARTINI & ROSSI® and the hands of winemakers who masterfully managed to create a pearl in shades of pink. This soft, sweet sparkling wine, with an enticing aroma and delicate notes of raspberry and wild rose, proves excellent as an aperitif or for a picnic with friends.

name: Martini  Prosecco DOC
desc_en_short: One of the few authentic Proseccos from the hills of Treviso. Dry, with notes of apple, banana and thyme, this crisp sparkling wine works equally well in refreshing the palate before a meal, as it does as an aperitivo accompaniment.

name: Eugenio Collavini  Ribolla Gialla Spumante
wine_color: The star-bright straw yellow in the glass is flecked with greenish tints and the unbroken stream of tiny bubbles is very persistent.
desc_en_short: The star-bright straw yellow in the glass is flecked with greenish tints and the unbroken stream of tiny bubbles is very persistent. Subtle aromatics delight the nostrils with hints of nectarine, white figs and green apples that meld with velvety smoothness and hints of minerality. Very fresh-tasting and generously structured in the mouth, where a kaleidoscope of citrus fruits complements the exceptional length. Food matching as an aperitif or with fish and shellfish-based dishes. Equally outstanding as an anytime wine, or to drink through the meal, unless red meats or game are on the menu.

name: Lanson Champagne  Black Label Brut
style: Pinot Noir, 35% Chardonnay And 15% Pinot Meunier
desc_en_short: Black Label's brilliant color recalls the characteristic straw tones of the Pinot Noir, with glints of amber. It is lively in the flute, with a fine stream of persistent bubbles. Its fresh aromas combine the impression of vitality and spring-time scents, together with hints of toast and honey. On the palate, bouquets of ripe fruits and citrus create a sensation of opulence yet lightness.

name: Marta Cava  Reserva Brut
wine_color: presents a pale yellow coloured cava with fine and persistent bubbles.
desc_en_short: Blend of our native varieties grapes Xarel.lo, Macabeu and Parellada. Cava Reserva: second fermentation in the bottle ageing on the yeast for more than 24 months in our cellars where developed the prefect maturity and aromatic potential.

name: Barocco  Prosecco Spumante DOC
desc_en_short: A pale light yellow colour, with a delicate and complex bouquet with fruity notes of peach and green apple. Fresh and light on the palate, with balanced acidity and body. Soft and easy to drink this is an outstanding Prosecco for the price.

name: Angove  Chalk Hill Blue Bubbles
desc_en_short: Pale gold with sparkling bubbles, yeast and stone fruit aromas precede a luscious, apple, pear and strawberry fruit filled palate.

name: Maison de Grand Esprit  L'Etre Magique Cremant De Bourgogne
desc_en_short:
WINEMAKING

100% stainless steel. Method Champenoise with 12 months bottle aging. This wine is a blend of multiple vintages to achieve consistent quality across the years. The second ferment is completed in bottle for a minimum of 12 months.

name: Concha Y Toro  Casillero Del Diablo Devil's Brut
desc_en_short: With a touch of glamour and distinction imposed by its groundbreaking style, this sparkling wine offers the experience of unsurpassed freshness and elegance. Ideal with appetizers and starters made with fish and/or shellfish. Pairs perfectly with Japanese foods, especially sushi.

name: Freixenet  Can Sala Brut Nature
wine_color: Intense yellow in colour, reflecting its years in bottle. The mousse is elegant and long lasting, showing excellent crown.
desc_en_short: A cava with an intense yellow colour that reflects its seven years of aging, with an elegant and persistent bubble. On the nose it is clean, with hints of compote and ripe fruit, with a prevalence of peach. A long, full-bodied cava that is very pleasant to drink.

name: Juvé & Camps  Cava Brut Rose Pinot Noir
desc_en_short:
With this beautiful, lively and intense pink color cava, made exclusively with the Pinot Noir variety, we want to show its most authentic character.
