Grown in our Espiells estate, a singular vineyard with the ideal conditions for the good development of the vines, the poor chalky soils are key for the best expression of the varietal grapes. We find hints of red berries in both nose and mouth, with a wonderful and luscious taste. Lively and well-integrated bubbles, freshness, long aftertaste… definitively, this cava will not leave you indifferent.

name: Champagne Drappier  Rose de Saignee
desc_en_short:
Tasting Notes

Very well structured, with exemplary purity of red fruits. A striking Champagne on the nose offering similar sensations on the palate. Warm and satiny, lightly spiced with balanced hints of stoned fruits thanks to a lovely freshness in the finish.

name: Champagne Philipponnat Royal Reserve Rose
wine_color: Salmon pink in colour with coppery glints. Delicate, creamy and lingering froth.
desc_en_short: Light in colour and packed with intense flavour, this is a fresh and elegant wine. In keeping with the House style, Royale Réserve Rosé is distinctive for its delicate bouquet of complex, fruit-filled aromas. In the mouth the attack is precise, with hints of spice enhanced by notes of fruit. This elegant Rosé is perfect as an aperitif and goes marvellously well with smoked meats and fish, charcuterie and desserts made with red summer berries.

name: Champagne Philipponnat  Grand Blanc Extra Brut
wine_color: Light gold in colour with a delicate, abundant mousse.
desc_en_short:
Grand Blanc, blended exclusively from Chardonnay grapes, is
a remarkable exception in Philipponnat's range of wines, the
House’s hallmark being the Pinot Noir grape. This is a unique
opportunity to discover another facet of the House’s style in
the shape of a fine, moderately dosed blanc de blancs.

name: Champagne Duval Leroy  Fleur de Premier Cru
wine_color: it is veiled with fine, satiny bubbles.
desc_en_short: Elegant and well-structured, it is veiled with fine, satiny bubbles. Bringing together a long, well-balanced taste and a cultivated, distinguished character, this champagne is a harmonious prelude to a delicious meal. Derived from a lively cuvee, a lofty, fragrant source with a hint of minerals, it will capture the memories of shared emotions for a very long time.

name: Barocco  Prosecco Spumante Rose DOC
wine_color: Fine bright perlage, light rosé  colour
desc_en_short: Delicate and complex bouquet with fruity notes that remind of peach, green apple and lemon. Floral notes of acacia and rose. Fresh and light on the palate, with balanced acidity and body; Round and full bodied structure.

name: Louis Roederer  Collection 242
style: Chardonnay, 36% Pinot Noir And 22% Pinot Meunier

name: Bottega  Gold Magnifico Set
wine_color: Brilliant, fine and persistent perlage. Light straw yellow.

name: Piper-Heidsieck  Riviera
wine_color: Gold colour, fine bead, bronze highlights.

name: Antech  Cuvee Elegance Brut AOC Blanquette de Limoux
desc_en_short: The careful selection of our Mauzac juices combined with different dosages, results in subtle orchard fruit variations, and highlights this rare, local grape grown only in two regions in the South of France.

name: Champagne Duval Leroy Rose Prestige
wine_color: Its bottle, with its bronze tints and delicate curves, holds a shower of pink-gold stars which has become a paradigm.
desc_en_short:
The Rosé Prestige plays on themes of harmony and seduction in a modern context.

Its bottle, with its bronze tints and delicate curves, holds a shower of pink-gold stars which has become a paradigm.

The delicacy of its bubbles, a string of fine pearls, escapes from the crystalline elegance of the airy neck of the bottle created by Carol Duval-Leroy.

Its salmon colour, created from Premier Cru Chardonnay and Pinot Noir, holds one’s eye and brings hints of amber to the fore. Its bouquet releases a wealth of aromas: wild cherries, figs and even a hint of ginger and geraniums.

With a solid maturity and balanced vinosity, this wine represents the best of what Duval-Leroy has to offer to knowledgeable wine lovers and fans of fine rosés.

name: Bella Conchi  Brut Rose
wine_color: Attractive cherry red color Fine and persistent bubbles.

name: San Maurizio  Asti Dolce
wine_color: Brilliant, pale straw yellow with persistent mousse.

name: Tenuta Amadio  Asolo Prosecco Superiore DOCG  Extra Brut
Tenuta Amadio  Asolo Prosecco Superiore DOCG Brut
Huguenot Tassin Champagne Signature Brut Millésimée
Notte Rossa  Vino Spumante Extra Dry
desc_en_short: Brilliant straw yellow colour with greenish highlights; fine, persistent perlage. Intense and fragrant on the nose; fine floral notes, yellow-fleshed and exotic fruits, combined with touches of Mediterranean scrub. Harmonious and elegant on the palate, it captivates with a good smoothness supported by a lively and fresh sip

name: V8+  Prosecco Brut Millesimato DOC (1.5 L)
wine_color: A pale straw yellow color, crossed by a dense weave of minute bubbles.
desc_en_short: Only the best Glera grapes of each vintage can become the V8 + Millesimato Brut. The best grapes are carefully selected in the vineyard to create a unique sparkling wine with a dry and decisive taste, great freshness and a pleasant acidity in the finish.

name: Dom Perignon 2013
wine_color: Glistening Colour With Light Amber Highlights.

name: Louis Roederer  Cristal Brut 2014
wine_color: Golden yellow in colour with glistening gold tints.

name: Luc Belaire  Rare Gold
wine_color: A crystal-clear glass bottle showcases the golden cuvée

name: Pol Roger  Brut Reserve Limied Editon Gift Box 2023 (750 ml)
wine_color: Greeny-gold in color with a fine mousse
brand: Pol Roger  Brut Reserve Limied Editon Gift Box
desc_en_short:
"Greeny-gold in color with a fine mousse. Rich and leafy on the nose. On the palate a nice depth of flavour with good fruit showing through." 
Decanter Magazine

name: Contadi Castaldi  Franciacorta Brut Race Ducati
wine_color: A straw yellow color is enlivened by a fine and persistent perlage.
desc_en_short: A wine celebrating Ducati, yesterday and nowadays, which expresses its uniqueness and extraordinary capacity of thrilling people.

name: Veuve Clicquot  La Grande Dame Rose
wine_color: The dress is bright coppery pink
desc_en_short:
In 2022, Veuve Clicquot reveals this 9th edition of La Grande Dame Rosé, an exceptional and rare wine.

In 1818, Madame Clicquot crafted the first known "rosé d'assemblage" champagne by blending some of her Bouzy red wines with her white wines. La Grande Dame Rosé respects her vision with 90% of Pinot Noir coming from the historic Grands Crus of the terroir as well as a red wine added to the blend from a single parcel: the Parcelle 'Clos Colin' located in Bouzy, a Grand Cru terroir.

name: Louis Roederer  Rose Vintage 2016
wine_color: The bubbles are fine yet vibrant and energetic.
desc_en_short: The 2016 vintage was characterised by particularly marked weather variations: spring was cool, wet and relatively late whereas summer was warm and dry with a heatwave in late August followed by dry and sunny weather over the harvest period which was highly beneficial to the ripening of the grapes. Our Pinot noirs thrived in these dry, sunny conditions and the heat has given them an intensely fruity character and silky smooth texture. The Chardonnays are just as outstanding although more chiselled and saline in character

name: Allart & Fils  Rose
wine_color: The color is a pink pale salmon with delicate bubbles and a fine foam.

name: Veuve du Vernay  Ice
desc_en_short: A vibrant, easy drinking bubbles full of, fruity flavours. Pale yellow with green tints. Generous foam, fine and numerous bubbles. Fruity, floral, fresh. Citrus fruits scents. Fine effervescence.

name: Champagne Duval Leroy  Femme De Champagne Grand Cru
wine_color: Its golden yellow color bears fine lines of bubbles.
desc_en_short: Its golden yellow color bears fine lines of bubbles that reveal complex notes of lively maturity: brioche, vanilla and woody aromas alternating with citrus fruit such as lemon and mandarin. A fine attack of mouth is followed by a silky touch with infinite persistence.

name: Champagne Duval Leroy Brut Reserve
desc_en_short: Providing a perfect balance between finesse and power, it draws out flavours of dark chocolate, cinnamon and roasted yellow figs, expressing its subtle, melt-in-the-mouth vinosity. It was the only Champagne recognised by Wine Spectator magazine in its Top 100 classification for 2008.

name: Botter Prosecco DOCG Valdobbiadene
wine_color: Pale light yellow colour with typical crisp and delicate perlage
desc_en_short:
Fresh and light on the palate, with balanced acidity and body; harmonic with a long persistent aftertaste
 Ideal as an aperitif, it is a perfect combination to hors-d’oeuvres and delicate first courses. Also wonderful with sushi, fish and shellfish

name: Botter Brut Vino Spumante
wine_color: Pale straw yellow with greenish shades

name: Heim  Cremant D'Alsace Brut Imperial
wine_color: Beautiful pale-yellow robe with a superb and persisting stream of creamy bubbles.
desc_en_short: Beautiful pale-yellow robe with a superb and persisting stream of creamy bubbles. Appel and whit fruits aromas with fine notes of nuts due to the ageing on horizontal storage from 16 to 18 months (against 12 months legally authorized). Very expressive and elegant. Well-balanced and remarkably long on the palate, this Cremant enjoys an acid structure whitch brings fineness and freshness. The very fine bubbles of this Cremant sign its delicacy and elegance.

name: Champagne Vollereaux  Blanc De Blanc 2014
wine_color: Its robe has a bright, light yellow color with golden hints and fine bubbles.

name: Champagne H.Blin  Brut Tradition
desc_en_short: Opens with aromas of peach and apricot. Rich and generous, the stone fruit aromas persist with freshness and balance.

name: Barons de Rothschild  Concordia Brut
wine_color: bright, clear, pale gold tints woven with very fine bubbles
desc_en_short: The fullness and depth of Barons de Rothschild Concordia Brut testify to the high proportion and exceptional quality of the reserve wines in its blend, which is predominantly Chardonnay from the finest Champagne terroirs.

name: French Bloom  Le Blanc Organic French Bubbly (375 ml) (Alcohol-Free)
desc_en_short:
A blend of dealcoholized organic French Chardonnay wines, French Bloom Le Blanc opens with a minerality with accents of pear, the inimitable signature of the house. Between acidity and depth, French Bloom Le Blanc reveals dazzling floral bursts in the heart. Its tropical notes are followed by an evolution of granny smith apple, accords of white flowers and slightly spicy citrus fruits with a sparkling freshness.

TASTING NOTES

Pear - White Flowers - Spicy Citrus

2023 WORLD SPARKLING AWARDS

World's Best AF Sparkling Winner

name: Tenuta Baron  Spumante Buchet Brut
wine_color: A straw yellow color with greenish reflections

name: Tenuta Baron  Spumante Eden Brut
wine_color: A straw yellow color with greenish reflections

name: Freixenet  Cordon Negro Brut Magnum (1.5 L)
desc_en_short: This is the world’s favourite Spanish sparkling wine and is known for its beautiful and sexy black bottle. Its fresh, crisp and fruity aroma goes with just about everything and magically makes every moment just that bit more special. A light, modern Cava with a very refreshing style and lots of bubbles that really last. When you taste it, you’ll pick up hints of citrus fruit and an aroma that reminds you of both apple and pear as well as peach, melon and pineapple.

name: Freixenet  Cordon Negro Brut Jeroboam (3 L)
desc_en_short: This is the world’s favourite Spanish sparkling wine and is known for its beautiful and sexy black bottle. Its fresh, crisp and fruity aroma goes with just about everything and magically makes every moment just that bit more special. A light, modern Cava with a very refreshing style and lots of bubbles that really last. When you taste it, you’ll pick up hints of citrus fruit and an aroma that reminds you of both apple and pear as well as peach, melon and pineapple.

name: Freixenet  Vinyes de Can Sala Brut Nature
wine_color: Intense yellow color with a good presence of bubbles and marked crown.
desc_en_short: Intense yellow color with a good presence of bubbles and marked crown. Secondary and tertiary aromas with hints of tropical fruit and ripe fruit, a little pastry (yeast, bread) due to aging for 60 months. On the palate it is a broad, balanced cava, with a aftertaste that confirms the fruit aromas. Long cava, we have the memory in the mouth during long time.

name: Simonnet-Febvre  Cremant de Burgogne
wine_color: A harmoniously balanced crémant with fine bubbles.
desc_en_short:
A harmoniously balanced crémant with fine bubbles, a persistant foam and a wonderful length in the mouth. It is fresh and powerful on the nose with aromas of citrus.
Enjoy chilled as an aperitif, as it comes, or with a liqueur such as crème de cassis. Why not even drink it throughout a whole meal!

name: Dom Ruinart Blanc de Blanc 2010
wine_color: At first glance, the champagne looks golden yellow, with light greenish hues and a fine, persistent sparkle.

name: L'Archetipo  Marasco Spumante Metodo Clasicco Brut IGP Salento (Marasco)
wine_color: Greenish yellow colour, fine and quite persi-stent bubbles.

name: Ceci 1938 Spumante Brut
wine_color: Pale straw yellow with an elegant and fine perlage.

name: Giuseppe Verdi Malvasia Spumante Brut Emilia IGT
wine_color: Straw yellow colour, a slight and fine perlage is appreciated.
desc_en_short: The typical sparkling wine: born from Malvasia grapes – white excellence of Emilia – this white wine instils amazement and pleasure to those who try it. Refined, perfect throughout the meal.

name: Guiseppe Verdi Lambrusco Rosa Amabile
wine_color: Powder pink colour, a very slight perlage is appreciated.
desc_en_short: From the very red Lambrusco grapes, a sparkling rosé wine that is a hymn to lightness and happiness. Take life in pink!

name: Penfolds  Champagne Cuvee Brut
wine_color: Clear straw; a delicate and fine mousse.
desc_en_short: Champagne through a Penfolds lens. This Cuvée Brut NV release is sourced from highly regarded vineyards across the Champagne region. Made in partnership with Champagne Thiénot, the blend is made up of pinot noir, pinot meunier and chardonnay. Complete and assured, the Cuvée Brut is fresh and forward on the nose, and lively on the palate.

name: Fontanafredda  Asti Dolce DOCG
desc_en_short: The unique Asti Fontanafredda is an aromatic sparkling wine with an unmistakeable personality that turns every occasion into a celebration: the ideal companion for a thousand moments of fun and joy. The fragrance of its aroma, which is typical of the grape-variety, fills this wine with an inviting, sweet nose of musk, sage and honey, and of the flowers of linden, acacia, hawthorn and orange trees, arousing engaging sensations lengthened by a lingering cheery flavour.

name: Yannick Prevoteau Champagne Perle Des Treilles Brut
wine_color: Bright, yellow gold color with very fine bubbles.
desc_en_short:
"The pure expression of the union of pinot noir and chardonnay." ​

This cuvée owes its name to the place called “Les Treilles”. In the past, vines were cultivated in the gardens, along a wall, on an arbor or a trellis (treillage). The Pearl is a nod to the Chardonnay grape from which it is made.

name: Franzini Spumante Brut
wine_color: Shimmering straw yellow with hints of green, this Spumante delivers delicate and persistent bubbles.
desc_en_short: Crisp and elegant Spumante Brut from Piedmont, Italy — with fine bubbles, fresh fruity notes, and delightful balance. Perfect for appetizers and desserts.

name: Taittinger  Comtes Blanc de Blancs 2013
desc_en_short: Taittinger is a Champagne house founded in 1734 in Reims. However it wasn’t until 1932 that the Taittinger family purchased the estate and renamed it after their family. Pierre Taittinger was a cavalry officer in World War I who returned from the war and fell in love with the Champagne region. He was able to buy the vineyards in 1932 and was soon buying more land. Today Taittinger Champagne owns 752 acres of vineyards, making it one of the largest in the region. The estate’s flagship wines are the Comtes de Champagne, made of 100% Chardonnay, and Comtes de Champagne Rose, made of 100% Pinot Noir. Taittinger is also noteworthy for its program of commissioning internationally acclaimed artists to make labels.

name: Champagne Chavost Ratafia Champenois Sans Sulfite (700 ml)
desc_en_short:
Our estate was created in 1946 by the will of our elders, winegrowers of Chavot-Courcourt.

Chavost is the ancestral name of the village, which formerly was located between the Saint-Martin Church and the Mount Felix hill, upon which a castle was established.

Our ancestors have given us their strong collective values, solidarity, sharing, and the love of our lands. Now more than ever, we put all our forces in common to grow high quality grapes, giving us the chance to elaborate unique wines of Champagne.

Our commitment in preserving the environment, our land and the excellence of our wines, is expanding along with a deep conviction. In harmony with our philosophy and values, we decided to produce and launch a new range of wines :

Thanks to a mastered vinification, that does not include added sulfites, the range « Et sans sulfites ajoutés ! » ( meaning « No added sulphites ! »), is composed of a singular and atypical wines. It comes in addition to the traditional range.

name: Champagne Pierre Gerbais Grains de Celles (375 ml)
flavor_tags: Limestone, Brioche, Mineral, Citrus, Creamy, Chalky, Peach, Apple
desc_en_short: Grains de Celles from Pierre Gerbais is a grower Champagne of exceptional character — a Pinot Blanc-dominant cuvée from the Côte des Bar showing brioche, white peach, citrus, and lively mineral freshness that reflects the singular terroir of this under-celebrated Champagne zone.

name: Bottignolo Funé Valdobbiadene Prosecco D.O.C.G. Extra Brut
desc_en_short:
Fragrant and fruity, with white peach notes, as well
as delicate scents of acacia flowers and citrus fruits.
Dry palate with a long finish.

name: Antinori  Villa Antinori Bianco Toscana IGT
food_matching: Lobster, Creamy Pasta, Roasted Chicken, Rich Fish
desc_en_short: Villa Antinori Bianco is the white counterpart to the famous Rosso — a fresh, aromatic Tuscan blend led by Trebbiano and Malvasia with light citrus, peach, and floral notes, clean and easy-drinking with great food versatility.

name: Chateau Villa Bel Air Blanc
desc_en_short: An extremely elegant wine. Its floral nose releases notes of citrus fruits (lemon, grapefruit) and tropical fruits (mango, pineapple). The first impression on the palate is supple and round with a nice buttery, oaky and vanilla finish. The technique of stirring the lees brings out structure, volume, fatness and roundness.

name: Zonin  "Ventiterre" Pinot Grigio
wine_color: Appealing straw-yellow colour with delicate green reflections.
desc_en_short: This Pinot Grigio is pale yellow in colour with warm undertones. The scent is dry and reserved, with hints of fruit and flowers, and a saline finish. The perfectly harmonious palate takes up the aromas found on the nose with a vigorous freshness, and a particularly persistent finish. It pairs happily with a complete range of fish dishes, whether raw, baked or fried, but also with typical Italian cold cuts.

name: Ogier  Cotes du Rhone Gentilhomme White
desc_en_short: Intense aromas of white flowers, violet and acacia honey. Lingering finish on the palate. Enjoy drink with seafood and grilled fish.

name: Argento  Chardonnay
desc_en_short:
Light golden color and intense aromas of ripe tropical and citrus fruits. Concentrated flavors
of apple, peach and pineapple are evident along with notes of vanilla and spice from light oak aging. Bright,
crisp acidity lends a clean, refreshing finish.

name: Carpineto  Dogajolo, Chardonnay, Grechetto, Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: Straw yellow with green highlights. Pleasantly fruity, elegantly aromatic and harmonious. Medium body with agreable acidity and a dry, pleasantly velvety, soft finish. Food matching with excellent as an aperitif or with typical Mediterranean cuisine, such as salads, pasta, seafood and white meats. Excellent also with flavourful, spicy Asian foods.

name: Domaine Laroche  Chablis Domaine Saint Martin AOC
wine_color: Vibrant yellow with reflects of pale green.
desc_en_short: Vibrant yellow with reflects of pale green. Intensely fresh with fruits and spices. Fresh, mineral, harmonious and fruity. The finish is long and precise. Food matching with seafood and dessert.

name: Castello Della Sala By Antinori  Chardonnay "Bramito del Cervo", Umbria IGT
flavor_tags: Hazelnut, Mushroom, Vanilla, Brioche, Mineral, Creamy, Peach, Apple, Pear, Oak
food_matching: Lobster, Creamy Pasta, Roasted Chicken, Rich Fish
desc_en_short: Bramito del Cervo is Antinori's celebrated Umbrian Chardonnay — barrel-fermented and lees-aged for impressive richness and complexity, delivering golden apple, hazelnut, brioche, and mineral freshness with the elegance of the Castello della Sala estate's distinctive terroir.

name: Pio Cesare  Gavi white DOCG
desc_en_short: Fresh, clean and spicy aromas. Salty, with ripe fruit and rich, complex flavor. Great ageing potential.

name: Alois Lageder  Gewurztraminer Alto Adige DOC
wine_color: Brilliant, straw-yellow colour with orange reflections
desc_en_short: Bright, straw-yellow colour with orange reflections. Fresh aroma with delicate floral notes (roses, geranium) and impressions of tropical fruit. Medium-bodied, vinous with a grapey flavour, dry. Good fresh aftertaste with an elegant delicate bitter twist.

name: Alois Lageder  The Farms LOWENGANG Chardonnay (Biodynamic)
wine_color: Brilliant, gold yellow colour with a green shimmer.
desc_en_short: Brilliant, gold yellow colour with a green shimmer. Very rich, complex, still quite closed aroma. Burgundian style with a delicate creaminess, some toasty oak and ripe tropical fruit. Touches of vanilla and roasted almonds. Quite rich, well structured though elegant flavour, harmonious, with a pungent, fresh acidity to match the depth of the fruit and the oaky backbone. Under proper storage conditions, this wine‘s aging potential is at least 6 to 8 years. Suggested foods with rich, strong flavoured dishes as seafood with sauces, lobster, white meat and poultry.

name: Corte Giara by Allegrini  Pinot Grigio Delle Venezie IGT
desc_en_short: Light and delicate on the nose, characterised by a subtle elegant floral nuance followed by hints of golden delicious apples and distinctive vegetal notes. Dry and medium-bodied, the palate faithfully reflects the nose, being tangy and satisfying, while at the same time simple and exceedingly enjoyable.

name: Torres  Vina Sol White
desc_en_short: Intense, with outstanding notes of flowers and ripe fruits (banana, pear, apple and peach), combined with delightful touches of citrus (mandarin zest) on a mentholated base. It's firm, fresh, long and elegant in the body, with a lingering finish.

name: Louis Latour  Chassagne-Montrachet 1erCru
desc_en_short: A complex nose with honey and acacia notes. Round and ample on the palate, it reveals aromas of marzipan and vanilla. The wine has a long finish and a nice minerality.

name: Pala  Stellato Vermentino Di Sardegna DOC
Haras de Pirque By Antinori  Chardonnay Reserva
flavor_tags: Tropical Fruit, Butterscotch, Hazelnut, Mineral, Citrus, Creamy, Mango, Apple, Cream, Oak
food_matching: Lobster, Creamy Pasta, Roasted Chicken, Rich Fish
desc_en_short: Haras de Pirque's Chardonnay Reserva is a polished, barrel-influenced Chilean white from the Maipo Valley — showing ripe tropical fruit, golden apple, toasted hazelnut, and a creamy, textured palate with a clean mineral finish.

name: Gerard Bertrand  6eme Sens Blanc
wine_color: A pale yellow colour with flashes of green.

name: Gerard Bertrand  Naturalys Sauvignon Blanc
wine_color: Bright yellow hue, with slight green tones.

name: Tyrrell's  Semillon-Sauvignon Blanc "Old Winery"
wine_color: Pale green with a lime green hue.
desc_en_short: Both parcels were crushed in their respective regions before the sauvignon blanc was brought to the Hunter Valley where both wines were fermented separately. Following a cool fermentation in stainless steel vessels using aromatic yeasts to maximise the grape’s fragrant qualities, the wine was quickly filtered and blended to retain all the fresh sherbet fruit flavours.

name: Tyrrell's  Chardonnay "Old Winery"
wine_color: Pale green with a lime green hue.
desc_en_short:
“The best Hunter Valley chardonnay in its price group. - 90 Points.“ James Halliday, Top 100 Wines 2012
The grapes for this wine are sourced from the Hunter Valley. After harvesting and pressing, the juice was cool fermented then the wine received some French oakmaturation. Alc 12.5%

name: Caliterra  Chardonnay Reserva
wine_color: Golden yellow with a touch of green in color
desc_en_short: Golden yellow with a touch of green in color, this wine exudes freshness, elegance, and aromatic intensity with citrus and mineral notes. The palate is balanced and mineral edged with sharp acidity that heightened the flavors. Persistent, fresh, lively and ideal for drinking any day of the week.

name: Chateau Ste. Michelle  Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: The 2012 Sauvignon Blanc exhibits a bright fruit profile of apples and melons. The mostly stainless steel fermentation provides the crisp character to the wine. Try this wine with pasta with cream sauce.

name: Wolf Blass  Yellow Label Chardonnay
desc_en_short: Gold Medal - 2014 China Wine and Spirit Awards Best Value. A delicious Chardonnay packed with enticing fruit aromas of peaches and summer stone fruits, seamlessly followed by a palate with a soft creamy texture, subtle oak and a lingering finish. Generous, yet with finesse and elegance.

name: Wolf Blass  Yellow Label Riesling
desc_en_short: Bronze Medal - 2014 International Wine Challenge. Lifted floral and citrus notes on the nose carry through to the palate, with a fine acid line giving a clean, crisp finish. Yellow Label Riesling shows great length, supported by rich fruit flavours through the mid-palate. Great with Rolled Turkey Breast with Apple and Pinenut Stuffing or Crisp Battered Whiting with Chunky Chips.

name: Domaines Barons de Rothschild (Lafite)  Aussieres  Blanc
wine_color: Beautiful bright yellow with particularly pronounced hints of green.
desc_en_short: Made with special care, Aussières’ “Blanc” is a Chardonnay that combines liveliness, smoothness and fruit.

name: E.Guigal  Cotes du Rhone Blanc
desc_en_short: Yellow gold, clear and brilliant. Freshness marked by the distinctive aromas of Viognier, white flowers, apricot, acacia and white peach. Fruity with plenty of richness and body. Food matching with Starters, fish, asian food.

name: Castello Colle Massari  Melacce Montecucco DOC
desc_en_short: Clean Vermentino with fruity-fresh first sip. Aromas of Granny Smith apple, white peach and sweet limes, as well as a hint of exotic fruits, are discernible. Crispy and dry on the palate with fantastic minerality. The after-taste is dry and indicates a good pressing as well as an aromatic precision. A wine for warm days that satisfies thirst. Very elegant and classy.

name: Terrazas  Reserva Chardonnay
desc_en_short: The latest Terrazas Reserva Chardonnay continues to surprise me every day. Its fantastic level of natural acidity allows us a subtle winemaking, which results in a very elegant white. During blind wine tastings, I remember many people were surprised by its French-driven style!

name: Clarendelle  Blanc Inspired by Haut-Brion AOC
desc_en_short: Beautiful pale yellow colour with beautiful freshness and a delicious flavour with hints of tropical fruit (pineapple) grapefruit, melon, and white peaches. Full-bodied, and have a fine long aftertaste. Perfect with Chicken, Fish, Oriental and Pasta.

name: Bottega  Pinot Grigio delle Venezie IGT
desc_en_short: The harvest is slightly delayed, to assure a physiological ripeness of the grapes. They are hand picked in cases and vinified in white (must and skins are immediately separated) after a cold maceration that lasts 36 hours. This procedure, longer than the traditional one, grants a more intense color to the wine. Fermentation goes on for 8-10 days, while stabilization is carried out in 30 days. The wine is then filtered and bottled.

name: Marchesi Di Barolo  Gavi di Gavi DOCG
wine_color: A light straw yellow with pale green hues.
desc_en_short: The colour is a light straw yellow with pale green hues. The intense and refined aroma has fruity and floral notes, reminiscent of Golden Delicious apple and green almonds, with a strong scent of chamomile flowers. The taste is elegant, harmonious and persistent, sapid, with balanced mineral notes.

name: Rocca Di Frassinello  Vermentino IGT
desc_en_short: A new challenge that reveals from the beginning a delicate, fruity and aromatic sensation that donates a nice and enjoyable freshness to the wine. A balanced taste with a nice acidity and mineral component that leads to a savory and persistent wine.

name: Cantina Terlano  Chardonnay DOC
desc_en_short: "The internationally successful Chardonnay grape is now a standard item in the vineyards of Terlano, too. As both a cuvée and a varietal, it regularly produces highly versatile wines with a pleasing freshness and a very attractive tropical fruit component." Rudi Kofler

name: Framingham  Sauvignon blanc
desc_en_short: Marlborough Sauvignon Blanc is famous for packing a bit of a punch. But our take on this all-time classic has hidden depths. There’s a complex soul beneath that savage bravado. Ripe Wairau Valley fruit, a touch of fermentation on the skins, and a quick tour inside oak and acacia barrels has added layers of flavour and texture. This is one wine that won’t give it all away on the first sip.

name: Carta Vieja  Chardonnay (375 ml)
wine_color: Bright yellow color with fine green tints.
desc_en_short:
*Minimum Qty Allowed in Shopping Cart 6 Bottles.

Bright yellow color with fine green tints. Elegant and Fresh aroma of ripe tropical fruits. Pear apricot and passion fruit fragrances are emphasized and merge with soft notes of vanilla. Voluminous mouth, creamy and elegant texture with an excellent balance between sweetness and acidity.

name: Gallician  Prestige Blanc
wine_color: A pale gold colour with crystal clear green highlights.
desc_en_short: A pale gold colour with crystal clear green highlights. Seductive smells characterized by white flowers and yellow peach notes. The first sip is clean and complete and the finish leaves round and crisp impressions. A perfect choice for aperitif or also a delightful dinner wine to go with fish and shell fish dish and poultry.

name: Yvon Mau  Sauvignon Blanc
wine_color: A limpid yellow robe shot through with flashes of gold.
desc_en_short: This Sauvignon boasts a limpid yellow robe shot through with flashes of gold. The powerful nose combines intense grapefruit aromas with lighter floral notes. The palate is fresh and lively, revealing a broad array of citrus aromas and exotic fruit flavours. A lesson in elegance, perfect with seafood, grilled fish or simply as an aperitif.

name: Salisbury 1848  Chardonnay
desc_en_short: On the palate the flavours are fruit dominant but also complex by a subtly biscuit character and a creaminess on the palate. The palate, although crisp and fresh, has weight, texture and layers of complexity. Enjoy with a mozzarella and ripe peach salad or fresh prawns.

name: Crane Lake  Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: Pale golden silver color. Aromas of powdered lime, honeyed apple, and Brazil nut with a silky, dry-yet-fruity light-to-medium body and a crisp, white grapefruit and grass accented finish. Tasty with good varietal character.

name: Bogle  Chardonnay
desc_en_short: This wine is light straw color. On the nose I picked up primarily apple notes, with none of the pear that is apparently common in Clarksburg chardonnay grapes. In the mouth the wine started out crisp, showing nice, refreshing apple flavors. On the back end of the wine it rounded out, showing some creaminess and vanilla flavors that I enjoyed. Food pairing with shrimp salad.

name: Cakebread  Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: Full-bodied and concentrated on the palate, with a silky texture, its vibrant melon, citrus and gooseberry flavors are perfectly balanced, leading to a long, succulent finish boasting bright citrus and mineral tones.

name: Cakebread  Chardonnay
desc_en_short: Smooth, beautifully balanced, yellow apple, nectarine and honeydew melon flavors segue into a long, succulent finish enhanced by refreshing mineral.

name: Caymus  Conundrum White
style: Chardonnay, Sauvignon Blanc, Semillon, Muscat Canelli And Viognier
desc_en_short:
Conundrum' s original began at the dinner table. Charlie Wagner Sr., who co-founded Caymus Vineyards in 1972 with his wife, Lorna, and son, Chuck, would mix wines to find the perfect glass to pair with his meal. No one blended wines back then, so his experiment was pretty radical.

They source Conundrum in places that are both famed and off the beaten track – in Napa, Monterey, Santa Barbara, San Benito, Solano and Tulare Counties.

name: Francis Coppola  'Diamond Collection' Chardonnay
desc_en_short: Bright and balanced, highlighted by juicy apple, cantaloupe and pear flavors enveloped in a crème brûlée finish.

name: Francis Coppola  'Diamond Collection' Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: Sauvignon Blanc is a highly impressionable grape that develops a different flavor profile depending on where it is grown. Our California Sauvignon Blanc is sourced from multiple appellations in California, bringing increased complexity and subtle nuances to the wine.

name: Francis Coppola  Director's Cut Chardonnay
desc_en_short: Director’s Cut Chardonnay presents lively aromas of citrus and tropical fruits along with pretty floral notes and an edge of minerals that evolves on the palate. You’ll find luscious flavors of Meyer lemon, quince, and passion fruit up front, but as the wine opens up you get the impression of pear crisp, which delivers fragrant spice notes of cardamom, nutmeg and vanilla bean. Richly textured with good palate density, there is a fresh quality to this year’s fruit and a sophisticated toastiness from the wood.

name: Honig  Napa Valley Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: A crisp, fresh Sauvignon Blanc created in the classic Honig style. Peach, lemon grass, hints of jasmine and pea shoot are balanced by grapefruit and lime. Medium bodied, with a bright, lingering finish. Enjoyable with many foods including curries, roasted fish and a wide variety of cheeses. It is a perfect complement to relaxing on the porch with family and friends.

name: McManis  Pinot Grigio
desc_en_short: The McManis Pinot Grigio is light straw in color and crisp and refreshing on the palate. Driven by notes of lemon, lime, and grapefruit with a touch of minerality, this wine is a go-to palate cleanser.

name: Domaines Barons de Rothschild (Lafite)  Legende Bordeaux Blanc
wine_color: Bright straw colour with glints of gold.
desc_en_short: Lovingly cared for by a multitude of winegrowers, the common characteristic of Bordeaux’s vineyards is the elegance and freshness of their wines which, while they reflect a rich culture and are are surrounded by a certain grandeur, are nonetheless easy to drink.

name: Peter Michael  Chardonnay La Carriere
desc_en_short: The signature of this vineyard remains its terroir-driven minerality. The nose is dominated by aromas of toasted almond, brioche, dry honey, white flowers, hazelnut and William pear. Accents of acacia, orange lossom and vanilla complete the elegant bouquet. White peach and citrus oil highlight the minerality. Magnificent concentration and elegance on the palate sculpt the structure of this wine, offering richness and intensity. While approachable now, the 2018 La Carrière will handsomely reward two years of cellaring and will continue to develop for a decade or more.

name: Montgras  Chardonnay
wine_color: Deep straw yellow with golden notes.
desc_en_short: Deep straw yellow with golden notes. Intense notes of ripe pineapples and butterscotch complemented by some wild touches give a fruity and complex aroma to this wine. Fresh with an attractive and unique combination of nerves and creameness, which is enhanced by the lack of oak. Ideal as an appetizer. It goes well with seafood and pasta.

name: Louis Michel  Chablis Grand Cru Vaudesir
desc_en_short: This wine will reveal notes of rhubarb and acacia flowers. In the mouth, buttery, brioche notes with a touch of coconut will satisfy even the most discerning palate. Serve between 12 and 14˚c and air or carafe the wine before tasting.

name: Casa Silva  Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: Star-bright straw tones with honey hues. There is an appealing aroma of fresh apricots and mangoes. The palate demonstrates crunchy white fruits with a subtle honey backbone

name: Mcguigan  Black Label Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: McGuigan Black Label Sauvignon Blanc is a full flavoured wine with the classic characters of passionfruit, cut grass and hints of peach. These great varietal flavours are perfectly balanced with a clean and crisp feel and a zesty lime finish.

name: Mcguigan  Private Bin Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: Ripe tropical fruits of melon and mango with herbaceous aromas of grass, capsicum and asparagus.Palate This is a full-flavoured wine with wonderful layers of soft citrus fruit flavours, passionfruit, cut grass and hints of peach.

name: Monsoon Valley  Cuvee de Siam Blanc
desc_en_short:
Made from only the healthiest, most ripe Chenin Blanc and Colombard grapes, Monsoon Valley Cuvée de Siam Blanc is an elegant and graceful wine loaded with pear, green apple, white flower and spice aromas.

Resembling a great white Burgundy in style and with a tiger label created by Thailand’s national artist Thawan Duchanee, Monsoon Valley Cuvée de Siam Blanc is an impressive crisp, dry and medium-body white wine with a medium finish that can be sipped on a hot day or paired to cool spicy Thai poo patpong cari (crab in yellow curry sauce) and Asian dishes, or complement sweet savory Thai dishes, shellfish like scallops and prawns in cream sauce, Dover sole or turbot in white wine sauce.

name: Signus  Classic White (Chardonnay) (Fruit wine blend)
desc_en_short:
*Minimum Qty Allowed in Shopping Cart 6 Bottles.

This bright yellow-gold coloured wine has intense aromas with notes of papayas, peaches and soft vanilla with layers of pear and honey. A balanced and voluminous wine, fruity with sweet notes, which linger on the palate, giving it a textured, open and persistent finish.

name: Vesevo  Greco di Tufo DOCG
desc_en_short: Lemon-gold in colour with an intense, aromatic perfume of ripe pears with honeyed, almond notes. On the palate, this wine has stone fruit flavours of yellow peaches, a crisp, mineral character and good body on the finish. Serve with fish dishes, white meats, poultry.

name: San Marzano  Santoro Chardonnay Puglia IGP
desc_en_short: A medium-bodied, with a light straw yellow. Dry and fruity with aromas of grapefruit and honeydew melon. A juicy thirst quencher and companion lighter entrees and fish dishes.

name: Anakena  Birdman Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: Bursting with tropical and herbaceous flavours, all underpinned by a clean refreshing acidity and a bright finish.

name: Angove  Organic Chardonnay
wine_color: Pale straw with olive green hues.
desc_en_short: Pale straw with olive green hues. Stonefruit, citrus and cantaloupe flavours combine with savoury oak on the nose. On the palate the wine has a soft texture and good length with an elegant finish.

name: Angove  Organic Sauvignon Blanc
wine_color: Pale pastel yellow in colour with green hues.
desc_en_short: Pale straw in colour with green hues. Aromas of citrus, guava, and passionfruit with delicate herbal notes precede the alluring palate that entices the senses further with tropical fruit characters and a clean, fresh finish.

name: Chateau Vircoulon  Bordeaux Blanc AOC
desc_en_short: An attractive pale lemon colour with delicate aromas of citrus fruits and white flowers. Crisp and lively on the palate with lemon and grapefruit notes and a refreshing finish. Ideal with seafood and fish dishes.

name: Petaluma  Piccadilly Valley Chardonnay
desc_en_short: A complex array of melon fig and cashew aromas is followed by a typically elegant and subtle palate with beautifully integrated oak. Petaluma had set a benchmark in Australian Chardonnay.

name: Jim Barry  The Lodge Hill Riesling
desc_en_short:
91 points in Wine Enthusiast - "This bottling offers a delicate nose of peach, lime blossom and white pepper followed by a palate that is tight and focused, with mouthwatering acidity, chalky minerality and a long lime and apple finish.

90 points in Wine Spectator - "Mouthwatering and intense, with green papaya, melon, kiwifruit and Key lime flavors that are vibrant and juicy, showing plenty of clarity and focus on the finish."

95 points in Decanter - "Love the perfumed nose packed with buttercups and wild flowers, then a vibrancy that lifts the wine to another dimension. Delicate yuzu and candied citrus palate leading to a precise finish. The depth of flavour is great – there’s a touch of reduction but who cares; its superb! *Top wines of 2018 Decanter Panel Tastings"

name: Oxford Landing  Chardonnay
wine_color: Pale golden straw in colour with vibrant green hues
desc_en_short: A tantalisingly creamy yet crisp, clean Chardonnay. Pale golden straw in colour with vibrant green hues, it has lifted aromas of freshly cut peaches, wild honey and lemon myrtle. Underlying hints of fig and cinnamon spice add complexity to the bouquet.

name: Framingham  Classic Riesling
desc_en_short: A classic New Zealand, off-dry style, with rich fruit and juicy acidity. Complex varietal characters of lemon citrus, mandarin and stone fruit with a long, mineral finish. Harmless crystals may form in the bottle. Made with certified organic grapes from our estate vineyard.

name: Joseph Drouhin  Bourgogne Aligote
desc_en_short:
"A wine that is always fresh and aromatic. The colour is pale yellow, with green reflections. On the nose, aromas of fresh grape, slightly acidic. Fresh on the palate, sometimes with a pleasant "gunflint" note. Good balance between softness and acidity". Serving
Temperature : 12/13°C

name: Domaine Huet  La Haut Lieu Demi Sec
desc_en_short: The combination of rich vintage sun and limestone rocks found at the feet of the vines here gives birth to generous aromas of passion fruit , mango and Tulip Mount Tacoma. The mouthfeel is dense, toned. There is a delicate finish that is walking a tightrope between acidity and sweetness.

name: Domaine Huet  Le Mont Sec
desc_en_short: A pristine dry beauty from the chenin blanc grape! Stunning nose of spring blossom, Yamanashi white peach and honeycomb. Super-focused and racy with excellent concentration, everything gelling beautifully at the precise and intensely mineral finish. From bio dynamically grown grapes.

name: Brotte  Grand Vallon Cotes Du Rhone Blanc
desc_en_short: Steady Straw Yellow Color, With Green Tints. Powerful Nose Of White Flowers, Acacia And Fruits With White Flesh. Harmonious And Lively Mouth With A Fruity Finale And Even A Few Notes Of Honey.

name: Bernard Magrez  Oustric Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: The wine shows expressive and typical aromas of citrus (grapefruit) and tropical fruits, with a nice mineral background. Fresh and lively on the palate, the wine will be a good companion to grilled fish and seafood, or can be enjoyed on its own as an aperitif.

name: Chateau Reynon- Blanc - Cadillac
desc_en_short: The white wine, with grapefruit aroma and good length, ages equally well, and is a blend of 89% sauvignon with 11% semillon. Rich, round in style, the citrus is shot through with pineapple and apricot. Vinified in large oak barrels that soften the acidity and add to the good mouthfeel.

name: Domaine Ostertag  Clos Mathis - Riesling
desc_en_short: Subtle but luscious notes of Mirabelle plum, ripe greengage and peach lend a seductive touch to this taut, structured and beautifully textured wine whose palate is reminiscent of bot fresh apple peel and grapefruit zest. Covers of fruit are tautly spread across spokes of acidity, creating a wonderful tension that keeps you wanting more. Authentic in its appeal, it's delicious now but will drink well until at least 2025.

name: Domaine Ostertag  Zellberg - Pinot Gris
desc_en_short: Orange peel perfumes the rich pear notes and imbues them with the aromatic spice of citrus foliage and zest. The palate is full of friendly citrus and pear. Despite its texture and rich flavor, it's beautifully slender and light-footed, with an inherent, zesty brightness that makes this wine shine.

name: Sato  Central Otago Pinot Gris "L'atypique"  (Orange wine)
desc_en_short: Rich pinky orange colour. Layered nose of orange peel, fresh peach, dry herbs, cedar forest and hint of stone-mineral scents; complex and rich nose but more flighty than expected. Savoury flavours of caramelised apple, ripe apricot, orange, red cherry and almond. Full of suppleness and juiciness in the mouth but crunchy, chalky texture with mild but enough acidity bring the long finish with some salty umami.

name: St.Paul's  Chardonnay DOC
desc_en_short: Chardonnay enjoys universal appeal, greenish-yellow in colour with a delicately fruity aroma, dry, fresh and racy on the palate reminiscent of pineapple, banana, apple, pear, citrus fruits, caramel, villa and butter.

name: St.Paul's  Pinot Grigio Alto Adige DOC
desc_en_short: Bouquet of exotic spices, ripe pears and melon. Juicy acidity and full mouthfeel.

name: Kaiken  Terroir Series Torrontes
wine_color: An attractive golden color with green hues.

name: Aldridge  'Twynham' Chardonnay
desc_en_short: Green apple and pear aromas with upfront tropical fruit dominating the palate with some lingering white peach flavours. Aldridge Estates offer a range of delicious, easy drinking Australian classic varieties offering great taste and great value for money.

name: La Playa  'Estate Series' Chardonnay "UN-OAKED"
desc_en_short: A rich gold hay color. On the nose, aromas of tropical fruits such as kiwi and pineapple along with delicate floral notes.  The palate has good balanced between refreshing acidity and a lush mouthfeel.

name: De Bortoli  DB Family Selection Chardonnay
wine_color: Very pale straw with a green tinge.
desc_en_short: Very pale straw with a green tinge. Tight, fresh pear with stone fruit balanced with a subtle, hint of oak. This wine displays early picked peach and melon notes carried on a weighty palate, culminating in a fresh and crisp finish with the most interesting of oak nuances.

name: De Bortoli  Windy Peak Chandonnay
wine_color: Light straw with a green edge
desc_en_short: Light straw with a green edge. Bright, complex, hints of citrus, hazelnut, subtle use of oak. Fine, textural, subtle, gentle, creamy flavours.

name: La Linda  Torrontes
wine_color: A light yellow with green reflection.
desc_en_short: La Linda Torrontés is a white wine of bright light yellow color, with intense aromas of white flowers, citrus and herbal notes such as lavender and pine tree. It is expressive and very perfumed in the palate. It is a vibrant, direct, fluid and fresh wine, with a distinctive varietal typicity and a persistent nice citric finish. Ideal to serve as an aperitif.

name: Luigi Bosca  Sauvignon Blanc
wine_color: A yellow wine with green hints and silver reflections
desc_en_short: Its loose aromas are reminiscent of fresh white fruits with hints of citrus and flowers. It is vivacious and refreshing in the mouth, and clean, balanced and voluptuous in the palate, with a vibrant herby aftertaste and a very pleasant acidity. This wine of great varietal typicity reflects the terroir where it is born.

name: Greywacke  Chardonnay
desc_en_short: A deliciously rich amalgam of pink grapefruit, figs and baked apples intertwine with more savoury characters redolent of meadow hay, toasted hazelnuts and buttered brioche. This grapefruit and nutty savouriness pervades the crisp, dry palate, while the power and concentration of the Mendoza clone creates an extraordinarily long finish that lingers and lingers…

name: Elena Walch  Pinot Bianco Alto Adige D.O.C.
flavor_tags: Green Apple, Blossom, Mineral, Citrus, Apple, Pear
desc_en_short: Elena Walch's Pinot Bianco is a pristine, Alpine expression of this underrated variety — clean and mineral with crisp apple, pear, citrus, and white flowers, showing the cool precision and freshness that Alto Adige's mountain terroir delivers.

name: Elena Walch  Gewurtztraminer Alto Adige D.O.C.
flavor_tags: Tropical Fruit, Cinnamon, Lychee, Floral, Ginger, Rose
desc_en_short: Elena Walch's Gewurztraminer is a stunning Alto Adige aromatic white — intensely perfumed with lychee, rose, ginger, and exotic spice, opulently textured yet dry and precise, showcasing why this mountain terroir produces world-class expressions of the variety.

name: Elena Walch  Sauvignon Castel Ringberg
desc_en_short: Our Sauvignon Vigna “Castel Ringberg” shows an elegant straw yellow with light green accents. The invitingly subtle bouquet is characterized by elegant floral notes of elderflower and mountain herbs, a hint of gooseberries and an alpine freshness. With fruity fullness, elegant structure, juicy minerality, distinctive harmony and complex potential, this single vineyard Sauvignon delights.

name: Louis Jadot  Pouilly Fuisse
desc_en_short: Maison Louis Jadot produces a Pouilly Fuissé with emerald gold tones which reflect a wine of finesse and distinction; the tasting is harmonious, fresh, full of flavours with hazelnuts, toasted almonds, grapefruit and lemon aromas. It must be served rather cool and goes very well with shellfish, fish, white meat in cream sauce and poultry

name: Louis Jadot  Bourgogne Couvent Des Jacobins Blanc
desc_en_short: This wine is very fruity (peach, pear and grapefruit), developing white flower aromas as well a slight vanilla touch. With a lot of elegance, it is structured, pleasant and harmonious. Bourgogne Chardonnay will be perfect with "hors d'oeuvres", poultry, seafood, grilled fish and goat cheese. It is best served chilled (10/12°C). After several years, more sophisticated aromas will develop and it will go well with more elaborated dishes.

name: 9 Lives Reserve Fierce Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: Release your wild side and feel fierce! enjoy crisp freshness with 9 Lives Sauvignon blanc. Greenish yellow in colour and packed with intense citrus and grapefruit aromas. It has a well-balanced acidity that’s smooth on the palate.

name: Bodega Volcanes de Chile  Tectonia Chardonnay
desc_en_short: Straw-coloured yellow. Delicate but intense notes of white peach, pear and quince with hints of coconut and minerality. Fresh and vibrant but complex and well structured with steely acidity and refreshingly low alcohol. Ideal with fish or seafood as well as cheese platters.

name: Penfolds  Bin 311 Chardonnay
desc_en_short: Bin 311 Chardonnay truly reflects the winemakers’ mantra ‘we always go where the fruit grows best and where it best suits style’. In 2017, the fruit sourcing has moved to cool-climate multi-regional; Adelaide Hills, Tasmania, Tumbarumba. In true Bin 311 style, it exhibits lemon/lime aromas and a mineral acid backbone, complemented by barrel fermentation and maturation in French oak.

name: The Old Town  South African Dry White (Fruit wine blend)
desc_en_short:
*Minimum Qty Allowed in Shopping Cart 6 Bottles.

Straw and brilliant green-yellow. Highlights fresh ripe fruit as tropical fruit,passion fruit,pineapple.Medium body,vibrant,fresh and tasty.

name: Angove  Long Row Moscato
wine_color: Crystal clear with a pale green hue.
desc_en_short: Crystal clear with a pale green hue. Aromas of crisp apple and fresh fruits burst through with grapey flavours in this light delightfully sweet aromatic wine that is made to drink soon after bottling.

name: Mount Riley  Pinot Gris
desc_en_short: Mount Riley's Estate Range is great quality and value. Each wine in this range is fresh with pure, vibrant fruit flavours and aromas.

name: F.X. Pichler  Grüner Veltliner Dürnsteiner
desc_en_short: The Grüner Veltliner displays a very typical, Grüner bouquet of spicy herbs and white pepper.

name: Ferraton Pere & Fils  Cotes-du-Rhone "Samorens" Blanc
desc_en_short: This bright, pale-golden wine opens to aromas of white fruits and flowers. On the palate, it is nicely balanced with freshness provided by the Clairette while the white Grenache gives it body and a gentle softness.

name: Twomey  Sauvignon Blanc Napa Valley
desc_en_short: The 2017 vintage marked a return to the wet and wintery conditions we expect in the Mediterranean climate of Northern California, a much-needed reprieve from the drought of the past 4 years. This allowed vines to go fully dormant for an extended period of time- a good long sleep after years of running a marathon. The warm and mild spring provided a steady start to the growing season. From summer into the harvest season, we experienced significant heat spells with high temperatures staying above 100°F for many days on end. These events pushed the speed of maturation and ripening. Harvest arrived as quickly as it wrapped up, but the cool August nights let us pick in ideal conditions. The first bin of Sauvignon Blanc arrived at the winery on August 17 from our Calistoga Estate Vineyard, and the last bin came in on September 21 from our Merino Vineyard on the outskirts of Santa Rosa

name: Famille Perrin  Coudoulet de Beaucastel AOP Cote de Rhone Blanc
desc_en_short: The 2015 Coudoulet de Beaucastel Côtes du Rhône Blanc had just been bottled and showed a medium-bodied, rich, nicely textured style to go with pretty, citrus, floral and honeyed aromas and flavors. It’s a no brainer purchase to drink over the coming couple of years, although I’ve had plenty of delicious aged examples of this cuvée as well.

name: Torres  Sangre de Toro White
desc_en_short: Pale gold color. Fragrant and exquisite, with very fresh floral (orange blossom honey) and fruit (pineapple, peach jam) aromas. Intense on the palate with delicate acidity reminiscent of reinette apples.

name: Santa Cristina By Antinori  Bianco Umbria IGT
food_matching: Lobster, Creamy Pasta, Roasted Chicken, Rich Fish
desc_en_short: Santa Cristina Bianco Umbria is a fresh, clean central Italian white — a Grechetto-based blend from Umbria with citrus, white flowers, and light mineral notes, uncomplicated and food-friendly for everyday enjoyment.

name: Livon  Collio Pinot Grigio DOC
wine_color: It is straw yellow colored with slight ash grey reflections.
desc_en_short: It is straw yellow colored with slight ash grey reflections. It has a fragrant bouquet, recalling vanilla and lime flowers. On the palate it is strong with a long finish.

name: Livon  Collio Sauvignon Blanc DOC
wine_color: It has a straw yellow color, with golden and greenish reflections.
desc_en_short: It has a straw yellow color, with golden and greenish reflections. Its bouquet, intense and characteristic, recalls exotic fruit, melon and yellow peppers. A wide range of aromas are very well balanced. On the palate it is dry, with a good structure, generous.

name: Livon  Collio Chardonnay DOC
desc_en_short: Bright straw yellow color; it has a very elegant bouquet, ranging from apple to bread crust, to peach and hazelnut. On the palate it is velvety and leaves the mouth clean and dry.

name: Baron Philippe de Rothschild  Escudo Rojo Gran Reserva Chardonnay
wine_color: An attractive pale yellow with a golden hue.
desc_en_short: From a very fine, elegant and succulent attack that displays freshness, good substance and excellent acidity, the generous and seductive mid-palate reveals pineapple, mango and nectarine flavours together with delicate notes of nuts.

name: Jermann  Chardonnay "W…Dreams" DOC
flavor_tags: Minerality, Hazelnut, Truffle, Mineral, Apple, Smoky, Honey, Pear, Oak
food_matching: Lobster, Creamy Pasta, Roasted Chicken, Rich Fish
desc_en_short: W…Dreams is Jermann's iconic, age-worthy barrel-fermented Chardonnay — a benchmark Friulian white of considerable complexity and depth, delivering golden apple, pear, toasted hazelnut, honey, and white truffle notes with a long, majestic mineral finish.

name: Finca La Celia  Pioneer Chardonnay
desc_en_short: The organoleptic aspect reveals a deep ruby red colour. The perfume is complex but expresses all the typical scents of the variety. The taste is structured, with important tannins and great persistence.

name: De Bortoli  DB Family Selection Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: Aromas of kiwi and passionfruits are backed up by a juicy tropical palate with just enough acidity to add some crunch.

name: Concha Y Toro  Casillero Del Diablo Reserva Privada Sauvignon Blanc
wine_color: Light yellow with very bright overtones.
desc_en_short: At first, the grapefruit and yellow lime notes of this fresh, dry wine come out strongly. It has a crisp, even juicy, acidity. Its palate is clean and the long, elegant finish is complemented with a slight hint of green chili pepper. Ideally combined with oysters and seafood seasoned with lemon or lime juice. In general fresh or cooked seafood is an excellent pairing for this wine.

name: Talamonti  Trabocchetto Pecorino IGP Colline Poscaresi
desc_en_short: A brilliant pale straw color. A wonderful bouquet of white pulp fruit. Explosive flavors of ripe pear, renetta apple, ginestra flowers and jasmine accompanied by a gentle and refreshing acidity.

name: Concha Y Toro  Marques de Casa Concha Chardonnay
desc_en_short: Light yellow in color. Combining richness with elegance and vibrancy this ripe, delicious wine serves up tasty white pear, mineral notes and toasty hazelnut. Deeply concentrated with a silky texture and layers of pears and ripe figs and mineral flavors with a long and vibrant finish.

name: Yalumba  Samuel's Collection Eden Valley Viognier
Famille Perrin  Réserve Côtes-du-Rhône Blanc
wine_color: Beautiful bright color with green undertones.

name: De Stefani  Pinot Grigio
wine_color: Straw yellow colour with coppery hues.
desc_en_short: Straw yellow colour with coppery hues, elegant and delicate bouquet, with fruit notes, full body, with a nut and toasted almond finish.  Ideal with sophisticated hors d'oeuvres, fish courses and eggs.

name: Velenosi  Verdicchio Classico DOC
wine_color: Straw yellow with brilliant green reflections.
desc_en_short: Straw yellow with brilliant green reflections. The medium and complex nose evokes floral, fruity and mineral notes. On the palate, it offers a broad mouthfeel that leads into a long finish. Enjoy this dry, medium-bodied and fruity white featuring refreshing acidity. Pairings with fish-based main dishes, Meat or mushroom-based pasta or rice dishes.

name: Sella & Mosca  Vermentino di Gallura Superiore Monteoro
Santa Ema  Select Terroir Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: A bright straw yellow color. Highly aromatic citrus fruit with notes of pears and apples. Young and fresh with pleasing balanced acidity. Drink with mild-flavored fish, shellfish, cevivhes and fresh cheeses.

name: Tenuta delle Terre Nere  Etna Bianco DOC
desc_en_short: “The first time I produced this wine was in 2005. Basically I wanted to remove the white grapes that, in the old vines, it was customary to plant in small quantities mixed with the reds, to make my Etna Rosso with just Nerello. The white grapes were a blend of native varietals: Carricante, Catarratto, Inzolia, Grecanico and Minnella. And from the blending of these grapes, with a prevalence of Carricante, my Etna Bianco was born” Marco de Grazia And it still is. All from old vines. And somehow it works. A perfect, delicious wine. With the spontaneous grace of a dancer, it never loses its brightness and pace. Subtly drinkable, as it ages, the nobility of its terroir emerges decisively. And grace becomes thoughtful and profound, but always graceful, never redundant. With fish, chicken, rabbit. With prosciutto and melon, salami and figs. With fish first courses, risotto. It has great versatility and ease of drinking.

name: Chateau Musar  Jeune White
desc_en_short: Musar Jeune White is an unoaked blend of Viognier, Vermentino, Chardonnay from youthful Bekaa Valley vines. Crisp and aromatic, this eclectic blend of French and Italian varieties has its own distinct personality – passionfruit, apples, elderflowers – and a dry, refreshing finish.

name: Victoria Park  Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: This Sauvignon Blanc is pale straw in colour with hints of green. Flavours are reminiscent of grapefruit, green papaya, fresh lemongrass & nettle, finishing with a citrus zest.

name: The Long Little Dog  Blanc
wine_color: The wine is bright yellow with greenish tints.

name: Louis Latour  Chablis Chanfleure
wine_color: A brilliant pale yellow color with green reflections.
desc_en_short: A brilliant pale yellow color with green reflections. Its nose reveals notes of honeysuckle. Its mouth, round and fresh, reveals aromas of white peach with a mineral finish.

name: Louis Latour  Bourgogne Chardonnay
wine_color: bright yellow color with green hues
desc_en_short: The result of a long history, Burgundy and its wines are known worldwide. Chardonnay is a native grape variety of the area. Chardonnay perfectly matches the terroir of Burgundy: poor soils or calcareous marl, perfect exposure but a temperate climate. As a result the sugar content can reach a high level whilst maintaining a balance of fruit and acidity.

name: Dominio de Punctum  Finca Fabian Verdejo
Judith Beck  Bambule Chardonnay
desc_en_short: This wine is Elegant gold / yellow. On first opening, the aromas are quite reductive at first, then slowly, they start to evolve and burst out of the glass. Fresh and medium bodied, a mega Chardonnay with versatility for food pairing.

name: Albert Bichot  Domaine Long-Depaquit Chablis Grand Cru "Moutonne" Monopole
desc_en_short: “La Moutonne” is a vineyard nestled in a natural amphitheater at the heart of the Grand Cru sector of the historic age-old Chablis wine country. Its shape and ideal location make it a natural solar receptor. Sitting 95% in “Vaudésir” and 5% in “Les Preuses” (formerly owned by the Pontigny monks), “La Moutonne” is a monopoly meaning Domaine Long-Depaquit is the sole owner. With its south/south-eastern exposure and a steep slope of almost 40%, this vineyard is protected from north winds.

name: Ropiteau  Chardonnay Les Plants Nobles Vin De France
food_matching: Lobster, Creamy Pasta, Roasted Chicken, Rich Fish

name: Voyager Estate  Coastal Chardonnay
desc_en_short: The essence of Margaret River Chardonnay grown from our certified organic coastal vines. Abundant ripe fruit flavour but with a delicate citrus line throughout. Eminently drinkable, with an ease and breeze that suits any occasion.

name: Montgras  Day One Chardonnay
wine_color: An attractive yellow colour with golden hues
desc_en_short:
An attractive yellow colour with golden hues. Intense aromas of citrus fruit and blossom with subtle hints
of pineapple and tropical fruit notes. Very well-balanced with good volume in the mouth, correct
acidity and a creamy texture that envelopes the palate.

name: Quinta Da Fonte Souto  Florão White
Domaine De Rochebin  Bourgogne Chardonnay
desc_en_short: Aromas of white flowers, peach, yellow apples and citrus. The taste is fresh and fruity with hints of citrus and minerals and has a balanced acid.

name: La Cour Des Dames  Chardonnay
wine_color: With its clear and limpid lovely golden colour
desc_en_short: With its clear and limpid lovely golden colour, this wine has fruity aromas of apple and apricot, white flowers and hazelnut, with a slightly buttery finish and subtle vanilla hints.

name: La Cour Des Dames  Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: Our Sauvignon Blanc has a lovely pale colour. It is rich and aromatic with intense scents of fruit (gooseberry, passion fruit, green tomatoe, wild strawberry and lemon). It also displays floral nuances (honeysuckle), and mineral «flinty» scents from the limestone soil. It is very fresh on the palate with a good acidity and a touch of refreshing bitterness in the finish.

name: Naudin Père & Fils  Chardonnay
food_matching: Lobster, Creamy Pasta, Roasted Chicken, Rich Fish

name: Jeff Carrel  Sign of the times Chardonnay
desc_en_short: Pale gold. Very expressive, notes of roasted almonds-hazelnuts, confited citrus fruit and a good dose of vanilled butter and toasted bread. Round, rich, with a soft and envelopping substance, as a whole well balanced with a sparse freshness, the end taste is very intense and is marked by notes of wood (buttered/toasty/smoked/vanilla) upheld by a slight bitterness and spices.

name: Jeff Carrel Morillon Blanc
desc_en_short: Straw yellow. Ripe and expressive, notes of pears, peaches and pineapples, with hints of roasted butter. Well-rounded and rich, with a ripe, dense, almost fatty matter, and an acidity which balances and refreshes the whole. Clear, finely astringent, with the ever present mature fruit, but also toasted bread, a touch of butter and a hint of vanilla.

name: Baron de Lestac Bordeaux Blanc
wine_color: Bright pale gold with greenish highlights.
desc_en_short: The liveliness and balance of our white Bordeaux comes firstly from our choice of grape variety: Baron de Lestac white is made from Sauvignon, which gives the wine white flower notes. Its vinification in oak brings body, structure and length.

name: Angove  Anchorage Semillon  Sauvignon Blanc
wine_color: Pale straw in colour with attractive green hues
desc_en_short: Pale straw in colour. The distinctive herbaceous and tropical characters typical of perfectly ripened Sauvignon Blanc leap from the glass followed by delicate citrus notes from the Semillon. Clean crisp flavours of tropical fruits abound with some light gocseberry/herbaceous notes and a long full clean finish.

name: Aromo  Reserva Privada Sauvignon Blanc
wine_color: Bright pale yellow color with seducing greenish hues.
desc_en_short: This wine is Bright pale yellow color with seducing greenish hues. Citrusy, with notes of grapefruit, orange blossoms and a hint of passion fruit. Fresh, savory and with good volume. Enticing tropical flavors and a good fruit to acidity balance.

name: Domaine de la Motte  Chablis Vieilles Vignes
desc_en_short: More full bodied, complex and intense than the regular Chablis from Domaine de la Motte. The nose is very much Chablis with an earthy, chalky element. The palate is rounder in comparison, with ripe fruit and herbs - the small amount of oak influence in this cuvee gives the wine a rounded aspect with old vines bringing depth and complexity.

name: Gerard Bertrand  Art de Vivre Languedoc AOP (Clairette)
wine_color: This wine has an elegant straw-yellow colour decorated with green reflections

name: The Blind Pig  Chardonnay
desc_en_short: Attractive lemon curd and white flower notes dominate the bouquet. Nougat, lemon barley and mealy notes are evident with beautifully balanced oak on the palate. Hints of minerality are perceptible and will continue to evolve. A fine Chardonnay - tightly structured with crisp acidity.

name: Gerard Bertrand  Naturae Orange
wine_color: This blend has a beautifully bright appearance with hints of orange.

name: Headline Acts  Sauvignon Blanc (750 ml)
flavor_tags: Green Apple, Herbaceous, Citrus, Grassy, Apple
food_matching: Seafood, Oysters, Salad, Light Fish, Goat Cheese
desc_en_short: Headline Acts Sauvignon Blanc is a fresh, zesty Australian white with classic varietal character — crisp citrus, green herbs, gooseberry, and a clean, refreshing finish built for easy everyday enjoyment.

name: Talamonti  Aternum Trebbiano D'Abruzzo
desc_en_short: The link to the Abruzzi region, to its history, and our roots represents the basis for the selection of all the names of Talamonti wines. Therefore the choice to link the Trebbiano d’Abruzzo, prince white grape of the Abruzzi, to one of the most important landmarks of the area was clear. The first inhabitants of the area founded only 20km away a village on the banks of the Aternum River, naming it “Vicus Aterni”. The village remains are still visible today in modern-day Pescara. A few centuries later the name was changed to “Aternum”, in honor of the river itself.

name: Tarapaca  Gran Reserva Chardonnay
wine_color: Pale yellow in color with greenish reflections

name: Sitzius   Niederhauser Hermannshohle Riesling Spatlese Trocken
desc_en_short: This wine is tropical aroma, mango, maracuja, litschi, citrus, Delicious with all kinds of seafood, to fried meat (beef, pork and poultry) and braised vegetables.

name: Alpaca  Sauvignon Blanc
wine_color: Pale-yellow in colour with greenish hues.

name: Los Vascos Cromas Gran Reserva Chardonnay
wine_color: The wine has a delicate yellow color with golden glints.

name: Rainer Wess  Gruner Veltliner
flavor_tags: White Pepper, Green Apple, Asparagus, Mineral, Citrus, Pepper, Apple
desc_en_short: Rainer Wess's Grüner Veltliner is a textbook expression of Austria's signature white variety — crisp, mineral, and distinctly peppery with green apple, citrus, and the characteristic white pepper spice that makes Grüner Veltliner one of Europe's most food-friendly wines.

name: Rainer Wess  Riesling
flavor_tags: Green Apple, Minerality, Asparagus, Blossom, Mineral, Citrus, Peach, Lemon, Apple, Slate
desc_en_short: Rainer Wess's Riesling from the Wachau is a precise, mineral Austrian white — citrus-sharp and stony with green apple, lime, white peach, and the focused, crystalline acidity that defines great Danube Riesling.

name: Rainer Wess  Ried Pfaffenberg Riesling Reserve
flavor_tags: Minerality, Apricot, Truffle, Mineral, Citrus, Peach, Lime
desc_en_short: Ried Pfaffenberg is one of the Kamptal's grand cru vineyard sites, and Rainer Wess's Reserve Riesling from this south-facing slope delivers a wine of exceptional depth and minerality — intense citrus, stone fruit, and a long, crystalline finish that rewards cellaring.

name: Dog Point  Sauvignon Blanc "Section 94"
desc_en_short:
A complex full bodied style of Sauvignon Blanc with a chalky minerality and fresh herbal influence, complimented by a vibrant acidity which gives the wine focus. Suggested food matches for Section 94 include fish (particularly salmon), poultry and soft white cheeses.

This single vineyard parcel is situated within the Dog Point Vineyard, using the same low cropping level from vines planted in 1992. Fruit is hand-picked, whole bunch pressed and fermented and aged in older French oak barrels for 18 months. Bottled without fining.

name: Edition Abtei  Himmerod Riesling Trocken Alte Rebe
flavor_tags: Asparagus, Mineral, Citrus, Petrol, Peach, Slate
desc_en_short: Himmerod Alte Rebe is a dry old-vine Riesling from one of the Mosel's lesser-known but characterful sub-regions — concentrated and mineral with citrus, stone fruit, and the depth of flavour that only old vines on slate can deliver.

name: Max Ferd. Richter  Mulheimer Helenenkloster Riesling Spatlese
Max Ferd. Richter  Graacher Dompropst Riesling Alte Reben
flavor_tags: Minerality, Apricot, Mineral, Citrus, Petrol, Peach, Lemon, Honey, Slate, Lime
desc_en_short: Graacher Dompropst is one of the Mosel's most celebrated Grosses Gewächs sites, and Max Ferd. Richter's old-vine Riesling from this great vineyard is a wine of stunning concentration and precision — citrus, stone fruit, and the iconic mineral intensity of ancient slate.

name: Max Ferd. Richter  Wehlener Sonnenuhr Riesling GG 'Uralte Reben' Trocken
flavor_tags: Blossom, Mineral, Lanolin, Citrus, Peach, Lemon, Slate, Lime
desc_en_short: Wehlener Sonnenuhr is perhaps the most iconic vineyard in the Mosel, and Max Ferd. Richter's Grosses Gewächs from Uralte Reben (ancient vines) is a dry Riesling of monumental precision — crystalline citrus, mineral intensity, and extraordinary length from some of the valley's oldest vines.

name: Schieferkopf  Baden Riesling Trocken Sec
desc_en_short: Schieferkopf's Baden Riesling Trocken is a dry, mineral Riesling from Michel Chapoutier's German estate — precise and refreshing with citrus, stone fruit, and a stony mineral character that reflects the region's granitic soils.

name: Ulrich Langguth  Riseling QBA Dry Traben Gaispfad
Ulrich Langguth  Riesling Quality Off Dry
Villa Huesgen  Riesling Kabinett Off Dry
Bianka & Daniel Schmitt  Feminin Trocken
desc_en_short: 4-week maceration for the Chardonnay grapes. Matured in small barrique barrels and bottled un ltered with no added sulfur.

name: Nik Weis  Goldtröpfchen Riesling VDP.GRAND CRU (GROSSES GEWÄCHS)
Sileni Estates  Cellar Selection Pinot Gris Hawke's Bay
Sileni Estates	 The Straits Marlborough Sauvignon Blanc
Mud House  Sub Region Series Sauvignon Blanc
desc_en_short: Situated at the eastern end of Rapaura Road, where Bony Braided River soils meet the more alluvial and younger silts. This convergence of soil profiles gives an overt lift and pungency to Sauvignon Blanc; while adding lovely crunch and phenolic textures.

name: Heim  Pinot Blanc Imperial
desc_en_short: Golden-yellow robe. Intense nose, specific to the grape-variety, with dried fruits notes. Straightforward on the mouth, this wine is also well-balanced. Its roundness makes it a very pleasant and easy-to-drink wine.

name: Baron Philippe de Rothschild  Mouton Cadet Bordeaux Blanc BIO "Nathan"
wine_color: Golden, with a slight ivory hue.
desc_en_short: This fresh, solar and bright, organic and vegan white wine is made from Sauvignon Blanc, a typical Bordeaux grape variety.

name: Velenosi  Villa Angela Chardonnay IGT
desc_en_short: Fresh and fragrant, this wine delivers all the typical aromas of its variety with elegance and a remarkable structure. It has a pleasant strong acidity.

name: Concha Y Toro  Casillero Del Diablo Devil's Carnaval Phenomenal Sauvignon
desc_en_short: Phenomenal Sauvignon has attractive citrus and tropical fruit aromas. It dazzles with a balanced acidity and a phenomenal harmony. Ideal to enjoy with all kinds of appetizers, and perfect for celebrations accompanied with sushi or fish & chips.

name: Luigi Bosca  De Sangre White Blend
Louis Latour  Chateau De Blagny Meursault 1er Cru
desc_en_short: Situated just south of Volnay and Pommard in the Côte de Beaune, Meursault is the most extensive southerly white wine commune of the Côte-d'Or. Surprisingly for an appellation of this quality, no Grand Cru exists, however the high quality of the 1er Cru more than compensates for this. An exclusive of Maison Louis Latour (monopole), the vineyards constituting the estate of the Château de Blagny are located high on the hillside overlooking Meursault and Puligny-Montrachet. Château de Blagny is the most important domaine in the commune.

name: Xige Estate  Jade Dove White (Welschriesling, Ugni Blanc)
Donnafugata  D&G Isolano Erna Bianco DOC
wine_color: Straw yellow color with golden reflections

name: Pietradolce  Etna Bianco
desc_en_short: Pietradolce Etna Bianco is produced only from Carricante grapes, obtained from vineyards grown on sandy-loam soils with abundant volcanic rock, on the northern slopes of Etna, at a height ranging from 700 to 800 meters above sea level. The manual harvest takes place between the end of September and the beginning of October. The gentle pressing, followed by aging for 4-6 months in steel, produces a wine with a strong, fresh and lively timbre.

name: L'Archetipo  Fiano IGP Salento
wine_color: Straw yellow colour with greenish yellow reflex.

name: Sato  Riesling "L'Atypique"
desc_en_short: Rich and golden-hued in the glass, this is a light and delicate wine. Textured, pithy, citrus and savoury, with flinty minerality and energetic, juicy acidity. Classic riesling notes underpinned by fine-grained, well-integrated tannins.

name: Fontanafredda  Roero Arneis Pradalupo DOCG
wine_color: Intense straw yellow with greenish reflexes.
desc_en_short: The colour is intense straw yellow with greenish reflexes. The bouquet is reminiscent of exotic fruits, matured peers, hawthorn and acacia honey. In the mouth is warm, velvety, sweet with a nice acidity level, giving the wine freshness and a long lasting aftertaste.

name: Fontanafredda  Gavi Del Commune Di Gavi DOCG
desc_en_short: This is a white wine with a good personality. The colour is straw-yellow with greenish highlights. On the nose is full, with an intense bouquet featuring acacia and thrush ﬂower, lemon, and unripe apple. The palate is nicely dry, full, and sapid.

name: Jean-Paul Picard  Le Chemin de Marloup Sancerre Blanc
desc_en_short: White Sancerre is a dry, fruity wine, made from Sauvignon Blanc, harvested from limestone-clay soils. On the nose it shows superb aromas of citrus fruits, allied to a touch of minerality. Serve at 10°, it is ideal with fish, shellfish, seafood, goat's cheese, or simply as an aperitif.

name: Fantini  Pinot Grigio Terre Siciliane
wine_color: Straw yellow color with golden highlights.
desc_en_short:
Straw yellow
color with golden highlights

with

; finish is long, clean,

name: Maison Jaffelin  Chablis
desc_en_short:
The world-famous Chablis vineyards are Burgundy’s 
northernmost. The soil is clay-limestone and very 
rich in fossils, which endows Chablis wines with 
their characteristic mineral aromas.

name: Karthäuserhof  Vdp.Grosse Lage Karthäuserhofberg Kabinett
desc_en_short:
The wine shows a ripe and aromatic nose of pineapple, 
almond, pear, mirabelle, some buttery elements and honeyed 
yellow fruits. It proves delicately fruity and creamy on the 
juicy yet fresh and citrus-driven palate with a finish which is 
nicely aromatic and full of presence.

name: Karthäuserhof Bruno Riesling Kabinett Feinherb
desc_en_short:
Intense fruit, juice vineyard peach, white grapefruit,
some pineapple and sweet exotic hints. Also fruity
on the palate, but without any heaviness. A classic
Kabinett which brings fruit, acidity and sweetness in
perfect balance.

name: Palmila Sauvignon Blanc
style: Sauvignon Blanc (โซวีญง บล็อง)
desc_en_short: A crisp and refreshing Sauvignon Blanc (โซวีญง บลอง) with bright citrus, green apple, and passion fruit aromas. Zesty acidity and a clean mineral finish make it ideal for seafood, salads, and light appetizers.

name: Maison Leroy Meursault 2000
flavor_tags: Dried Apricot, Limestone, Hazelnut, Apricot, Truffle, Mineral, Beeswax, Butter, Apple, Cream
desc_en_short: Maison Leroy's Meursault 2000 is a rare, mature Burgundy from one of the appellation's finest négociants — a profound, complex Chardonnay from a celebrated vintage, offering evolved Meursault character of golden apple, hazelnut, truffle, and butter with a long, mineral-rich finish.

name: Chateau d'Yquem  "Y" Bordeaux Blanc 2017
desc_en_short:
98 Points James Suckling

This is an exotic dry white with dried mango and pineapple and some slate throughout. Full-bodied with dense, rich fruit and saltiness, which, together with extremely energetic acidity, really drive the finish. Drink now or hold.
